idea_spark.risk: 小网格块可能限制GPU并行度，需平衡通信与计算开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从p4est的并行树管理中获得启发，可应用于其他自适应数据结构。

en.tldr: Developed foap4, an AMR framework in Fortran using OpenACC, MPI, and p4est, enabling efficient GPU-based adaptive mesh refinement simulations.
en.motivation: To understand necessary changes for adding GPU support to parallel AMR codes written in Fortran.
en.method: Implemented the foap4 AMR framework in Fortran with OpenACC, MPI, and p4est, solving Euler's equations with explicit time integration.
en.result: Efficient AMR simulations on GPUs in 2D and 3D, with static and adaptive meshes, across varying problem sizes and hardware, even with small grid blocks of 8^3 or 16^3 cells.
en.help_to_user: Demonstrates how to efficiently implement AMR on GPUs using OpenACC and MPI, providing guidance for GPU porting of Fortran codes.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage p4est's tree structure to design more flexible grid block size adaptation for better GPU utilization.
idea_spark.risk: Small grid blocks may limit GPU parallelism; need to balance communication and computation overhead.
idea_spark.inspiration: p4est's parallel tree management inspires applications to other adaptive data structures.

papers.title: A Semi-smooth Newton Method for the Constrained Optimal Control of Continuous-Time Linear Systems
papers.summary: This paper details a novel indirect method for solving constrained optimal control problems (OCPs) directly in continuous-time function space. The KKT conditions are embedded in a non-smooth complementarity function, which enables their reformulation as a rootfinding problem in Banach space. This problem is then solved using a non-smooth Newton method. Finally, the paper shows that the Newton update can be obtained by solving a modified differential Riccati equation, where the cost terms are reweighted at every iteration based on the constraint multipliers. Numerical simulations show the effectiveness of the method, which converges superlinearly up to the tolerance of the ODE solver.

ai.tldr: 提出一种半光滑牛顿法，直接在连续时间函数空间中求解带约束的最优控制问题，通过非光滑互补函数将KKT条件转化为根求解问题，并利用修正的微分Riccati方程高效更新。
ai.motivation: 现有间接法处理连续时间约束最优控制时，常面临数值困难或收敛缓慢的问题，需要一种兼具理论严谨性和计算效率的新方法。
ai.method: 将KKT条件嵌入非光滑互补函数，转化为Banach空间中的根求解问题，采用半光滑牛顿法迭代求解，其中牛顿步通过修正的微分Riccati方程获得，每次迭代根据约束乘子重新加权成本项。
ai.result: 数值仿真表明该方法收敛速度超线性，且精度仅受ODE求解器容差限制。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户高效求解连续时间线性系统的约束最优控制问题，尤其适用于需要高精度和快速收敛的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将约束乘子引入Riccati方程的成本重加权机制，可能启发自适应权重调整方法，用于处理时变或状态依赖的约束。
idea_spark.risk: 半光滑牛顿法对初始点敏感，且修正Riccati方程的计算复杂度可能随系统维度增加而显著上升。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴互补函数在力学接触问题中的成功应用，将其引入最优控制领域，开辟了间接法处理约束的新路径。

idea_spark.idea: 将约束乘子引入Riccati方程的成本重加权机制，可能启发自适应权重调整方法，用于处理时变或状态依赖的约束。
idea_spark.risk: 半光滑牛顿法对初始点敏感，且修正Riccati方程的计算复杂度可能随系统维度增加而显著上升。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴互补函数在力学接触问题中的成功应用，将其引入最优控制领域，开辟了间接法处理约束的新路径。

en.tldr: A semi-smooth Newton method is proposed to solve constrained optimal control problems directly in continuous-time function space, reformulating KKT conditions as a rootfinding problem via a non-smooth complementarity function and updating via a modified differential Riccati equation.
en.motivation: Existing indirect methods for continuous-time constrained optimal control often suffer from numerical difficulties or slow convergence, motivating a new approach that combines theoretical rigor with computational efficiency.
en.method: The KKT conditions are embedded in a non-smooth complementarity function, reformulated as a rootfinding problem in Banach space, and solved with a semi-smooth Newton method. The Newton step is obtained by solving a modified differential Riccati equation where cost terms are reweighted each iteration based on constraint multipliers.
en.result: Numerical simulations demonstrate superlinear convergence, with accuracy limited only by the ODE solver tolerance.
en.help_to_user: Helps users efficiently solve constrained optimal control problems for continuous-time linear systems, especially when high accuracy and fast convergence are required.

idea_spark.idea: The cost reweighting mechanism in the Riccati equation based on constraint multipliers may inspire adaptive weighting methods for time-varying or state-dependent constraints.
idea_spark.risk: Semi-smooth Newton methods are sensitive to initial guesses, and the computational complexity of the modified Riccati equation may grow significantly with system dimension.
idea_spark.inspiration: Drawing from the successful use of complementarity functions in mechanical contact problems, this work opens a new path for indirect methods to handle constraints in optimal control.

papers.title: A Bismut-Elworthy formula for BSDEs with degenerate noise
papers.summary: In this paper we derive a Bismut-Elworthy formula under assumptions weaker than the non degeneracy of the noise. By Bismut-Elworthy formula we mean a gradient type estimate on the transition semigroup of a stochastic differential equation in a possibly infinite dimensional Hilbert space. We also consider a nonlinear version of the Bismut formula for a backward stochastic differential equation, in analogy to what is done in \cite{futeBismut}, where a non-degenerate noise is considered. Our study is motivated by applications to stochastic wave equations and to stochastic damped wave equation.

ai.tldr: 本文在噪声退化的条件下推导了Bismut-Elworthy公式，并考虑了非线性版本，应用于随机波动方程。
ai.motivation: 现有Bismut-Elworthy公式通常要求噪声非退化，本文旨在放宽这一条件，使其适用于更广泛的随机系统。
ai.method: 通过分析随机微分方程的转移半群，在无穷维Hilbert空间中建立梯度型估计，并类比非退化情形推导BSDE的非线性Bismut公式。
ai.result: 得到了退化噪声下的Bismut-Elworthy公式及其非线性版本，为随机波动方程和随机阻尼波动方程提供了理论工具。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解退化噪声下随机系统的梯度估计，为相关方程的数值分析和控制设计提供基础。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将退化噪声Bismut公式应用于随机Navier-Stokes方程或随机热方程，检验其适用性。
idea_spark.risk: 退化噪声可能导致估计不唯一或需要额外的正则性条件，增加理论复杂性。

zh.motivation: 现有Bismut-Elworthy公式通常要求噪声非退化，本文旨在放宽这一条件，使其适用于更广泛的随机系统。
zh.method: 通过分析随机微分方程的转移半群，在无穷维Hilbert空间中建立梯度型估计，并类比非退化情形推导BSDE的非线性Bismut公式。
zh.result: 得到了退化噪声下的Bismut-Elworthy公式及其非线性版本，为随机波动方程和随机阻尼波动方程提供了理论工具。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解退化噪声下随机系统的梯度估计，为相关方程的数值分析和控制设计提供基础。

en.tldr: This paper derives a Bismut-Elworthy formula under degenerate noise and its nonlinear version for BSDEs, with applications to stochastic wave equations.
en.motivation: Existing Bismut-Elworthy formulas typically require non-degenerate noise; this work relaxes that condition to cover broader stochastic systems.
en.method: By analyzing the transition semigroup of SDEs in infinite-dimensional Hilbert spaces, gradient-type estimates are established, and a nonlinear Bismut formula for BSDEs is derived analogously to the non-degenerate case.
en.result: A Bismut-Elworthy formula under degenerate noise and its nonlinear counterpart are obtained, providing theoretical tools for stochastic wave and damped wave equations.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand gradient estimates for stochastic systems with degenerate noise, laying groundwork for numerical analysis and control design.

idea_spark.idea: Attempt to apply the degenerate-noise Bismut formula to stochastic Navier-Stokes or heat equations to test its applicability.
idea_spark.risk: Degenerate noise may lead to non-unique estimates or require additional regularity conditions, increasing theoretical complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by applications to stochastic wave equations, explore analogous formulas in financial stochastic volatility models with degenerate noise.

papers.title: EULER-ADAS: Energy-Efficient & SIMD-Unified Logarithmic-Posit Engine for Precision-Reconfigurable Approximate ADAS Acceleration
papers.summary: Advanced driver-assistance systems (ADAS) require neural compute engines that deliver low-latency inference under strict power and area constraints. Posit arithmetic is attractive for such accelerators because it provides high numerical fidelity at low precision, but its variable-length regime encoding increases encode/decode cost and exposes the datapath to large regime-field fault effects. This paper presents EULER-ADAS, a SIMD-enabled logarithmic bounded-Posit neural compute engine for energyefficient and reliability-aware ADAS acceleration. The proposed datapath combines bounded-regime Posit representation, stageadaptive logarithmic mantissa multiplication with bit truncation, and a SIMD-shared quire accumulation path supporting Posit- (8,0), Posit-(16,1), and Posit-(32,2) execution. The unified architecture enables 4xPosit-8, 2xPosit-16, or 1xPosit-32 operation without duplicating precision-specific hardware. FPGA implementation shows that the proposed configurations reduce LUT count by up to 41.4%, delay by up to 76.1%, and power by up to 71.9% relative to exact Posit neural compute engines, while achieving up to 10x lower energy-delay product than radix-4 Booth-based Posit multipliers. In 28-nm CMOS, the bounded variants occupy 0.013-0.016 mm2 , consume 19.8-22.1 mW, and operate at up to 1.84 GHz. Application-level evaluation across image-classification, ADAS, and edge-inference workloads shows that the evaluated Posit-16 and Posit-32 configurations remain within about 1.5 percentage points of FP32 accuracy. A TinyYOLOv3 prototype on Pynq-Z2 achieves 78 ms latency at 0.29 W and 22.6 mJ/frame, demonstrating the suitability of EULERADAS for low-power real-time ADAS inference.

ai.tldr: 提出EULER-ADAS，一种支持SIMD的对数有界Posit神经计算引擎，用于低功耗、高可靠性的ADAS加速。
ai.motivation: ADAS推理需低延迟、低功耗，Posit算术精度高但编解码开销大，且变长域编码易出错。
ai.method: 结合有界域Posit表示、分段自适应对数尾数乘法与位截断、SIMD共享quire累加路径，支持4×Posit-8/2×Posit-16/1×Posit-32统一架构。
ai.result: FPGA实现相比精确Posit引擎减少LUT最多41.4%、延迟最多76.1%、功耗最多71.9%；28nm CMOS下面积0.013-0.016 mm²，功耗19.8-22.1 mW，频率1.84 GHz；TinyYOLOv3在Pynq-Z2上延迟78 ms，功耗0.29 W，22.6 mJ/帧。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效、可重构的Posit神经引擎设计，适合资源受限的ADAS边缘部署。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将SIMD共享quire路径用于混合精度训练或在线精度自适应。
idea_spark.risk: 有界域可能限制动态范围，需评估极端场景下的数值稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合对数乘法和位截断降低乘法开销的思路可启发其他低精度算术单元设计。

en.tldr: Presents EULER-ADAS, a SIMD-enabled logarithmic bounded-Posit neural compute engine for energy-efficient and reliable ADAS acceleration.
en.motivation: ADAS inference demands low latency and low power; Posit arithmetic offers high precision but suffers from high encode/decode cost and variable-length regime faults.
en.method: Combines bounded-regime Posit representation, stage-adaptive logarithmic mantissa multiplication with bit truncation, and a SIMD-shared quire accumulation path supporting 4×Posit-8, 2×Posit-16, or 1×Posit-32 operation without hardware duplication.

en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient, reconfigurable Posit neural engine suitable for resource-constrained ADAS edge deployment.

idea_spark.idea: Explore using the SIMD-shared quire path for mixed-precision training or online precision adaptation.
idea_spark.risk: Bounded regime may limit dynamic range; numerical stability in extreme scenarios needs evaluation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The approach of combining logarithmic multiplication and bit truncation to reduce multiplier cost can inspire other low-precision arithmetic unit designs.

papers.title: Low-Order Explicit Hessian Imitation Method for Large-Scale Supervised Machine Learning
papers.summary: An algorithm is proposed for solving optimization problems arising in neural network training for supervised learning. The unique feature of the algorithm is the use of an auxiliary loss, in addition to the original loss employed for model training. The purpose of the auxiliary loss is to provide a mechanism for creating a low-order Hessian-type approximation for the original loss. The proposed algorithm employs the resulting low-order second-derivative approximation terms in place of the second-order momentum terms (i.e., squared elements of the gradient of the loss function) in an overall scheme that has computational cost on par with an Adam-type approach. Whereas the squared elements of a gradient vector do not necessarily approximate second-order derivatives well, by careful construction of the auxiliary loss, second-order derivative-type approximations for the original loss can be computed and employed by the algorithm in an efficient manner. A convergence guarantee is provided for the proposed algorithm that is on par with guarantees available for similar stochastic diagonal-scaling methods. The results of numerical experiments show situations when the proposed algorithm outperforms Adam and other popular modern optimizers.

ai.tldr: 提出一种低阶显式Hessian模仿算法，通过辅助损失构造二阶近似项，在计算成本与Adam相当的情况下提升大规模监督学习优化性能。
ai.motivation: 现有Adam类方法使用梯度平方项作为二阶动量，但该近似不够准确，影响优化效率。
ai.method: 设计辅助损失函数，从中提取低阶Hessian型近似项，替代原始损失梯度平方项，保持计算成本与Adam相当。
ai.result: 理论收敛性保证与同类随机对角缩放方法相当，数值实验表明在多种场景下优于Adam等流行优化器。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种计算高效且二阶近似更准确的优化器，适用于大规模神经网络训练。

idea_spark.idea: 能否将辅助损失设计为可学习的网络模块，自动生成最优二阶近似？
idea_spark.risk: 辅助损失设计依赖领域知识，自动学习可能引入额外计算开销或不稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Adam动量项与二阶方法结合的启发，但用显式Hessian近似替代梯度平方项。

en.tldr: A low-order explicit Hessian imitation method is proposed, using an auxiliary loss to construct second-order approximations, achieving Adam-level cost while improving optimization for large-scale supervised learning.
en.motivation: Adam-type methods use squared gradient elements as second-order momentum, which are poor approximations of true second-order derivatives.
en.method: An auxiliary loss is designed to extract low-order Hessian-type approximations, replacing squared gradient terms while maintaining computational cost comparable to Adam.
en.result: Convergence guarantees are on par with stochastic diagonal-scaling methods; numerical experiments show advantages over Adam and other optimizers in various settings.
en.help_to_user: Provides a computationally efficient optimizer with better second-order approximation for large-scale neural network training.

idea_spark.idea: Could the auxiliary loss be designed as a learnable module to automatically generate optimal second-order approximations?
idea_spark.risk: Auxiliary loss design relies on domain knowledge; automatic learning may introduce extra cost or instability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by combining Adam's momentum with second-order methods, but replacing gradient squares with explicit Hessian approximations.

papers.title: Distributed Seeking for Fixed Points of Biased Stochastic Operators: A Communication Efficient Approach
papers.summary: This paper investigates the distributed fixed point seeking problem of sum-separable stochastic operators over the multi-agent network. Based on inexact Krasnosel'skiĭ--Mann iterations, the communication-efficient distributed algorithm is proposed under the relaxed growth bias and variance conditions, generalizing traditional unbiased and bounded additive variance assumptions. To enhance communication efficiency, we integrate communication compression and dynamic period skipping techniques, particularly adopting a unified compressor that allows both relative and absolute compression errors. By introducing a surrogate function for general non-contractive and contractive operators, we establish convergence guarantees of the distributed fixed point iteration, achieving among the first theoretical unifications with distributed non-convex optimization algorithms. Finally, numerical simulations validate the effectiveness of the theoretical results.

ai.tldr: 针对多智能体网络中带偏置随机算子的分布式不动点求解问题，提出了一种通信高效的分布式算法。
ai.motivation: 现有分布式不动点算法通常假设无偏或加性方差有界，且通信开销大，难以适应实际中更一般的偏置和方差条件。
ai.method: 基于不精确Krasnosel'skiĭ–Mann迭代，结合通信压缩与动态周期跳过技术，采用统一压缩器同时处理相对和绝对压缩误差。
ai.result: 建立了分布式不动点迭代的收敛保证，首次在理论上与分布式非凸优化算法统一，仿真验证了有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在通信受限的多智能体网络中高效求解带偏置随机算子的不动点问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将统一压缩器与不精确迭代结合，为处理更一般的随机算子提供了新思路。
idea_spark.risk: 理论分析依赖于特定的增长偏置和方差条件，实际应用中可能需调整参数。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将不动点理论与通信高效技术结合，解决更广泛的分布式随机问题。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a communication-efficient distributed algorithm for fixed point seeking of biased stochastic operators over multi-agent networks.
en.motivation: Existing distributed fixed point algorithms often assume unbiasedness or bounded additive variance and incur high communication cost, limiting applicability to more general bias and variance conditions.
en.method: Based on inexact Krasnosel'skiĭ–Mann iterations, the algorithm integrates communication compression and dynamic period skipping, using a unified compressor that handles both relative and absolute compression errors.
en.result: Convergence guarantees are established for the distributed fixed point iteration, achieving one of the first theoretical unifications with distributed non-convex optimization algorithms; simulations validate effectiveness.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to efficiently solve fixed point problems of biased stochastic operators in communication-constrained multi-agent networks.

idea_spark.idea: Combining a unified compressor with inexact iterations offers a new approach to handle more general stochastic operators.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical analysis relies on specific growth bias and variance conditions; parameter tuning may be needed in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires integrating fixed point theory with communication-efficient techniques to address broader distributed stochastic problems.

papers.title: Approximate directional stationarity and associated qualification conditions
papers.summary: Approximate stationarity conditions provide necessary optimality conditions without requiring additional assumptions by demanding that a perturbed stationarity system possesses solutions as the involved perturbations tend to zero. Together with associated approximate constraint qualifications, which are typically rather mild, they raised much interest in the optimization community during the last decade. In parallel, directional stationarity conditions became quite popular as they sharpen standard stationarity conditions by incorporating data associated with underlying critical directions. The purpose of this paper is twofold. First, we melt the aforementioned concepts of approximate and directional stationarity to formulate and study so-called approximate directional stationarity. For the underlying model problem, an optimization problem with nonsmooth geometric constraints is chosen, which covers diverse practically relevant applications. The role of approximate directional stationarity as a necessary optimality condition is investigated in much detail, complementing results from the literature. Second, we formulate a qualification condition which, based on an approximately directionally stationary point, can be exploited to infer its directional stationarity. The latter condition depends on one particular sequence verifying approximate directional stationarity and merely requires to check a simple condition of Mangasarian--Fromovitz type stated in terms of the directional tools of limiting variational analysis. This contrasts standard approximate constraint qualifications that typically demand a certain stable behavior of all sequences validating approximate stationarity. Throughout, various approaches to verify directional stationarity of local minimizers are established, and illustrative examples are presented to make the theoretical results more accessible.

ai.tldr: 本文融合近似平稳性和方向平稳性，提出近似方向平稳性概念，并研究其作为必要最优性条件的作用，同时给出一个基于Mangasarian-Fromovitz型条件的资格条件，用于从近似方向平稳点推断方向平稳性。
ai.motivation: 现有近似平稳性条件无需额外假设即可提供必要最优性条件，而方向平稳性通过引入临界方向信息改进了标准平稳性条件。本文旨在融合两者，提出近似方向平稳性，并建立相应的资格条件。
ai.method: 以带非光滑几何约束的优化问题为模型，定义近似方向平稳性，分析其作为必要最优性条件的性质；提出一个依赖于特定验证序列的资格条件，该条件仅需检查Mangasarian-Fromovitz型条件，无需像传统近似约束资格那样要求所有序列的稳定行为。
ai.result: 证明了近似方向平稳性在较温和条件下可作为必要最优性条件；所提资格条件能从近似方向平稳点推断方向平稳性；通过实例展示了理论结果的可应用性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解近似方向平稳性的理论框架及其与方向平稳性的关系，以及如何利用较弱的资格条件验证局部极小点的方向平稳性。

idea_spark.idea: 将近似方向平稳性应用于机器学习中的非光滑正则化模型（如Lasso、组Lasso），分析其最优性条件，并利用所提资格条件简化验证过程。
idea_spark.risk: 实际应用中，验证近似方向平稳性所需的序列可能难以构造；资格条件对序列的依赖性可能导致计算复杂性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受启发于将近似思想与方向性分析结合，可进一步探索其他类型的近似最优性条件（如近似KKT条件）与方向性条件的融合。

zh.method: 以带非光滑几何约束的优化问题为模型，定义近似方向平稳性，分析其作为必要最优性条件的性质；提出一个依赖于特定验证序列的资格条件，该条件仅需检查Mangasarian-Fromovitz型条件，无需像传统近似约束资格那样要求所有序列的稳定行为。

en.tldr: This paper merges approximate and directional stationarity to propose approximate directional stationarity, studies its role as a necessary optimality condition, and presents a qualification condition of Mangasarian-Fromovitz type to infer directional stationarity from an approximately directionally stationary point.
en.motivation: Approximate stationarity provides necessary optimality conditions without extra assumptions, while directional stationarity sharpens standard conditions by incorporating critical directions. The goal is to combine both concepts and establish associated qualification conditions.
en.method: Using an optimization problem with nonsmooth geometric constraints as the model, define approximate directional stationarity, analyze its necessity for optimality; propose a qualification condition that depends on a single verifying sequence and only requires a Mangasarian-Fromovitz type condition, unlike traditional approximate constraint qualifications that demand stable behavior of all sequences.
en.result: Approximate directional stationarity is shown to be a necessary optimality condition under mild conditions; the proposed qualification condition can infer directional stationarity from an approximately directionally stationary point; illustrative examples demonstrate the theoretical results.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the theoretical framework of approximate directional stationarity and its relation to directional stationarity, and how to verify directional stationarity of local minimizers using a weaker qualification condition.

idea_spark.idea: Apply approximate directional stationarity to nonsmooth regularized models in machine learning (e.g., Lasso, group Lasso) to analyze optimality conditions and simplify verification using the proposed qualification condition.
idea_spark.risk: In practice, constructing the sequence verifying approximate directional stationarity may be difficult; the dependence of the qualification condition on a specific sequence could lead to computational complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by combining approximation ideas with directional analysis, further explore the fusion of other approximate optimality conditions (e.g., approximate KKT) with directional conditions.

papers.title: Curvature Beyond Positivity: Greedy Guarantees for Arbitrary Submodular Functions
papers.summary: Submodular functions -- functions exhibiting diminishing returns -- are central to machine learning. When the objective is monotone and non-negative, the greedy algorithm achieves a tight $63\%$ approximation. But many practical objectives incorporate costs that make them negative on some inputs, and all existing multiplicative guarantees require non-negativity. Prior work handles negativity through additive bounds for the special class of decomposable functions and non-monotonicity through partial-monotonicity parameters, but these address each difficulty in isolation and neither extends the classical structural theory. We extend \emph{curvature} -- a parameter measuring how far a function deviates from linearity -- to all submodular functions, handling both non-monotonicity and negativity through a single classical concept. A greedy algorithm with pruning achieves a curvature-controlled multiplicative ratio for \emph{any} submodular function, including those taking negative values -- the first such guarantee beyond monotonicity and non-negativity. In the non-monotone regime $1 \le c_g < 2.2$, the bound strictly beats the best known uniform ratio of $0.401$ (for non-negative $f$), and it recovers the classical $(1-e^{-c_g})/c_g$ guarantee for monotone functions. A multilinear-extension variant extends the framework to general combinatorial constraints via multilinear relaxation. Experiments on cost-penalized experimental design, coverage, feature selection, and a curvature sweep on Multi-News passage selection support the theory.

ai.tldr: 将曲率概念扩展到所有子模函数，首次为包含负值的任意子模函数提供了贪心算法的乘法保证。
ai.motivation: 现有子模函数贪心算法的保证要求非负性，但实际目标常包含成本导致负值，且非单调性处理孤立，缺乏统一理论。
ai.method: 定义广义曲率参数，结合带剪枝的贪心算法，并引入多线性扩展处理一般组合约束。
ai.result: 对任意子模函数（含负值）得到曲率控制的近似比；非单调情形下优于已知最佳均匀比0.401，单调情形恢复经典界。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何用单一曲率参数统一处理子模优化中的非单调性和负值问题，并指导实际算法选择。

idea_spark.idea: 将曲率从单调非负函数推广到一般子模函数，通过剪枝贪心实现首个通用保证。
idea_spark.risk: 曲率计算可能复杂，且剪枝策略在极端负值下可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从经典曲率概念出发，突破非负性限制，启发其他优化问题中参数化保证的扩展。

en.tldr: Extends curvature to all submodular functions, providing the first multiplicative guarantees for greedy algorithms on functions that can take negative values.
en.motivation: Existing greedy guarantees require non-negativity, but practical objectives often include costs causing negativity; prior work handles issues in isolation without unifying theory.
en.method: Defines generalized curvature, uses a pruned greedy algorithm, and extends to combinatorial constraints via multilinear relaxation.
en.result: Achieves curvature-controlled approximation ratios for any submodular function (including negative values); beats best known uniform ratio 0.401 in non-monotone case, recovers classical bound for monotone functions.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how a single curvature parameter unifies handling of non-monotonicity and negativity in submodular optimization, guiding algorithm choices.

idea_spark.idea: Generalizes curvature from monotone non-negative to arbitrary submodular functions, enabling first universal guarantee via pruned greedy.
idea_spark.risk: Curvature computation may be complex, and pruning might fail under extreme negativity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extending classical curvature beyond non-negativity inspires parameterized guarantees in other optimization problems.

papers.title: Adaptive Memory Decay for Log-Linear Attention
papers.summary: Sequence models face a fundamental tradeoff between memory capacity and computational efficiency. Transformers achieve expressive context modeling at quadratic cost, while linear attention and state-space models run in linear time by compressing context into a fixed-size hidden state, inherently limiting recall. Log-linear attention navigates this tradeoff by organizing memory across a Fenwick tree hierarchy, growing its hidden state logarithmically with sequence length at log-linear compute cost. However, its memory decay parameter λ is fixed and independent of the input, assigning uniform weights across all hierarchy levels regardless of the content, which introduces unnecessary rigidity. We propose learning λ directly from the input via a lightweight two-layer MLP, producing per-token, per-level decay that adapts to content rather than position. A softplus activation lets each Fenwick tree level scale independently, avoiding the inter-level competition that softmax introduces. This modification preserves log-linear complexity exactly and adds negligible parameter overhead. We evaluate on associative recall, selective copying, and language modeling, finding that input-dependent decay consistently outperforms the baseline, with the largest gains in long-range memory settings where baseline λ degrades or collapses entirely.

ai.tldr: 提出一种自适应记忆衰减方法，通过轻量MLP从输入学习每个token和每个Fenwick树层级的衰减参数，替代固定衰减，在保持对数线性复杂度下提升长程记忆性能。
ai.motivation: 对数线性注意力使用固定衰减参数λ，对所有层级和输入赋予相同权重，缺乏内容适应性，导致长程记忆场景下性能退化甚至崩溃。
ai.method: 用两层MLP从输入特征预测每个token在每个Fenwick树层级的衰减值，使用softplus激活允许各层级独立缩放，避免softmax带来的层级间竞争。
ai.result: 在关联召回、选择性复制和语言建模任务上，输入依赖衰减持续优于固定衰减基线，尤其在长程记忆设置中提升最大。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在不增加计算复杂度前提下，通过轻量自适应机制提升序列模型的长程记忆能力。

idea_spark.idea: 将固定超参数替换为输入依赖的轻量预测器，是提升模型灵活性的通用思路，可推广到其他注意力或记忆机制中的固定参数。
idea_spark.risk: MLP预测可能引入额外训练不稳定或过拟合风险，尤其在短序列或小数据集上。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类记忆衰减受内容重要性调节启发，模型应学会根据输入内容动态调整记忆保留强度。

idea_spark.idea: 将固定超参数替换为输入依赖的轻量预测器，是提升模型灵活性的通用思路，可推广到其他注意力或记忆机制中的固定参数。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类记忆衰减受内容重要性调节启发，模型应学会根据输入内容动态调整记忆保留强度。

en.tldr: Proposes adaptive memory decay for log-linear attention by learning per-token, per-level decay from input via a lightweight MLP, preserving log-linear complexity and improving long-range memory.
en.motivation: Fixed decay parameter λ in log-linear attention assigns uniform weights across all hierarchy levels regardless of content, causing rigidity and performance collapse in long-range settings.
en.method: A two-layer MLP predicts decay values for each token and each Fenwick tree level from input features, using softplus activation to allow independent scaling without inter-level competition.
en.result: Input-dependent decay consistently outperforms the fixed baseline on associative recall, selective copying, and language modeling, with largest gains in long-range memory tasks.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to enhance long-range memory in sequence models with negligible overhead by making a fixed hyperparameter input-dependent.

idea_spark.idea: Replacing fixed hyperparameters with input-dependent lightweight predictors is a general strategy to increase model flexibility, applicable to other fixed parameters in attention or memory mechanisms.
idea_spark.risk: The MLP predictor may introduce training instability or overfitting, especially on short sequences or small datasets.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by human memory where decay is modulated by content importance, the model learns to dynamically adjust memory retention strength based on input content.

papers.title: ADKO: Agentic Decentralized Knowledge Optimization
papers.summary: We present Agentic Decentralized Knowledge Optimization (ADKO), a framework for collaborative black-box optimization across autonomous agents that achieves sample efficiency, privacy preservation, heterogeneous-objective handling, and communication efficiency. Each agent maintains a private Gaussian Process (GP) surrogate trained on local data and communicates only through knowledge tokens-compact, lossy summaries containing directional signals, advantage scores, and optional language-model (LM) insights-without sharing raw data or model parameters. ADKO unifies GP-Upper Confidence Bound (GP-UCB), parallel Bayesian optimization, decentralized learning, and LM-guided discovery. We provide the first formal analysis of dual information loss: token compression, quantified via mutual-information-based fidelity, and LM approximation error, decomposed into bias and stochastic noise. Our main result shows cumulative regret decomposes into GP error, LM bias, LM noise, and compression loss, with necessary and sufficient conditions for sublinear regret. We also propose fidelity-aware token pruning to preserve high-information tokens under memory budget. Experiments on neural architecture search and scientific discovery validate the theory and show consistent improvements over strong baselines.

ai.tldr: 提出ADKO框架，通过知识令牌实现去中心化黑箱优化，兼顾样本效率、隐私保护和异构目标。
ai.motivation: 现有集中式优化方法存在隐私泄露和通信瓶颈，且难以处理异构目标。
ai.method: 每个智能体维护私有高斯过程代理，仅交换知识令牌（方向信号、优势分数和语言模型洞察），并引入保真度感知令牌剪枝。
ai.result: 首次形式化分析双重信息损失，给出次线性遗憾的充要条件，在神经架构搜索和科学发现任务上优于强基线。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种隐私保护的去中心化优化方案，适用于多智能体协作场景。

idea_spark.idea: 结合语言模型洞察与高斯过程代理，利用令牌压缩实现高效通信。
idea_spark.risk: 语言模型近似误差可能引入偏差，令牌压缩导致信息损失。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受去中心化学习和贝叶斯优化启发，融合语言模型推理能力。

en.tldr: ADKO is a framework for decentralized black-box optimization using knowledge tokens, achieving sample efficiency, privacy, and handling heterogeneous objectives.
en.motivation: Centralized optimization suffers from privacy leaks and communication bottlenecks, and struggles with heterogeneous objectives.
en.method: Each agent maintains a private Gaussian Process surrogate and communicates only via knowledge tokens (directional signals, advantage scores, and LM insights), with fidelity-aware token pruning.
en.result: First formal analysis of dual information loss, necessary and sufficient conditions for sublinear regret, and consistent improvements over baselines on NAS and scientific discovery.
en.help_to_user: Provides a privacy-preserving decentralized optimization method suitable for multi-agent collaboration.

idea_spark.idea: Combine LM insights with GP surrogates, using token compression for efficient communication.
idea_spark.risk: LM approximation error may introduce bias; token compression causes information loss.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by decentralized learning and Bayesian optimization, augmented with LM reasoning.

papers.title: The classical Weyl law for Schrödinger operators on complete Riemannian manifolds
papers.summary: We establish a criterion for the validity of the classical (non-semiclassical) Weyl law for Schrödinger operators $ H=Δ+V $ on complete Riemannian manifolds. In contrast to existing results, our approach does not rely on standard geometric assumptions such as bounded geometry, nor on analytic assumptions such as the doubling condition on the potential. Instead, we identify a geometric-analytic invariant that encodes the precise balance between the geometry of the manifold, the growth of $V$, and the oscillation scale of $V$. This intrinsic quantity, denoted $c_δ(λ)$ admits effective quantitative estimates. We prove that the Weyl asymptotic holds provided $\lim_{λ\to\infty} c_δ(λ)=0 .$ The sharpness of this criterion is demonstrated through explicit examples showing that the Weyl law can fail when the criterion is violated.

ai.tldr: 建立了完整黎曼流形上薛定谔算子经典Weyl律成立的判据，不依赖有界几何或势的加倍条件，而是通过一个几何-解析不变量c_δ(λ)来刻画。
ai.motivation: 现有Weyl律结果通常需要有界几何或势的加倍条件，本文旨在去除这些假设，给出更普适的判据。
ai.method: 引入几何-解析不变量c_δ(λ)，它综合了流形几何、势的增长和振荡尺度，并证明当c_δ(λ)→0时Weyl渐近成立。
ai.result: 得到了Weyl律成立的充要条件，并通过反例说明判据的紧致性。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究非紧流形上薛定谔算子的谱渐近提供了新的理论工具。

idea_spark.idea: 利用c_δ(λ)刻画几何与势的平衡，可能启发设计新的数值谱估计算法。
idea_spark.risk: 不变量c_δ(λ)的计算可能对复杂流形或势函数较为困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将几何与解析条件解耦的思路，可应用于其他需要平衡多种因素的数学物理问题。

en.tldr: Establishes a criterion for the classical Weyl law for Schrödinger operators on complete Riemannian manifolds, without requiring bounded geometry or doubling conditions, using a geometric-analytic invariant c_δ(λ).
en.motivation: Existing Weyl law results rely on bounded geometry or doubling conditions; this work aims to remove those assumptions and provide a more general criterion.
en.method: Introduces a geometric-analytic invariant c_δ(λ) that balances manifold geometry, potential growth, and oscillation scale, and proves that Weyl asymptotics hold when c_δ(λ)→0.
en.result: Obtains a sharp criterion for the Weyl law, with counterexamples demonstrating necessity.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new theoretical tool for studying spectral asymptotics of Schrödinger operators on non-compact manifolds.

idea_spark.idea: Using c_δ(λ) to capture the balance between geometry and potential may inspire new numerical spectral estimation algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: Computing c_δ(λ) may be challenging for complex manifolds or potentials.
idea_spark.inspiration: The decoupling of geometric and analytic conditions can be applied to other problems requiring a balance of multiple factors in mathematical physics.

papers.title: Extrema, Barrier Options, and Semi-Analytic Leverage Corrections in Stochastic-Clock Volatility Models
papers.summary: Barrier derivatives depend on extrema and first-passage events and are therefore highly sensitive to volatility dynamics -- especially to the instantaneous return-volatility correlation $ρ$, often called ``leverage''. This sensitivity makes accurate and fast pricing under realistic stochastic-volatility specifications difficult: two-dimensional PDE solvers are expensive inside calibration loops, while Monte Carlo methods converge slowly when barrier hits are rare and discretely monitored. In equity markets in particular, the pronounced implied-volatility skew motivates factoring in a negative return-volatility correlation. We study a class of continuous-path stochastic-clock volatility models in which the log-price is represented as a Brownian motion run on a random increasing clock. In the baseline independent-clock case (ρ=0), a broad family of barrier-relevant objects-maximum distributions, survival probabilities, and killed joint laws-reduces to one-dimensional quantities determined by the Laplace transform of the terminal clock. This yields transform-only pricing formulas for single- and double-barrier contracts that are fast and numerically stable once the clock transform is available, notably for affine and quadratic clocks. To incorporate leverage without forfeiting tractability, we develop a systematic small-ρexpansion around the ρ=0 backbone. The expansion produces a hierarchy of forced problems whose forcing terms are semi-analytic and computable from baseline barrier objects. We provide two implementable leverage-correction routes\,: forced PDEs and a Duhamel-type Monte Carlo representation, and we show how Pad{é} acceleration can extend practical accuracy to equity-like correlations. Calibration then proceeds by\,: (i) fitting clock parameters from vanillas using only one-dimensional transforms, (ii) precomputing the ρ=0 barrier backbone once, and (iii) iterating on ρ(and any remaining parameters) using the fast semi-analytic corrections-optionally Pad{é}-accelerated-inside a standard least-squares loop.

ai.tldr: 提出一种在随机时钟波动率模型中，通过小ρ展开和Padé加速，半解析地修正杠杆效应（即瞬时回报-波动率相关性）对障碍期权定价的方法。
ai.motivation: 障碍期权对波动率动态高度敏感，尤其是杠杆效应，但现有二维PDE求解器在标定循环中昂贵，蒙特卡洛方法在障碍击中罕见时收敛慢。
ai.method: 在独立时钟基线（ρ=0）下将障碍相关量简化为一维拉普拉斯变换；然后围绕ρ=0进行系统的小ρ展开，得到半解析的强迫问题；通过强迫PDE或Duhamel型蒙特卡洛表示实现杠杆修正，并用Padé加速扩展精度。
ai.result: 实现了快速、数值稳定的障碍期权定价公式，标定分三步：从香草期权拟合时钟参数、预计算ρ=0基线、在最小二乘循环中用半解析修正迭代ρ。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种高效且准确的障碍期权定价与标定框架，特别适用于权益市场中负杠杆效应显著的情形。

idea_spark.idea: 将随机时钟模型与杠杆修正结合，利用一维变换和半解析展开替代全二维数值求解。
idea_spark.risk: 小ρ展开在相关性绝对值较大时可能精度下降，Padé加速虽能扩展但需验证稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从独立时钟基线出发，通过系统展开处理复杂相关性，启发其他金融或物理中类似“零阶可解+微扰修正”的建模思路。

zh.tldr: 提出一种在随机时钟波动率模型中，通过小ρ展开和Padé加速，半解析地修正杠杆效应（即瞬时回报-波动率相关性）对障碍期权定价的方法。
zh.motivation: 障碍期权对波动率动态高度敏感，尤其是杠杆效应，但现有二维PDE求解器在标定循环中昂贵，蒙特卡洛方法在障碍击中罕见时收敛慢。
zh.method: 在独立时钟基线（ρ=0）下将障碍相关量简化为一维拉普拉斯变换；然后围绕ρ=0进行系统的小ρ展开，得到半解析的强迫问题；通过强迫PDE或Duhamel型蒙特卡洛表示实现杠杆修正，并用Padé加速扩展精度。
zh.result: 实现了快速、数值稳定的障碍期权定价公式，标定分三步：从香草期权拟合时钟参数、预计算ρ=0基线、在最小二乘循环中用半解析修正迭代ρ。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了一种高效且准确的障碍期权定价与标定框架，特别适用于权益市场中负杠杆效应显著的情形。

idea_spark.idea: 将随机时钟模型与杠杆修正结合，利用一维变换和半解析展开替代全二维数值求解。
idea_spark.risk: 小ρ展开在相关性绝对值较大时可能精度下降，Padé加速虽能扩展但需验证稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从独立时钟基线出发，通过系统展开处理复杂相关性，启发其他金融或物理中类似“零阶可解+微扰修正”的建模思路。

en.tldr: A semi-analytic leverage correction method for barrier options in stochastic-clock volatility models using small-ρ expansion and Padé acceleration.
en.motivation: Barrier options are highly sensitive to leverage (return-volatility correlation), but 2D PDE solvers are expensive in calibration loops and Monte Carlo converges slowly for rare barrier hits.
en.method: Reduce barrier quantities to 1D Laplace transforms under the independent-clock baseline (ρ=0); then develop a systematic small-ρ expansion yielding semi-analytic forcing problems; implement via forced PDEs or Duhamel Monte Carlo, with Padé acceleration for practical accuracy.
en.result: Fast and numerically stable pricing formulas for single/double barriers; calibration proceeds in three steps: fit clock from vanillas, precompute ρ=0 backbone, iterate on ρ with semi-analytic corrections in a least-squares loop.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient and accurate framework for pricing and calibrating barrier options under stochastic volatility with leverage, especially relevant for equity markets.

idea_spark.idea: Combine stochastic-clock models with leverage correction via 1D transforms and semi-analytic expansions, avoiding full 2D numerical solutions.
idea_spark.risk: The small-ρ expansion may degrade for large absolute correlations; Padé acceleration helps but stability needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from a solvable baseline and systematically adding perturbations inspires similar modeling approaches in finance and physics.

papers.title: Rapid phase ordering of Ising dynamics on $\mathbb Z^2$
papers.summary: We consider the phase ordering problem for the low-temperature Ising dynamics initialized from a biased and disordered initialization. Work of Fontes, Schonmann, Sidoravicius (2002) showed that at zero-temperature, Ising Glauber dynamics on $\mathbb Z^d$ for $d\ge 2$ initialized from i.i.d. spins on each vertex that are $+1$ with sufficiently large probability, absorbs into the all-plus configuration quickly. We prove that analogous behavior holds throughout the low-temperature regime of the Ising model in two dimensions. Namely, there exists $p_0 <1$ such that Ising Glauber dynamics initialized from i.i.d. spins that are $+1$ with probability $p>p_0$, run at any low temperature $β>β_c$ converges rapidly to the plus phase measure $π^+$.   The result is proved using a spacetime multiscale coupling valid in any $d\ge 2$, that boosts a uniform-in-$β$ quasi-polynomial bound on the mixing time of Ising dynamics with plus boundary conditions, into rapid phase ordering from biased initializations with no boundary conditions.

ai.tldr: 证明二维低温伊辛模型从有偏随机初始态快速进入正相。
ai.motivation: 理解低温伊辛动力学从无序初始态到有序相的快速相序过程。
ai.method: 使用时空多尺度耦合，将正边界条件下的混合时间界提升为无边界条件下的快速相序。
ai.result: 存在概率阈值p0<1，当初始正自旋概率p>p0时，低温伊辛动力学快速收敛到正相测度。
ai.help_to_user: 为低温伊辛模型的快速相序提供严格数学证明。

idea_spark.idea: 利用边界条件混合时间界推导无边界初始态快速收敛。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖二维结构，高维推广需额外假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从零温结果推广到低温，启发类似相变问题的研究。

en.tldr: Proves rapid phase ordering for low-temperature Ising dynamics on Z^2 from biased random initial states.
en.motivation: Understand how Ising dynamics quickly orders from disordered initial states at low temperatures.
en.method: Uses a spacetime multiscale coupling to boost mixing time bounds with plus boundary conditions to rapid ordering without boundaries.
en.result: There exists p0<1 such that for initial plus probability p>p0, low-temperature Ising dynamics rapidly converges to the plus phase measure.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous proof of rapid phase ordering for low-temperature Ising models.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage mixing time bounds under boundary conditions to prove rapid convergence from biased initial states.
idea_spark.risk: The proof relies on two-dimensional structure; extension to higher dimensions may require additional assumptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extending zero-temperature results to low temperatures inspires similar studies in phase transitions.

papers.title: Target-Aware Data Augmentation for SAT Prediction
papers.summary: Learning-based approaches to NP-hard problems have shown increasing promise, but their progress is fundamentally constrained by the high cost of generating labeled training data. In domains such as Boolean satisfiability (SAT), standard pipelines rely on solver-in-the-loop labeling, which scales poorly with problem size and limits the amount of usable supervision. This bottleneck hinders the broader goal of leveraging machine learning to capture structure in hard combinatorial problems. In this work, we propose a target-aware, solver-free data generation framework for SAT that produces correctly labeled SAT and UNSAT instances by construction, eliminating the need for expensive solver calls. Our method aligns generated instances with the structural properties of a target benchmark, making synthetic data effective for downstream learning. We further develop a linear-programming-aware graph neural network (LPGNN) architecture that incorporates constraint-violation residuals into message passing, enabling the model to exploit underlying optimization structure. Together, these contributions support a data-centric paradigm for learning on NP-hard problems, where scalable, task-aligned data generation is as critical as model design. Our approach yields orders-of-magnitude speedups in data generation, demonstrating that benchmark-aligned synthetic data can effectively augment solver-labeled datasets for GNN-based SAT prediction.

ai.tldr: 提出一种目标感知、无求解器的数据生成框架，用于布尔可满足性（SAT）预测，避免昂贵的求解器调用，并设计线性规划感知图神经网络（LPGNN）以利用优化结构。
ai.motivation: 基于学习的NP难问题方法受限于标注数据生成的高成本，标准流程依赖求解器标注，扩展性差。
ai.method: 通过构造生成正确标注的SAT/UNSAT实例，对齐目标基准的结构特性；提出LPGNN，在消息传递中融入约束违反残差。
ai.result: 数据生成速度提升数个数量级，基准对齐的合成数据能有效增强求解器标注数据集，用于GNN的SAT预测。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种可扩展的数据增强策略，减少对昂贵求解器的依赖，适用于其他NP难问题的学习任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将约束违反残差融入图神经网络的消息传递，可启发设计更通用的结构感知GNN变体。
idea_spark.risk: 合成数据与真实基准的分布偏移可能影响泛化，需验证跨问题域的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合线性规划松弛与GNN，为组合优化问题提供可微的优化先验，可探索端到端学习与求解器的混合范式。

en.tldr: Proposes a target-aware, solver-free data generation framework for Boolean satisfiability (SAT) prediction, avoiding expensive solver calls, and designs a linear-programming-aware graph neural network (LPGNN) to exploit optimization structure.
en.motivation: Learning-based approaches to NP-hard problems are limited by the high cost of generating labeled data; standard pipelines rely on solver-in-the-loop labeling, which scales poorly.
en.method: Generates correctly labeled SAT/UNSAT instances by construction, aligning with structural properties of a target benchmark; introduces LPGNN that incorporates constraint-violation residuals into message passing.

en.help_to_user: Provides a scalable data augmentation strategy that reduces reliance on expensive solvers, applicable to learning tasks for other NP-hard problems.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporating constraint-violation residuals into GNN message passing may inspire more general structure-aware GNN variants.
idea_spark.risk: Distribution shift between synthetic and real benchmarks may affect generalization; robustness across problem domains needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining linear programming relaxations with GNNs provides differentiable optimization priors for combinatorial problems, enabling hybrid end-to-end learning and solver paradigms.

papers.title: Stationary solutions to the spherically symmetric compressible fluid with capillarity effect
papers.summary: We consider the spherically symmetric Navier--Stokes--Korteweg (NSK) system on the exterior domain $Ω=\{x\in\mathbb{R}^n~|~|x|>1\}$ with $n\ge2$ when the boundary and far-field data are given. We show that, if the boundary data are sufficiently small, then there exists a unique smooth stationary solution to the spherically symmetric NSK system with impermeable wall, inflow, and outflow boundary conditions. We also establish the decay rate of the stationary solutions. Precisely, the stationary solution for the impermeable wall problem exponentially decays to the far-field states, while that of the inflow/outflow problem algebraically decays. Finally, we investigate the asymptotic convergences of the stationary solution for the impermeable wall problem as the capillarity coefficient vanishes. Numerical results validate that our theoretical convergence rate of the stationary solution is optimal.

ai.tldr: 研究了球对称可压缩流体在毛细效应下的稳态解存在性、衰减率及毛细系数消失时的渐近行为。
ai.motivation: 理解毛细效应对可压缩流体稳态解的影响，特别是边界条件（不可渗透壁、流入/流出）下的解结构。
ai.method: 通过数学分析证明小边界数据下球对称Navier-Stokes-Korteweg系统存在唯一光滑稳态解，并推导指数或代数衰减率；数值验证最优性。
ai.result: 不可渗透壁问题解指数衰减至远场状态，流入/流出问题解代数衰减；毛细系数趋于零时解收敛。
ai.help_to_user: 提供毛细效应下可压缩流体稳态解的严格数学框架和衰减规律，可用于相关数值模拟或理论验证。

idea_spark.idea: 将毛细系数作为小参数，研究其对解结构的影响，可能启发多尺度建模或奇异摄动方法。
idea_spark.risk: 数学证明依赖球对称假设，非对称情形可能更复杂；数值验证仅针对特定参数。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将衰减率结果用于设计边界控制策略，或结合机器学习预测解的行为。

en.tldr: Existence, decay rates, and asymptotic behavior of stationary solutions for spherically symmetric compressible fluids with capillarity are established.
en.motivation: To understand the influence of capillarity on stationary solutions of compressible fluids under various boundary conditions (impermeable wall, inflow/outflow).
en.method: Mathematical analysis proving unique smooth stationary solutions for the spherically symmetric Navier-Stokes-Korteweg system with small boundary data, deriving exponential or algebraic decay rates; numerical validation of optimality.
en.result: Exponential decay for impermeable wall problem, algebraic decay for inflow/outflow; convergence as capillarity coefficient vanishes.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous mathematical framework and decay laws for stationary solutions of capillary fluids, useful for numerical simulations or theoretical benchmarks.

idea_spark.idea: Treat capillarity coefficient as a small parameter to study solution structure, potentially inspiring multiscale modeling or singular perturbation methods.
idea_spark.risk: Proof relies on spherical symmetry; non-symmetric cases may be more complex; numerical validation is parameter-specific.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider using decay rate results to design boundary control strategies, or combine with machine learning to predict solution behavior.

papers.title: Quantitative propagation of chaos for Lindblad dynamics
papers.summary: We consider an open quantum system governed $N$-body Lindblad equation and study mean-field limits in this setting. We prove that the $N$-particle dynamics converges, in the sense of quantum relative entropy, to the tensorized solution of the limiting nonlinear equation. More precisely, we establish explicit bounds of order $1/N$ on the relative entropy between the $N$-particle density operator and the corresponding product state, thereby providing a quantitative propagation of chaos.

ai.tldr: 针对N体Lindblad方程，证明了量子相对熵意义下粒子动力学收敛到非线性极限方程的乘积解，并建立了1/N阶的显式熵界。
ai.motivation: 为开放量子多体系统建立严格的平均场极限理论，并量化混沌传播的收敛速率。
ai.method: 利用量子相对熵作为距离度量，分析N体密度算符与乘积态之间的熵差，推导显式1/N阶上界。
ai.result: 获得了量子相对熵的1/N阶显式界，实现了定量化的混沌传播。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了开放量子多体系统平均场近似的严格误差估计，可用于验证数值模拟和简化模型的有效性。

idea_spark.idea: 将经典混沌传播的熵方法移植到量子Lindblad框架，并利用量子熵的次可加性导出显式界。
idea_spark.risk: 熵界可能依赖于系统参数（如耦合强度、温度），实际应用中需验证界的紧致性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受经典统计力学中Kac模型和Boltzmann方程的混沌传播理论启发，将其量子化。

en.tldr: For N-body Lindblad equations, we prove convergence of particle dynamics to the tensorized solution of the limiting nonlinear equation in quantum relative entropy, with explicit 1/N bounds.
en.motivation: To establish rigorous mean-field limits for open quantum many-body systems and quantify the rate of propagation of chaos.
en.method: Use quantum relative entropy as a distance measure, analyze the entropy difference between the N-body density operator and the product state, and derive explicit 1/N upper bounds.
en.result: Obtained explicit 1/N bounds on quantum relative entropy, achieving quantitative propagation of chaos.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous error estimates for mean-field approximations in open quantum many-body systems, useful for validating numerical simulations and simplified models.

idea_spark.idea: Adapt classical entropy methods for propagation of chaos to the quantum Lindblad framework, leveraging subadditivity of quantum entropy to derive explicit bounds.
idea_spark.risk: Entropy bounds may depend on system parameters (e.g., coupling strength, temperature); tightness in practical regimes needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by classical propagation of chaos theory for Kac model and Boltzmann equation, quantized to the Lindblad setting.

papers.title: One Token Per Frame: Reconsidering Visual Bandwidth in World Models for VLA Policy
papers.summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models increasingly rely on auxiliary world modules to plan over long horizons, yet how such modules should be parameterized on top of a pretrained VLA remains an open design question. Existing world-model-augmented VLAs typically pass the per-frame visual stream into the world module at high visual bandwidth and treat its rollout as a side product of action prediction; under a constrained adaptation budget on a frozen backbone, this leaves both the per-frame representation and the latent action coupling under-examined. We introduce OneWM-VLA, which compresses each view into a single semantic token per frame through an Adaptive Attention Pooling, and produces the resulting latent stream and the action trajectory under a single flow-matching objective rather than connecting them through a separate decoder. Empirically, we find that per-frame visual bandwidth can be reduced to a single token without compromising long-horizon performance under our setup. Trained with 14.71M LoRA parameters on a $π_0$ (2B) backbone, OneWM-VLA improves the average success rate from 47.9% to 61.3% on MetaWorld~MT50, reaches 95.6% on LIBERO-Long (vs.85.2% for $π_0$), and reaches 60.0% on the long-horizon deformable task Fold Cloth on a real Piper arm (vs.20.0% for $π_0$).

ai.tldr: 提出OneWM-VLA，将每帧视觉信息压缩为单个语义token，通过流匹配目标统一生成潜在流和动作轨迹，在冻结骨干网络上仅用14.71M LoRA参数显著提升长程任务成功率。
ai.motivation: 现有世界模型增强的VLA通常以高视觉带宽传递每帧视觉流，并将世界模型展开视为动作预测的副产品，在冻结骨干网络的有限适配预算下，每帧表示和潜在动作耦合未得到充分研究。
ai.method: 通过自适应注意力池化将每个视角压缩为每帧单个语义token，采用单一流匹配目标联合生成潜在流和动作轨迹，而非通过独立解码器连接。
ai.result: 在MetaWorld MT50上平均成功率从47.9%提升至61.3%，LIBERO-Long上达95.6%（π0为85.2%），真实Piper机械臂折叠布料任务上达60.0%（π0为20.0%）。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种高效压缩视觉带宽的世界模型设计思路，适用于资源受限的VLA策略长程规划。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将单token表示与扩散策略结合，或用于多视角融合的视觉语言导航。
idea_spark.risk: 极端压缩可能丢失细粒度视觉细节，在需要精确空间定位的任务中可能性能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受视觉token化在语言模型中的成功启发，将其引入世界模型以降低计算开销并保持规划性能。

zh.motivation: 现有世界模型增强的VLA通常以高视觉带宽传递每帧视觉流，并将世界模型展开视为动作预测的副产品，在冻结骨干网络的有限适配预算下，每帧表示和潜在动作耦合未得到充分研究。
zh.method: 通过自适应注意力池化将每个视角压缩为每帧单个语义token，采用单一流匹配目标联合生成潜在流和动作轨迹，而非通过独立解码器连接。
zh.result: 在MetaWorld MT50上平均成功率从47.9%提升至61.3%，LIBERO-Long上达95.6%（π0为85.2%），真实Piper机械臂折叠布料任务上达60.0%（π0为20.0%）。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了一种高效压缩视觉带宽的世界模型设计思路，适用于资源受限的VLA策略长程规划。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将单token表示与扩散策略结合，或用于多视角融合的视觉语言导航。
idea_spark.risk: 极端压缩可能丢失细粒度视觉细节，在需要精确空间定位的任务中可能性能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受视觉token化在语言模型中的成功启发，将其引入世界模型以降低计算开销并保持规划性能。

en.tldr: Proposes OneWM-VLA, which compresses each frame into a single semantic token via adaptive attention pooling and unifies latent stream and action trajectory generation under a single flow-matching objective, achieving significant long-horizon task improvements with only 14.71M LoRA parameters on a frozen backbone.
en.motivation: Existing world-model-augmented VLAs typically pass per-frame visual streams at high bandwidth and treat world model rollouts as side products of action prediction, leaving per-frame representation and latent action coupling under-examined under constrained adaptation budgets on frozen backbones.
en.method: Compresses each view into a single semantic token per frame via Adaptive Attention Pooling, and produces latent stream and action trajectory under a single flow-matching objective instead of connecting them through a separate decoder.
en.result: Improves average success rate from 47.9% to 61.3% on MetaWorld MT50, reaches 95.6% on LIBERO-Long (vs. 85.2% for π0), and 60.0% on real-robot Fold Cloth task (vs. 20.0% for π0).
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient visual bandwidth compression design for world models in resource-constrained VLA long-horizon planning.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining single-token representation with diffusion policies or applying to multi-view fusion for vision-language navigation.
idea_spark.risk: Extreme compression may lose fine-grained visual details, potentially degrading performance in tasks requiring precise spatial localization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the success of visual tokenization in language models, introducing it into world models to reduce computational overhead while maintaining planning performance.

papers.title: Offline Policy Optimization with Posterior Sampling
papers.summary: A fundamental challenge in model-based offline reinforcement learning (RL) lies in the trade-off between generalization and robustness against exploitation errors in out-of-distribution (OOD) regions. While OOD samples may capture valid underlying physical dynamics, they also introduce the risk of model exploitation. Existing methods typically address this risk through excessive pessimistic regularization, which ensures robustness but often sacrifices generalization. To overcome this limitation, we propose Posterior Sampling-based Policy Optimization (PSPO), which formulates dynamics modeling as a Bayesian inference process to derive a posterior that explicitly quantifies model fidelity. Through the integration of posterior sampling and constrained policy optimization, our method leverages dynamics-consistent OOD transitions for generalization while ensuring robustness against model exploitation. Theoretically, we formulate Q-value estimation under posterior sampling as a stochastic approximation problem and establish its convergence. We decompose policy optimization into a sequence of constrained subproblems, demonstrating that solving these subproblems guarantees monotonic improvement until convergence. Experiments on standard benchmarks validate that PSPO achieves superior performance compared to state-of-the-art baselines.

ai.tldr: 提出基于后验采样的策略优化方法，在离线强化学习中平衡泛化与鲁棒性。
ai.motivation: 现有模型离线RL方法过度悲观正则化牺牲泛化，需在OOD区域同时实现泛化和鲁棒性。
ai.method: 将动力学建模视为贝叶斯推断，通过后验采样量化模型置信度，结合约束策略优化。
ai.result: 理论上证明Q值估计收敛和策略单调改进，实验超越SOTA基线。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种在离线数据中安全利用OOD样本提升泛化能力的方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将贝叶斯后验与约束优化结合，动态调整OOD样本使用程度。
idea_spark.risk: 后验估计偏差可能导致次优策略，计算开销较大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用贝叶斯不确定性指导探索-利用权衡，类似思想可用于在线RL或迁移学习。

en.motivation: Existing model-based offline RL methods sacrifice generalization due to excessive pessimistic regularization; need to leverage OOD transitions for generalization while avoiding exploitation.
en.method: Formulates dynamics modeling as Bayesian inference, quantifies model fidelity via posterior sampling, and integrates constrained policy optimization.
en.result: Theoretically proves convergence of Q-value estimation and monotonic policy improvement; outperforms SOTA baselines on benchmarks.
en.help_to_user: Provides a principled way to safely exploit OOD data for better generalization in offline RL.

idea_spark.idea: Combine Bayesian posterior with constrained optimization to dynamically adjust the usage of OOD samples.
idea_spark.risk: Posterior estimation bias may lead to suboptimal policies; computational overhead is high.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using Bayesian uncertainty to guide exploration-exploitation trade-off, similar ideas could apply to online RL or transfer learning.

papers.title: The Cauchy problem for the improved Boussinesq equation with spatially quasi-periodic initial data
papers.summary: We study the Cauchy problem for the improved Boussinesq equation \[   u_{tt}-u_{xx}-u_{xxtt}-(u^2)_{xx}=0 \] on the real line with spatially quasi-periodic initial data. For a non-resonant frequency vector $ω\in\mathbb R^ν$, we prove local existence and uniqueness of classical spatially quasi-periodic solutions with the same frequency vector $ω$ in two Fourier-side classes. First, for exponentially decaying initial Fourier coefficients, we obtain a spatially quasi-periodic solution whose Fourier coefficients remain exponentially decaying on an explicit time interval. Second, for initial Fourier coefficients $c(n)$ and $d(n)$ satisfying the polynomial decay $   |c(n)|+|d(n)|\lesssim (1+|n|)^{-r},   \; r>ν+2, $ we prove that the corresponding spatially quasi-periodic solution preserves the same polynomial decay rate as the initial data. We also extend these results to the nonlinearity $u^p$ with integer $p \geq 3$.

ai.tldr: 研究了实直线上改进Boussinesq方程在空间拟周期初值下的Cauchy问题，证明了在非共振频率向量下，具有指数或多项式衰减Fourier系数的初值存在局部经典解，并保持相同的衰减速率。
ai.motivation: 探索改进Boussinesq方程在空间拟周期初值下的适定性，填补该领域理论空白。
ai.method: 利用Fourier分析，将方程转化为Fourier系数演化系统，通过压缩映射原理在两类衰减条件下证明解的存在唯一性。
ai.result: 对指数衰减初值得到了显式时间区间上的拟周期解；对多项式衰减初值证明了解保持相同衰减率；结果可推广至非线性项u^p（p≥3）。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解拟周期初值下非线性色散方程的局部解行为提供了严格分析框架。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将拟周期初值方法应用于耦合Boussinesq系统或高阶非线性项。
idea_spark.risk: 非共振条件可能限制频率向量的选择，实际应用中需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用衰减率保持性设计数值格式，确保长时间模拟的精度。

en.tldr: We study the Cauchy problem for the improved Boussinesq equation on the real line with spatially quasi-periodic initial data, proving local existence and uniqueness of classical solutions with the same frequency vector under exponential or polynomial decay of Fourier coefficients, and extend results to nonlinearity u^p.
en.motivation: To establish well-posedness for the improved Boussinesq equation with spatially quasi-periodic initial data, filling a theoretical gap.
en.method: Using Fourier analysis to convert the equation into a system for Fourier coefficients, and applying the contraction mapping principle under two decay conditions.
en.result: For exponentially decaying initial coefficients, a quasi-periodic solution exists on an explicit time interval; for polynomially decaying coefficients, the solution preserves the decay rate; results extend to u^p (p≥3).
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous analytical framework for understanding local solution behavior of nonlinear dispersive equations with quasi-periodic initial data.

idea_spark.idea: Try applying the quasi-periodic initial data method to coupled Boussinesq systems or higher-order nonlinearities.
idea_spark.risk: The non-resonance condition may restrict the choice of frequency vectors, requiring verification in applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Use decay preservation to design numerical schemes that maintain accuracy over long times.

papers.title: Flexible Routing via Uncertainty Decomposition
papers.summary: A key strategy for balancing performance and cost in modern machine learning systems is to dynamically route queries to either a low-cost model or a more expensive oracle (such as a large pretrained model or human expert), an approach known as model routing. In this work we present a new uncertainty-aware router that (1) avoids unnecessary oracle calls on inherently ambiguous queries, and (2) adapts dynamically to different loss functions and cost parameters through simple hyperparameter changes, without retraining. Our method, applicable to any classification setting where multiple independent annotations per input are available, is based on decomposing total uncertainty into irreducible and reducible components using higher-order predictors [Ahdritz et al., 2025]. This enables a unified approach to both routing and abstention: predict with the weak model when uncertainty is low, route to the oracle when reducible uncertainty is high, and abstain when irreducible uncertainty is high. Our router comes with strong theoretical guarantees bounding regret relative to optimal task-specific routers. We conduct experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets that demonstrate the benefits of our approach in suitable regimes -- in particular, whenever reducible and irreducible uncertainty are not too correlated.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于不确定性分解的灵活路由方法，通过区分不可约和可约不确定性，动态决定使用低成本模型、调用昂贵预言机或弃权。
ai.motivation: 现有模型路由方法无法区分查询的固有歧义与模型可改进的不确定性，导致不必要的预言机调用或错误预测。
ai.method: 利用高阶预测器将总不确定性分解为不可约和可约两部分，根据不确定性类型选择弱模型、预言机或弃权，并通过超参数适应不同损失和成本。
ai.result: 在合成和真实数据集上验证了方法的有效性，尤其在可约与不可约不确定性相关性较低时表现优越，并提供了理论遗憾界。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户在分类任务中自动平衡模型性能与调用成本，避免对本质模糊样本浪费资源。

idea_spark.idea: 将不可约不确定性作为弃权信号，可约不确定性作为路由信号，实现统一决策。
idea_spark.risk: 当可约与不可约不确定性高度相关时，分解效果可能下降，需额外校准。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受贝叶斯不确定性分解启发，将统计学习中的不确定性概念应用于系统设计。

en.tldr: Proposes a flexible routing method based on uncertainty decomposition, dynamically deciding to use a low-cost model, route to an expensive oracle, or abstain by distinguishing irreducible and reducible uncertainty.
en.motivation: Existing model routing methods cannot differentiate inherent ambiguity from model-reducible uncertainty, leading to unnecessary oracle calls or erroneous predictions.
en.method: Decomposes total uncertainty into irreducible and reducible components using higher-order predictors, then selects weak model, oracle, or abstention based on uncertainty type, adapting to different losses and costs via hyperparameters.
en.result: Demonstrates effectiveness on synthetic and real datasets, especially when reducible and irreducible uncertainty are weakly correlated, with theoretical regret bounds.
en.help_to_user: Helps users automatically balance model performance and invocation cost in classification tasks, avoiding resource waste on inherently ambiguous samples.

idea_spark.idea: Use irreducible uncertainty as an abstention signal and reducible uncertainty as a routing signal for unified decision-making.
idea_spark.risk: Decomposition may degrade when reducible and irreducible uncertainties are highly correlated, requiring additional calibration.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Bayesian uncertainty decomposition, applying statistical learning concepts to system design.

papers.title: Exploring the non-convexity in machine learning using quantum-inspired optimization
papers.summary: The escalating complexity of modern machine learning necessitates solving challenging non-convex optimization problems, particularly in high-dimensional regimes and scenarios contaminated by gross outliers. Traditional approaches, relying on convex relaxations or specialized local search heuristics, frequently succumb to suboptimal local minima and fail to recover the true underlying discrete structures. In this paper, we propose treating these non-convex challenges as a global search problem and introduce a unified framework based on Quantum-Inspired Evolutionary Optimization (QIEO). By leveraging a probabilistic representation inspired by quantum superposition, QIEO maintains a global view of the search space, enabling it to tunnel through local optima that trap conventional gradient-based and greedy solvers. We comprehensively evaluate QIEO across diverse non-convex applications, including sparse signal recovery (gene expression analysis and compressed sensing) and robust linear regression. Extensive benchmarking against state-of-the-art continuous solvers (ADAM, Differential Evolution), classical metaheuristics (Genetic Algorithms), and specialized non-convex algorithms (Iterative Hard Thresholding) demonstrates that QIEO consistently achieves superior structural fidelity, lower mean squared error, and enhanced robustness without support inflation. Our findings suggest that embracing a quantum-inspired global search provides a resilient, unified paradigm for overcoming the inherent intractability of discrete nonconvex machine learning landscapes.

ai.tldr: 提出量子启发进化优化框架，统一解决机器学习中的非凸优化问题，在稀疏信号恢复和鲁棒线性回归中优于传统方法。
ai.motivation: 现代机器学习面临高维和异常值污染下的非凸优化难题，传统方法易陷入局部最优，无法恢复真实离散结构。
ai.method: 基于量子叠加态的量子启发进化优化，通过概率表示保持全局搜索视野，实现穿越局部最优的隧道效应。
ai.result: 在基因表达分析、压缩感知和鲁棒线性回归中，QIEO在结构保真度、均方误差和鲁棒性上均优于ADAM、差分进化、遗传算法和迭代硬阈值等方法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需凸松弛或局部搜索启发式的统一非凸优化方案，适用于高维和异常值场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将量子叠加态的概率表示与进化算法结合，设计自适应隧道机制以逃离局部最优。
idea_spark.risk: 量子启发方法可能在高维空间计算开销较大，且对超参数敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 量子计算中的叠加和纠缠概念为经典优化提供了新的全局搜索视角。

en.tldr: Proposes a quantum-inspired evolutionary optimization framework to unify non-convex optimization in machine learning, outperforming traditional methods in sparse signal recovery and robust linear regression.
en.motivation: Modern machine learning faces challenging non-convex optimization problems in high-dimensional and outlier-contaminated settings, where traditional methods often get stuck in suboptimal local minima and fail to recover true discrete structures.
en.method: Quantum-Inspired Evolutionary Optimization (QIEO) leverages a probabilistic representation inspired by quantum superposition to maintain a global view of the search space, enabling tunneling through local optima.
en.result: In gene expression analysis, compressed sensing, and robust linear regression, QIEO consistently achieves superior structural fidelity, lower mean squared error, and enhanced robustness compared to ADAM, Differential Evolution, Genetic Algorithms, and Iterative Hard Thresholding.
en.help_to_user: Provides a unified non-convex optimization solution without convex relaxations or specialized local search heuristics, suitable for high-dimensional and outlier-ridden scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Combine probabilistic representation of quantum superposition with evolutionary algorithms to design adaptive tunneling mechanisms for escaping local optima.
idea_spark.risk: Quantum-inspired methods may incur high computational cost in high-dimensional spaces and be sensitive to hyperparameters.
idea_spark.inspiration: Superposition and entanglement concepts from quantum computing offer a fresh global search perspective for classical optimization.

papers.title: Adaptive auditing of AI systems with anytime-valid guarantees
papers.summary: A major bottleneck in characterizing the failure modes of generative AI systems is the cost and time of annotation and evaluation. Consequently, adaptive testing paradigms have gained popularity, where one opportunistically decides which cases and how many to annotate based on past results. While this framework is highly practical, its extreme flexibility makes it difficult to draw statistically rigorous conclusions, as it violates classical assumptions: the number of observations is typically limited (often 10 to 50 cases) and decisions regarding sampling and stopping are made in the midst of data collection rather than based a pre-specified rule. To characterize what statistical inferences can be drawn from highly adaptive audits, we introduce a hypothesis testing framework from two 'dueling' perspectives: (i) the model's null that asserts there is no failure mode with performance below a target threshold versus (ii) the auditor's null that asserts they have a sampling strategy that will uncover a failure mode. Leveraging Safe Anytime-Valid Inference (SAVI), we formalize the auditor as conducting 'testing by betting', which translates into simultaneous e-processes for testing the dueling null hypotheses. Furthermore, if the auditor is sufficiently powerful, we prove that these two hypotheses are asymptotically inverses of each other, in that passage of a stringent audit does in fact certify the AI system as being globally robust. Empirically, we demonstrate that our proposed testing procedures maintain anytime-valid type-I error control, outperform pre-specified testing methods, and can reach statistically rigorous conclusions sometimes with as few as 20 observations.

ai.tldr: 提出一种自适应审计框架，利用随时有效推断（SAVI）在少量样本下对生成式AI系统的失败模式进行统计严格的假设检验。
ai.motivation: 生成式AI系统的失败模式标注成本高、时间久，现有自适应测试方法灵活但难以保证统计严谨性，尤其在样本量小（10-50例）且采样和停止规则动态调整时。
ai.method: 引入两个对立的零假设（模型无失败模式 vs. 审计者能发现失败模式），通过“测试即下注”方法构建同时e-过程，并证明在审计者足够强时两假设渐近互逆。
ai.result: 所提测试程序保持随时有效的I类错误控制，优于预设测试方法，有时仅需20个观测即可得出统计严谨结论。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在资源有限的情况下，通过自适应审计对AI系统进行可靠的安全性评估。

idea_spark.idea: 将“测试即下注”思想与e-过程结合，实现自适应采样下的严格推断，可能启发开发更高效的AI红队测试工具。
idea_spark.risk: 审计者策略需足够强大才能保证结论可靠性，若策略设计不当可能导致误判。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从博弈论视角重新审视统计检验，将审计过程建模为对赌游戏，为自适应实验设计提供新思路。

zh.tldr: 提出一种自适应审计框架，利用随时有效推断（SAVI）在少量样本下对生成式AI系统的失败模式进行统计严格的假设检验。
zh.motivation: 生成式AI系统的失败模式标注成本高、时间久，现有自适应测试方法灵活但难以保证统计严谨性，尤其在样本量小（10-50例）且采样和停止规则动态调整时。
zh.method: 引入两个对立的零假设（模型无失败模式 vs. 审计者能发现失败模式），通过“测试即下注”方法构建同时e-过程，并证明在审计者足够强时两假设渐近互逆。
zh.result: 所提测试程序保持随时有效的I类错误控制，优于预设测试方法，有时仅需20个观测即可得出统计严谨结论。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在资源有限的情况下，通过自适应审计对AI系统进行可靠的安全性评估。

idea_spark.idea: 将“测试即下注”思想与e-过程结合，实现自适应采样下的严格推断，可能启发开发更高效的AI红队测试工具。

en.tldr: Proposes an adaptive auditing framework using Safe Anytime-Valid Inference (SAVI) to conduct statistically rigorous hypothesis testing on generative AI failure modes with small samples.
en.motivation: High cost and time of annotating generative AI failures; existing adaptive testing methods are flexible but lack statistical rigor, especially with small sample sizes (10-50) and dynamic sampling/stopping rules.
en.method: Introduces two dueling null hypotheses (model has no failure vs. auditor can find one), constructs simultaneous e-processes via 'testing by betting', and proves asymptotic inversion when the auditor is sufficiently powerful.
en.result: The proposed tests maintain anytime-valid type-I error control, outperform pre-specified methods, and can reach rigorous conclusions with as few as 20 observations.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to conduct reliable AI safety evaluations via adaptive auditing under resource constraints.

idea_spark.idea: Combining 'testing by betting' with e-processes enables rigorous inference under adaptive sampling, potentially inspiring more efficient AI red-teaming tools.
idea_spark.risk: The auditor's strategy must be sufficiently powerful to ensure reliable conclusions; poor strategy design may lead to misjudgment.
idea_spark.inspiration: Reframing statistical testing as a betting game from a game-theoretic perspective offers new insights for adaptive experimental design.

papers.title: A note on the equivalence of super-Poincaré inequality
papers.summary: In this paper we will study the equivalence between super-Poincaré inequality and some log-Sobolev type inequalities, including weak log-Sobolev inequality and super log-Sobolev inequality. The explicit relations between associated rate functions will also be established.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了超庞加莱不等式与弱对数索伯列夫不等式、超对数索伯列夫不等式等对数索伯列夫型不等式之间的等价性，并建立了相关速率函数的显式关系。
ai.motivation: 澄清超庞加莱不等式与多种对数索伯列夫型不等式之间的等价关系，并给出速率函数的显式联系。
ai.method: 通过分析超庞加莱不等式与弱/超对数索伯列夫不等式的定义和性质，推导等价条件及速率函数关系。
ai.result: 证明了超庞加莱不等式与弱对数索伯列夫不等式、超对数索伯列夫不等式之间的等价性，并建立了速率函数的显式关系。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解超庞加莱不等式与对数索伯列夫型不等式之间的深层联系，为相关不等式研究提供理论工具。

idea_spark.idea: 探索超庞加莱不等式与更广泛不等式族（如纳什不等式）的等价性。
idea_spark.risk: 等价性可能依赖于特定空间或参数条件，推广需谨慎验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 速率函数显式关系可用于优化不等式常数或设计数值算法。

en.tldr: This paper studies the equivalence between the super-Poincaré inequality and some log-Sobolev type inequalities, including weak log-Sobolev and super log-Sobolev inequalities, and establishes explicit relations between associated rate functions.
en.motivation: To clarify the equivalence between the super-Poincaré inequality and various log-Sobolev type inequalities, and to provide explicit relations for the rate functions.
en.method: By analyzing the definitions and properties of the super-Poincaré inequality and weak/super log-Sobolev inequalities, we derive equivalence conditions and rate function relations.
en.result: We prove the equivalence between the super-Poincaré inequality and weak log-Sobolev inequality as well as super log-Sobolev inequality, and establish explicit relations for the rate functions.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the deep connections between the super-Poincaré inequality and log-Sobolev type inequalities, providing theoretical tools for related inequality research.

idea_spark.idea: Explore the equivalence between the super-Poincaré inequality and broader families of inequalities (e.g., Nash inequalities).
idea_spark.risk: Equivalence may depend on specific spaces or parameter conditions; generalization requires careful verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explicit rate function relations can be used to optimize inequality constants or design numerical algorithms.

papers.title: TextLDM: Language Modeling with Continuous Latent Diffusion
papers.summary: Diffusion Transformers (DiT) trained with flow matching in a VAE latent space have unified visual generation across images and videos. A natural next step toward a single architecture for both generation (visual synthesis) and understanding (text generation) is to apply this framework to language modeling. We propose TextLDM, which transfers the visual latent diffusion recipe to text generation with minimal architectural modification. A Transformer-based VAE maps discrete tokens to continuous latents, enhanced by Representation Alignment (REPA) with a frozen pretrained language model to produce representations effective for conditional denoising. A standard DiT then performs flow matching in this latent space, identical in architecture to its visual counterpart. The central challenge we address is obtaining high-quality continuous text representations: we find that reconstruction fidelity alone is insufficient, and that aligning latent features with a pretrained language model via REPA is critical for downstream generation quality. Trained from scratch on OpenWebText2, TextLDM substantially outperforms prior diffusion language models and matches GPT-2 under the same settings. Our results establish that the visual DiT recipe transfers effectively to language, taking a concrete step toward unified diffusion architectures for multimodal generation and understanding.

ai.tldr: 提出TextLDM，将视觉扩散Transformer（DiT）配方迁移至文本生成，通过VAE将离散词元映射为连续潜变量，并利用表示对齐（REPA）提升生成质量。
ai.motivation: 探索统一架构同时支持视觉生成与文本生成，将视觉领域成功的潜扩散框架应用于语言建模。
ai.method: 使用Transformer VAE将离散词元编码为连续潜变量，通过REPA对齐预训练语言模型表示，再以标准DiT进行流匹配去噪。
ai.result: 在OpenWebText2上从头训练，显著优于先前扩散语言模型，与GPT-2性能持平。
ai.help_to_user: 展示如何将视觉扩散技术有效迁移至文本生成，为多模态统一架构提供实践参考。

idea_spark.idea: 利用预训练语言模型通过REPA对齐提升连续潜变量的语义质量，是跨模态扩散成功的关键。
idea_spark.risk: 连续潜变量表示质量对生成效果敏感，REPA依赖预训练模型可能引入领域偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 统一视觉与语言的扩散架构可进一步扩展至多模态理解与生成联合任务。

zh.tldr: 提出TextLDM，将视觉扩散Transformer（DiT）配方迁移至文本生成，通过VAE将离散词元映射为连续潜变量，并利用表示对齐（REPA）提升生成质量。

en.tldr: Proposes TextLDM, transferring the visual Diffusion Transformer (DiT) recipe to text generation by mapping discrete tokens to continuous latents via a VAE and using Representation Alignment (REPA) to improve generation quality.
en.motivation: To explore a unified architecture for both visual generation and text generation by applying the successful latent diffusion framework from vision to language modeling.
en.method: Uses a Transformer VAE to encode discrete tokens into continuous latents, aligns representations with a frozen pretrained language model via REPA, and then performs flow matching denoising with a standard DiT.
en.result: Trained from scratch on OpenWebText2, it substantially outperforms prior diffusion language models and matches GPT-2 under the same settings.
en.help_to_user: Demonstrates how to effectively transfer visual diffusion techniques to text generation, providing a practical reference for unified multimodal architectures.

idea_spark.idea: Using a pretrained language model via REPA to align continuous latents is critical for cross-modal diffusion success.
idea_spark.risk: The quality of continuous latent representations is sensitive to generation performance; REPA's reliance on a pretrained model may introduce domain bias.
idea_spark.inspiration: A unified diffusion architecture for vision and language can be further extended to joint multimodal understanding and generation tasks.

papers.title: Solution of the boundary problem for the axial-vector field in the hard-wall AdS/QCD model
papers.summary: We solve an equation of motion for the axial-vector field under boundary conditions of the bulk-to-boundary propagator in the framework of the hard-wall model of AdS/QCD. The equation is reduced to the form of a homogeneous ordinary differential equation with varying coefficients. We solve conjugate equations and find fundamental solutions. This allows us to establish main relations and necessity conditions. The integral equation has both Volterra and Fredholm terms and was solved by the iteration method. We apply a new scheme to solve the equation, since all linearly independent necessary conditions for the existence of a solution were defined and used to establish a sufficient condition for Fredholm solvability of the problem.

ai.tldr: 在硬壁AdS/QCD模型中求解轴向矢量场的边界问题，通过迭代法处理含Volterra和Fredholm项的积分方程，并建立了Fredholm可解性的充分条件。
ai.motivation: 解决硬壁AdS/QCD模型中轴向矢量场传播子的边界问题，为强相互作用理论提供数学基础。
ai.method: 将运动方程化为变系数齐次常微分方程，求解共轭方程得到基本解，利用迭代法处理含Volterra和Fredholm项的积分方程。
ai.result: 建立了必要关系与条件，并给出了Fredholm可解性的充分条件。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解AdS/QCD模型中轴向矢量场的边界行为及积分方程求解方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将迭代法与Fredholm理论结合，为复杂边界问题提供系统求解框架。
idea_spark.risk: 迭代法的收敛性可能依赖于参数选择，需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将积分方程方法应用于其他强耦合场论中的边界问题。

zh.tldr: 在硬壁AdS/QCD模型中求解轴向矢量场的边界问题，通过迭代法处理含Volterra和Fredholm项的积分方程，并建立了Fredholm可解性的充分条件。
zh.motivation: 解决硬壁AdS/QCD模型中轴向矢量场传播子的边界问题，为强相互作用理论提供数学基础。
zh.method: 将运动方程化为变系数齐次常微分方程，求解共轭方程得到基本解，利用迭代法处理含Volterra和Fredholm项的积分方程。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解AdS/QCD模型中轴向矢量场的边界行为及积分方程求解方法。
