en.tldr: We study modified ruin probabilities in a Cramér-Lundberg model driven by a compound mixed Poisson process, obtaining asymptotic equivalence in the heavy-tailed regime and precise asymptotics in the light-tailed regime.
en.motivation: Classical ruin probability assumes a simple Poisson claim process, but in practice claim intensity may be random, motivating the study of modified ruin probabilities under a mixed Poisson model.
en.method: Using subexponential distribution theory for heavy tails and a fixed-intensity ratio theorem for light tails, combined with endpoint-atom and endpoint-density asymptotic analysis.
en.result: In the heavy-tailed case, modified and classical ruin probabilities are asymptotically equivalent when the mixing distribution's upper endpoint is below the net-profit boundary; in the light-tailed case, we obtain a fixed-intensity ratio theorem, an endpoint-atom result, and a sharp endpoint-density asymptotic with an explicit constant.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical foundations for insurance risk modeling with random claim intensity, clarifying the relationship between modified and classical ruin probabilities.

idea_spark.idea: Replace the mixed Poisson process with a more general point process (e.g., Cox process) and study analogous properties of modified ruin probabilities.
idea_spark.risk: The mixing distribution assumption may be too idealistic; real data may not conform to a known mixing form, requiring careful application.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider incorporating correlation between claim intensity and claim size to analyze its impact on ruin probabilities.

papers.title: Self-Consolidating Language Models: Continual Knowledge Incorporation from Context
papers.summary: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly receive information as streams of passages, conversations, and long-context workflows. While longer context windows expose more evidence, they do not ensure that useful information is preserved and reused. We study continual context consolidation: writing current context into model weights while limiting interference with previously consolidated information. We propose \textbf{S}elf-\textbf{Co}nsolidating \textbf{L}anguage Models (SCoL), a post-training framework in which, given current context, an LLM learns to generate textual update instructions specifying which of its own Transformer layers should be updated. Because committed updates change the model that later generates future selections, we train SCoL with meta-reinforcement learning over an evolving model state. We instantiate SCoL with supervised QA rewards on SQuAD knowledge incorporation and intrinsic likelihood-based rewards for LongBench v2 long-context consolidation. Across both settings, SCoL improves acquisition and retention over prompting, summarization, batch test-time training, and sequential finetuning baselines. Analysis of learned selection patterns shows that SCoL encourages the LLM to generate sparse update locations that align with layers of high Fisher information, suggesting that the model learns to route plasticity toward loss-sensitive regions while limiting interference. Moreover, SCoL transfers from shorter meta-training streams to longer LongBench v2 streams at evaluation, suggesting that our framework supports scalable streaming consolidation.

ai.tldr: 提出自巩固语言模型（SCoL），通过元强化学习让模型在上下文中持续整合知识，同时减少干扰。
ai.motivation: 长上下文窗口虽能提供更多信息，但无法保证有用信息被保留和复用，需要一种机制将当前上下文写入模型权重并限制干扰。
ai.method: SCoL 作为后训练框架，让 LLM 生成文本更新指令，指定哪些 Transformer 层应被更新，并通过元强化学习在演化模型状态下训练。
ai.result: 在 SQuAD 知识整合和 LongBench v2 长上下文巩固中，SCoL 在获取和保留上优于提示、摘要、批量测试时训练和顺序微调基线，且选择模式与高 Fisher 信息层对齐。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何让语言模型在持续输入中有效学习和保留新知识，适用于长文档、对话等场景。

idea_spark.idea: 利用元强化学习让模型自主决定更新哪些层，类似神经架构搜索但更轻量。
idea_spark.risk: 元训练的计算成本高，且稀疏更新可能遗漏关键信息。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类记忆巩固机制启发，模型通过选择性更新权重来模拟长期记忆形成。

en.tldr: Proposes Self-Consolidating Language Models (SCoL) that use meta-reinforcement learning to continually incorporate knowledge from context into model weights while limiting interference.
en.motivation: Longer context windows expose more evidence but do not ensure useful information is preserved and reused; a mechanism is needed to write current context into weights and limit interference.
en.method: SCoL is a post-training framework where an LLM generates textual update instructions specifying which Transformer layers to update, trained via meta-reinforcement learning over an evolving model state.
en.result: On SQuAD knowledge incorporation and LongBench v2 long-context consolidation, SCoL outperforms prompting, summarization, batch test-time training, and sequential finetuning baselines, with selection patterns aligning with high Fisher information layers.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how language models can effectively learn and retain new knowledge from continuous input streams, applicable to long documents and conversations.

idea_spark.idea: Using meta-reinforcement learning to let the model autonomously decide which layers to update, similar to neural architecture search but lighter.
idea_spark.risk: Meta-training is computationally expensive, and sparse updates may miss critical information.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by human memory consolidation, the model mimics long-term memory formation through selective weight updates.

papers.title: Prescriptive Optimization for Adaptive Auto-insurance Pricing with Telematics Data
papers.summary: Usage-based insurance (UBI) uses telematics to align premiums with risk and encourage safe driving. However, deploying these programs is challenging due to heavy-tailed claim costs, nonstationary driver behavior, and limited incentive budgets. While existing research focuses on profiling drivers, prescriptive pricing remains underexplored. We propose an optimal control framework that integrates telematics directly into dynamic pricing. Our approach (i) learns claim frequency and severity, (ii) models multi-period behavioral evolution in response to discounts, and (iii) optimizes portfolio-wide discount allocation using a Lagrangian relaxation. This decomposes the non-convex centralized problem into independent dynamical systems. We theoretically prove this relaxation's duality gap vanishes as the portfolio scales, guaranteeing asymptotic optimality. We validate our approach computationally on a simulated industry-scale portfolio. Our results demonstrate not only the computational tractability of our approach but also that it outperforms static baselines, reducing both expected losses and claim probabilities to benefit insurers and policyholders alike.

ai.tldr: 提出一个最优控制框架，将远程信息处理数据直接整合到动态定价中，以解决基于使用量的保险中的重尾索赔、非平稳行为和预算限制问题。
ai.motivation: 现有研究主要关注驾驶员画像，而处方定价尚未充分探索，且部署面临重尾索赔、行为非平稳和激励预算有限等挑战。
ai.method: 构建最优控制框架，学习索赔频率与严重性，建模多期行为对折扣的响应，并通过拉格朗日松弛法优化整个投资组合的折扣分配，将非凸集中问题分解为独立动态系统。
ai.result: 理论证明松弛的对偶间隙随投资组合规模增大而消失，保证渐近最优性；计算实验表明该方法优于静态基线，降低了预期损失和索赔概率。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助保险从业者设计更有效的动态定价策略，平衡风险与激励，同时提升保险公司和投保人的利益。

idea_spark.idea: 结合强化学习与拉格朗日松弛，实现大规模动态定价的近似最优解。
idea_spark.risk: 模型依赖对驾驶员行为演化的准确建模，若行为预测偏差较大，可能导致定价失真。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将非凸优化分解为独立子系统的思路，可启发其他复杂资源分配问题的求解方法。

en.tldr: Proposes an optimal control framework that integrates telematics data directly into dynamic pricing to address heavy-tailed claims, nonstationary behavior, and budget constraints in usage-based insurance.
en.motivation: Existing research focuses on driver profiling, while prescriptive pricing remains underexplored, and deployment faces challenges from heavy-tailed claims, nonstationary behavior, and limited incentive budgets.

en.result: Theoretically proves the duality gap of the relaxation vanishes as portfolio scales, guaranteeing asymptotic optimality; computational experiments show the approach outperforms static baselines, reducing expected losses and claim probabilities.
en.help_to_user: Helps insurance practitioners design more effective dynamic pricing strategies that balance risk and incentives, benefiting both insurers and policyholders.

idea_spark.idea: Combine reinforcement learning with Lagrangian relaxation to achieve near-optimal solutions for large-scale dynamic pricing.
idea_spark.risk: The model relies on accurate modeling of driver behavior evolution; significant prediction errors may lead to pricing distortions.
idea_spark.inspiration: The idea of decomposing non-convex optimization into independent subsystems can inspire solution methods for other complex resource allocation problems.

papers.title: Modularity of Feynman Integrals and Factorization of Appell F2 Systems
papers.summary: Certain Feynman integrals can be expressed as periods of differential forms on Calabi--Yau manifolds. We provide a mathematical proof of a result of Duhr and Maggio on the modularity of the two-dimensional conformal traintrack integral. Our approach is based on a factorization of the associated Picard-Fuchs system into a tensor product of Gauss hypergeometric systems via a gauge transformation due to Clingher, Doran and Malmendier.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了二维共形梯轨积分的模性，通过将Picard-Fuchs系统分解为高斯超几何系统的张量积。
ai.motivation: 为Duhr和Maggio关于Feynman积分模性的结果提供严格的数学证明。
ai.method: 利用Clingher、Doran和Malmendier的规范变换，将相关的Picard-Fuchs系统分解为高斯超几何系统的张量积。
ai.result: 成功证明了二维共形梯轨积分的模性，并揭示了Appell F2系统的分解结构。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解Feynman积分与Calabi-Yau流形及模形式之间的深层联系。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将规范变换应用于更一般的Feynman积分族，以揭示其模性。
idea_spark.risk: 分解的适用性可能依赖于特定的几何结构，通用性有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从代数几何和特殊函数理论中借鉴工具，为高能物理中的积分计算提供新途径。

en.tldr: This paper provides a mathematical proof of the modularity of the two-dimensional conformal traintrack integral by factorizing the associated Picard-Fuchs system into a tensor product of Gauss hypergeometric systems.
en.motivation: To give a rigorous mathematical proof of a result by Duhr and Maggio on the modularity of Feynman integrals.
en.method: Using a gauge transformation due to Clingher, Doran, and Malmendier to factorize the Picard-Fuchs system into a tensor product of Gauss hypergeometric systems.
en.result: Successfully proved the modularity of the two-dimensional conformal traintrack integral and revealed the factorization structure of Appell F2 systems.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the deep connections between Feynman integrals, Calabi-Yau manifolds, and modular forms.

idea_spark.idea: Explore applying gauge transformations to broader families of Feynman integrals to uncover their modularity.
idea_spark.risk: The applicability of the factorization may depend on specific geometric structures, limiting generality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrowing tools from algebraic geometry and special function theory provides new avenues for integral calculations in high-energy physics.

papers.title: Minimal speed of unbounded traveling wave solutions for a 1D reaction-diffusion equation and their relationship with the dynamics at infinity
papers.summary: This paper presents results on the unboundedness and minimal speed of traveling wave solutions for a one-dimensional spatial reaction-diffusion equation with an asymptotically linear reaction term and a saturation parameter. By applying a Poincaré-type compactification, we reveal the full dynamics (including infinity) of the two-dimensional system of ordinary differential equations satisfied by traveling wave solutions. This yields essential information characterizing traveling wave solutions: the classification of trajectories in the phase plane, the positivity and unboundedness of front-type and sign-changing profiles, and the explicit form of the minimal speed. This paper examines a special equation with an asymptotically linear reaction term. While, our results differ from those of conventional linear determinacy. We claim that the minimal speed is derived from information at infinity within the traveling wave system.

ai.tldr: 本文研究一维反应扩散方程中无界行波解的最小波速，通过庞加莱紧化揭示无穷远处的动力学，并给出波速的显式形式。
ai.motivation: 传统线性决定论无法解释具有渐近线性反应项的行波最小波速，需要从无穷远动力学中寻找答案。
ai.method: 对行波解满足的二维常微分方程组进行庞加莱型紧化，分析相平面轨迹分类及无穷远行为。
ai.result: 得到了前向型和变号型行波解的正性、无界性以及最小波速的显式表达式，且该波速由无穷远信息决定。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解反应扩散方程中行波解的最小波速与无穷远动力学之间的内在联系。

idea_spark.idea: 将无穷远动力学分析用于确定其他类型非线性波（如脉冲波、周期波）的传播速度。
idea_spark.risk: 紧化后的相空间结构可能复杂，解析求解最小波速需额外假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从无穷远信息而非局部线性化确定波速，启发对非标准反应项行波问题的研究。

en.tldr: This paper investigates the unboundedness and minimal speed of traveling wave solutions for a 1D reaction-diffusion equation with an asymptotically linear reaction term, using Poincaré compactification to reveal dynamics at infinity and derive the explicit minimal speed.
en.motivation: Conventional linear determinacy fails to explain the minimal speed for such equations; the speed must be derived from information at infinity.
en.method: Apply Poincaré-type compactification to the 2D ODE system satisfied by traveling waves, analyze phase-plane trajectories and behavior at infinity.
en.result: Obtain positivity and unboundedness of front-type and sign-changing profiles, and an explicit formula for the minimal speed determined by infinity dynamics.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into how minimal wave speed relates to dynamics at infinity for reaction-diffusion equations with asymptotically linear nonlinearity.

idea_spark.idea: Use infinity dynamics to determine propagation speeds for other nonlinear waves such as pulse or periodic waves.
idea_spark.risk: Phase-space structure after compactification may be complex, requiring additional assumptions for analytic speed formulas.
idea_spark.inspiration: Determining speed from infinity rather than local linearization inspires studies of traveling waves with nonstandard reaction terms.

papers.title: Hermite expansions of functions from the weighted Hardy class
papers.summary: In this paper, we analyze a function space consisting of functions for which both the function and its Fourier transform exhibit Gaussian decay together with exponential growth governed by suitable weight functions.   First, we examine logarithmic-type weights, in which case these function spaces are equivalent to Pilipović spaces. In this setting, we establish a decay estimate for the Hermite coefficients of functions. Furthermore, by combining these estimates with the asymptotic behavior of Hermite functions, we prove a decay rate for solutions to the harmonic oscillator Schrödinger equation.   Second, we consider a class of weights and prove the exponential decay of the Hermite projection operators on these spaces by analyzing Laguerre expansions and the short-time Fourier transform.   Additionally, we revisit the subcritical Hardy uncertainty principle and obtain a partial improvement toward a conjecture posed by Vemuri.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了加权Hardy类中函数的Hermite展开，建立了Hermite系数的衰减估计，并应用于谐振子薛定谔方程的解的衰减率，同时改进了次临界Hardy不确定性原理。
ai.motivation: 探索具有高斯衰减和指数增长特性的函数空间，并建立其Hermite展开的精确衰减性质。
ai.method: 利用对数型权重与Pilipović空间的等价性，结合Hermite函数的渐近行为；通过Laguerre展开和短时傅里叶变换分析Hermite投影算子的指数衰减。
ai.result: 得到了Hermite系数的衰减估计，证明了谐振子薛定谔方程解的衰减率，以及Hermite投影算子的指数衰减，并部分改进了Vemuri猜想。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了加权Hardy类函数空间及其Hermite展开的严格分析工具，适用于调和分析和量子力学中的衰减问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将Hermite投影算子的指数衰减结果应用于非自伴算子的谱分析或信号处理中的时频局部化。
idea_spark.risk: 权重函数的选择可能限制结果的普适性，需要验证更一般权重下的衰减性质。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合短时傅里叶变换与正交展开，可能为不确定性原理的量化提供新途径。

en.tldr: This paper studies Hermite expansions of functions in a weighted Hardy class, establishes decay estimates for Hermite coefficients, applies them to the harmonic oscillator Schrödinger equation, and partially improves the subcritical Hardy uncertainty principle.
en.motivation: To explore function spaces with Gaussian decay and exponential growth, and to establish precise decay properties of their Hermite expansions.
en.method: Using equivalence with Pilipović spaces via logarithmic weights and asymptotic behavior of Hermite functions; analyzing exponential decay of Hermite projection operators via Laguerre expansions and short-time Fourier transform.
en.result: Decay estimates for Hermite coefficients, decay rates for solutions to the harmonic oscillator Schrödinger equation, exponential decay of Hermite projection operators, and a partial improvement toward Vemuri's conjecture.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous analytical tools for weighted Hardy class function spaces and their Hermite expansions, applicable to decay problems in harmonic analysis and quantum mechanics.

idea_spark.idea: Apply exponential decay results of Hermite projection operators to spectral analysis of non-self-adjoint operators or time-frequency localization in signal processing.
idea_spark.risk: The choice of weight functions may limit generality; decay properties under more general weights need verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining short-time Fourier transform with orthogonal expansions may offer new ways to quantify uncertainty principles.

papers.title: Dynamical Systems in Elliptical Pursuit and Evasion
papers.summary: This paper investigates the difference between the circular and elliptical cases in one-on-one pursuit and evasion problems. Using the simultaneous differential equation derived by Barton and Eliezer, we derive a dynamical system based on the assumption that the shape of the pursuer's trajectory is unaffected by the evader's speed. The dynamical system involves the angular difference between the velocity vectors of the players and their separation distance. When the evader orbits a circle, the dynamical system is autonomous with an asymptotically stable equilibrium point. By contrast, if the evader orbits an ellipse, the dynamical system becomes non-autonomous and lacks an equilibrium point. To handle the singularity at capture, we reformulate the system using a complex variable that includes information about the logarithmic distance and the angular difference. We establish two main results: when the pursuer is faster than the evader, the pursuer captures the evader in finite time, and we derive an explicit upper bound for the capture time; when the pursuer is slower, the system possesses a unique periodic solution to which all trajectories converge globally and asymptotically.

ai.tldr: 本文研究一对一追逃问题中圆形与椭圆形轨道的差异，建立了基于速度角差和距离的动力学系统，分析了捕获时间与周期解。
ai.motivation: 现有追逃理论多假设逃逸者沿圆形轨道运动，但实际场景中椭圆轨道更常见，需探究其动力学差异。
ai.method: 基于Barton-Eliezer微分方程，假设追击者轨迹形状不受逃逸者速度影响，推导出关于速度角差和距离的动力学系统，并用复变量处理捕获奇点。
ai.result: 追击者更快时有限时间捕获并给出上界；更慢时系统存在唯一全局渐近稳定的周期解。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解椭圆轨道下追逃问题的动力学行为，提供捕获时间估计和周期解存在性条件。

idea_spark.idea: 将椭圆追逃模型扩展至三维空间或考虑逃逸者变速运动。
idea_spark.risk: 非自治系统分析复杂度高，周期解唯一性证明可能依赖特定假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用复变量简化奇点处理，启发其他非线性动力学问题的解析方法。

idea_spark.inspiration: 利用复变量简化奇点处理，启发其他非线性动力学问题的解析方法。

en.tldr: This paper investigates the difference between circular and elliptical orbits in one-on-one pursuit-evasion, deriving a dynamical system based on angular difference and distance, and analyzing capture time and periodic solutions.
en.motivation: Existing pursuit-evasion theory often assumes circular evader orbits, but elliptical orbits are more realistic and require dynamical analysis.
en.method: Using the Barton-Eliezer differential equation and assuming the pursuer's trajectory shape is unaffected by evader speed, a dynamical system is derived involving angular difference and separation distance. A complex variable reformulation handles the capture singularity.
en.result: When the pursuer is faster, capture occurs in finite time with an explicit upper bound; when slower, the system has a unique globally asymptotically stable periodic solution.
en.help_to_user: Provides insights into pursuit-evasion dynamics on elliptical orbits, including capture time bounds and periodic solution conditions.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the elliptical pursuit-evasion model to 3D or consider variable evader speed.
idea_spark.risk: Non-autonomous system analysis is complex; uniqueness of periodic solution may rely on specific assumptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using complex variables to simplify singularity handling inspires analytical methods for other nonlinear dynamics problems.

papers.title: Mage: Multi-Axis Evaluation of LLM-Generated Executable Game Scenes Beyond Compile-Pass Rate
papers.summary: Compile-pass rate is the dominant evaluation signal for LLM code generation, yet for multi-component domain-specific artifacts it can be actively misleading. We demonstrate this on executable game scene synthesis with a four-axis evaluation protocol (named `Mage') -- compile success, runtime success, structural fidelity, and mechanism adherence -- applied to 858 generation attempts across four open-weight LLMs (7B--30B), 26~hand-crafted Unity goal pattern playable concepts, and two automatically extracted IR granularity levels. Direct NL-to-C\# generation achieves the highest runtime-pass rate (43\% mean) yet produces structurally vacuous scenes (mechanism $F_1 \approx 0.12$). Structural IR conditioning halves the runtime rate but recovers domain-faithful structure ($F_1$ up to 1.00). Within IR conditioning, behavior-only and full-scene granularity are statistically indistinguishable (McNemar $p = 1.0$), indicating input-level granularity saturation. These results show that compile rate is anti-correlated with functional correctness in this domain and that multi-axis evaluation is necessary to detect the divergence. We release the benchmark, replay logs, and per-record metrics for independent verification.

en.tldr: Proposes Mage multi-axis evaluation protocol, revealing compile-pass rate is anti-correlated with functional correctness in executable game scene generation, and structural IR conditioning recovers domain-faithful structure.
en.motivation: Compile-pass rate is the dominant evaluation signal for LLM code generation, but can be misleading for multi-component domain-specific artifacts.

idea_spark.idea: Combine structural IR conditioning with runtime optimization to balance structural fidelity and execution efficiency of generated code.
idea_spark.risk: Structural IR conditioning may reduce runtime-pass rate, requiring trade-offs.

papers.title: Convergence of Stochastic Gradient Descent with mini-batching and infinite variance
papers.summary: Stochastic gradient descent (SGD) with mini-batching is a standard tool in large-scale optimization, yet its theoretical properties under heavy-tailed gradient noise remain largely unexplored. In this paper we study SGD with increasing batch sizes when the gradient noise belongs to the domain of attraction of an $α$-stable law with $α\in(1,2)$. Building on existing results for the finite-variance regime and for heavy-tailed SGD without batching, we establish three main results. First, we derive $L^p$ moment bounds for the SGD error and show that increasing batch sizes lead to faster convergence rates. In particular, batching enables convergence in probability even for a constant stepsize. Second, we prove that the properly normalized SGD iterates converge in distribution to the stationary law of an Ornstein-Uhlenbeck process driven by an $α$-stable Lévy process. Third, for Polyak-Ruppert averaging we obtain a stable limit theorem with a normalization that explicitly depends on the batch-size schedule.

ai.tldr: 研究了在梯度噪声服从α-稳定分布（α∈(1,2)）时，使用小批量随机梯度下降（SGD）的收敛性，发现增大批量大小可加速收敛，并得到了极限分布和平均化后的稳定极限定理。
ai.motivation: 实际大规模优化中梯度噪声常呈现重尾分布，但现有理论多假设有限方差，缺乏对重尾噪声下小批量SGD收敛行为的理解。
ai.method: 假设梯度噪声属于α-稳定吸引域，推导SGD误差的L^p矩界，证明适当归一化的迭代依分布收敛到α-稳定Lévy过程驱动的Ornstein-Uhlenbeck过程，并分析Polyak-Ruppert平均的极限定理。
ai.result: 增大批量大小可加快收敛速度，即使使用常数步长也能实现依概率收敛；归一化迭代的极限分布为α-稳定Lévy驱动的Ornstein-Uhlenbeck过程；平均化后的归一化依赖于批量调度。
ai.help_to_user: 为使用小批量SGD处理重尾噪声的实践者提供了理论收敛保证和批量大小选择的指导。

idea_spark.idea: 将批量大小作为控制重尾噪声的工具，结合自适应步长策略，可能进一步提升算法鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 理论假设α∈(1,2)可能不覆盖所有实际重尾情况；常数步长下的依概率收敛可能在实际中需要极大数据量。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受α-稳定过程与Ornstein-Uhlenbeck过程联系的启发，可探索更一般的Lévy过程驱动的随机优化动态。

en.tldr: Studies the convergence of mini-batch SGD under heavy-tailed gradient noise following an α-stable law (α∈(1,2)), showing that increasing batch sizes accelerates convergence and yields limit distributions and a stable limit theorem for Polyak-Ruppert averaging.
en.motivation: Heavy-tailed gradient noise is common in large-scale optimization, but existing theory mostly assumes finite variance, leaving the behavior of mini-batch SGD under heavy tails unexplored.
en.method: Assumes gradient noise belongs to the domain of attraction of an α-stable law, derives L^p moment bounds for SGD error, proves convergence in distribution of normalized iterates to an Ornstein-Uhlenbeck process driven by an α-stable Lévy process, and analyzes the limit theorem for Polyak-Ruppert averaging.
en.result: Increasing batch sizes yields faster convergence rates; convergence in probability is achieved even with constant stepsize; normalized iterates converge to an α-stable Lévy-driven Ornstein-Uhlenbeck process; averaging normalization depends on the batch schedule.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical convergence guarantees and guidance on batch size selection for practitioners using mini-batch SGD with heavy-tailed noise.

idea_spark.idea: Using batch size as a tool to control heavy-tailed noise, combined with adaptive stepsize strategies, may further improve algorithm robustness.
idea_spark.risk: The assumption α∈(1,2) may not cover all practical heavy-tailed cases; convergence in probability with constant stepsize may require extremely large data in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the connection between α-stable processes and Ornstein-Uhlenbeck processes, one could explore more general Lévy-driven stochastic optimization dynamics.

papers.title: The idealizer of the set of quasi-stable polynomials
papers.summary: It follows from the Garloff-Wagner Theorem that the set of stable polynomials of degree $n$, denoted by $\mathcal{H}_n$, i.e., those whose zeros all lie in the open left complex half-plane, with the Hadamard product $*$, forms an abelian semigroup contained in the abelian group $\mathbb{R}_n^+$ of polynomials of degree $n$ with positive real coefficients. By the idealizer of the set $\mathcal{H}_n$, we refer to the largest subsemigroup of $\mathbb{R}_n^+$ in which $\mathcal{H}_n$ is an ideal. In this paper, we formulate a conjecture characterizing the idealizer of $\mathcal{H}_n$ and prove it for $n \leqslant 5$. In addition, we show that the proposed condition is necessary for any polynomial to belong to the idealizer and establish, in a distinguished special case, a sufficient condition of a similar nature that supports the conjecture.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了n次准稳定多项式集合在Hadamard积下的理想化子，提出了一个刻画该理想化子的猜想，并证明了n≤5时猜想成立。
ai.motivation: 稳定多项式集合在Hadamard积下构成一个交换半群，其理想化子是包含该半群的最大子半群，刻画这一结构对理解多项式稳定性与代数结构的关系至关重要。
ai.method: 基于Garloff-Wagner定理，利用正实系数多项式的性质，提出理想化子的充要条件猜想，并通过组合与代数论证对n≤5的情形进行验证。
ai.result: 证明了所提条件是多项式属于理想化子的必要条件，并在一个特殊情形下建立了支持猜想的充分条件。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解稳定多项式在Hadamard积下的代数结构，特别是理想化子的刻画方法。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将猜想推广到任意n，或探索理想化子与多项式零点分布之间的更精细联系。
idea_spark.risk: 高维情形下组合复杂性剧增，可能难以找到统一的充要条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Garloff-Wagner定理启发，可进一步研究其他正性条件（如完全正性）下的类似代数结构。

en.tldr: This paper studies the idealizer of the set of quasi-stable polynomials of degree n under the Hadamard product, formulates a conjecture characterizing it, and proves the conjecture for n ≤ 5.
en.motivation: The set of stable polynomials forms an abelian semigroup under the Hadamard product; characterizing its idealizer—the largest subsemigroup containing it as an ideal—is crucial for understanding the algebraic structure of polynomial stability.
en.method: Building on the Garloff-Wagner theorem and properties of polynomials with positive real coefficients, a necessary and sufficient condition for the idealizer is conjectured and verified for n ≤ 5 via combinatorial and algebraic arguments.
en.result: The proposed condition is shown to be necessary for any polynomial to belong to the idealizer, and a sufficient condition supporting the conjecture is established in a distinguished special case.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the algebraic structure of stable polynomials under the Hadamard product, particularly the characterization of the idealizer.

idea_spark.idea: Attempt to generalize the conjecture to arbitrary n, or explore finer connections between the idealizer and the zero distribution of polynomials.
idea_spark.risk: Combinatorial complexity increases sharply in higher dimensions, making a unified necessary and sufficient condition potentially elusive.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the Garloff-Wagner theorem, one may investigate analogous algebraic structures under other positivity conditions, such as total positivity.

papers.title: Multiscale Structure of Eigenstate Thermalization
papers.summary: The eigenstate thermalization hypothesis provides a framework for understanding thermalization in isolated quantum many-body systems by characterizing statistical properties of local observables in energy eigenstates. Here we demonstrate that distributions of matrix elements in macroscopic systems may depend not only on the macrostate parameters, such as the densities of local conserved charges, but generally also on the properties of ensembles used in sampling eigenstates. To this end, we depart from the conventional analysis of microcanonical windows and consider statistical ensembles with an adjustable scale parameter prescribing the magnitude of charge fluctuations. We specifically consider an integrable field theory that permits efficient numerical sampling of matrix elements and reliable extrapolation to the thermodynamic limit. Moreover, in this system, we identify a class of states that enables explicit closed-form computation of the suppression rate of matrix elements. Our findings reveal an underlying multiscale structure of matrix elements captured by a non-analytic fluctuation-scale dependence of algebraic exponents governing their statistical properties.

ai.tldr: 本征态热化假设描述了孤立量子多体系统中局域可观测量在能量本征态中的统计性质。本文发现矩阵元分布不仅依赖于宏观态参数，还依赖于采样本征态所用的系综性质，揭示了矩阵元的多尺度结构。
ai.motivation: 传统微正则窗口分析忽略了系综尺度参数对矩阵元统计的影响，需要更一般的框架来理解热化。
ai.method: 引入可调尺度参数的统计系综，在可积场论中高效数值采样矩阵元并外推到热力学极限，同时识别出可解析计算抑制率的特殊态类。
ai.result: 矩阵元统计由非解析的涨落尺度依赖的代数指数控制，呈现多尺度结构。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解量子热化中矩阵元统计的精细结构，为设计更准确的系综平均方法提供理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 利用可调尺度系综研究非平衡量子动力学中局域可观测量的涨落标度行为。
idea_spark.risk: 解析计算仅适用于特殊可积系统，一般情况可能需要数值模拟或近似方法。
idea_spark.inspiration: 矩阵元的多尺度结构可能为量子热化与经典统计力学的联系提供新视角。

en.tldr: The eigenstate thermalization hypothesis describes statistical properties of local observables in energy eigenstates. This work shows that matrix element distributions depend on ensemble properties beyond macrostate parameters, revealing a multiscale structure with non-analytic fluctuation-scale dependence.
en.motivation: Conventional microcanonical window analysis neglects the influence of ensemble scale parameters on matrix element statistics, requiring a more general framework for thermalization.
en.method: Introduce statistical ensembles with an adjustable scale parameter controlling charge fluctuations; perform efficient numerical sampling of matrix elements in an integrable field theory with extrapolation to the thermodynamic limit, and identify a class of states allowing closed-form computation of suppression rates.
en.result: Matrix element statistics are governed by non-analytic fluctuation-scale-dependent algebraic exponents, exhibiting a multiscale structure.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the fine structure of matrix element statistics in quantum thermalization, offering theoretical basis for designing more accurate ensemble averaging methods.

idea_spark.idea: Use tunable-scale ensembles to study fluctuation scaling of local observables in non-equilibrium quantum dynamics.
idea_spark.risk: Analytic computation is limited to special integrable systems; general cases may require numerical simulation or approximation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The multiscale structure of matrix elements may provide a new perspective on the connection between quantum thermalization and classical statistical mechanics.

papers.title: Dissipative structures in compressible inviscid fluids
papers.summary: This note aims at the following problem. In an ideal density dependent fluid system, is the total energy dissipated on shock type discontinuities? To this end, we study the local energy balance for weak solutions to the isentropic compressible Euler system and derive fine properties of the defect measure. This is done by a careful analysis of the small scale properties of the solutions at the shock discontinuity. By means of the same technique, we also consider the inhomogeneous incompressible case, and, comparing the result, we confirm the general principle that the accumulation of the total energy on codimension one singular structures is a feature that distinguishes compressible and incompressible models.

ai.tldr: 本文研究理想密度依赖流体系统中总能量是否在激波间断处耗散，通过分析等熵可压缩欧拉系统的弱解局部能量平衡，推导缺陷测度的精细性质，并对比不可压缩情形，确认总能量在余维一奇异结构上的积累是可压缩与不可压缩模型的区分特征。
ai.motivation: 探究理想密度依赖流体系统中总能量是否在激波间断处耗散。
ai.method: 通过分析等熵可压缩欧拉系统弱解的局部能量平衡，推导缺陷测度的精细性质，并利用相同技术考虑非均匀不可压缩情形。
ai.result: 确认总能量在余维一奇异结构上的积累是可压缩与不可压缩模型的区分特征。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解可压缩流体中激波耗散机制及与不可压缩模型的本质区别。

idea_spark.idea: 将缺陷测度分析应用于磁流体动力学或相对论流体中的激波耗散问题。
idea_spark.risk: 分析可能依赖于特定方程结构，推广需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从能量积累的余维一结构出发，探索其他物理系统中类似耗散机制。

en.tldr: This note investigates whether total energy is dissipated at shock discontinuities in ideal density-dependent fluid systems, by studying local energy balance for weak solutions to the isentropic compressible Euler system and deriving fine properties of the defect measure, and comparing with the inhomogeneous incompressible case, confirming that accumulation of total energy on codimension-one singular structures distinguishes compressible and incompressible models.
en.motivation: To determine if total energy is dissipated at shock discontinuities in ideal density-dependent fluid systems.
en.method: Analyze local energy balance for weak solutions of the isentropic compressible Euler system, derive fine properties of the defect measure, and apply the same technique to the inhomogeneous incompressible case.
en.result: Confirms that accumulation of total energy on codimension-one singular structures distinguishes compressible and incompressible models.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into shock dissipation mechanisms in compressible fluids and the essential difference from incompressible models.

idea_spark.idea: Apply defect measure analysis to shock dissipation in magnetohydrodynamics or relativistic fluids.
idea_spark.risk: The analysis may depend on specific equation structure; generalization requires verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explore similar dissipation mechanisms in other physical systems based on codimension-one energy accumulation structures.

papers.title: Nash without Numbers: A Social Choice Approach to Mixed Equilibria in Context-Ordinal Games
papers.summary: Nash equilibrium serves as a fundamental mathematical tool in economics and game theory. However, it classically assumes knowledge of player utilities, whereas economics generally regards preferences as more fundamental. To leverage equilibrium analysis in strategic scenarios, one must first elicit numerical utilities consistent with player preferences, a delicate and time-consuming process. In this work, we forgo precise utilities and generalize the Nash equilibrium to a setting where we only assume a player is capable of providing an ordinal ranking of their actions within the context of other players' joint actions. The key technical challenge is to rethink the definition of a best-response. While the classical definition identifies actions maximizing expected payoff, we naturally look towards social choice theory for how to aggregate preferences to identify the most preferred actions. We define this generalized notion of a context-ordinal Nash equilibrium, establish its existence under mild conditions on aggregation methods, introduce notions of regularization, approximation, and regret, explore complexity for simple settings, and develop learning rules for computing such equilibria. In doing so, we provide a generalization of Nash equilibrium and demonstrate its direct applicability to elicited preferences in human experiments.

ai.tldr: 提出一种无需精确效用的纳什均衡推广，仅基于玩家在他人行动背景下的序数偏好，利用社会选择理论定义最佳反应，并证明均衡存在性、正则化、近似与学习规则。
ai.motivation: 经典纳什均衡依赖数值效用，但经济学中偏好更基础，且效用获取耗时易错，因此希望仅用序数偏好进行均衡分析。
ai.method: 将最佳反应重新定义为通过社会选择函数聚合序数偏好得到的最优行动集，定义上下文序数纳什均衡，并引入正则化、近似与遗憾概念。
ai.result: 在温和条件下证明了均衡存在性，给出了简单情形的复杂度分析，并设计了学习算法。
ai.help_to_user: 为偏好数据难以量化的场景（如人类实验）提供理论框架，可直接应用于仅有序数偏好的博弈分析。

idea_spark.idea: 将社会选择函数（如Borda计数、Condorcet方法）作为最佳反应映射，替代期望效用最大化。
idea_spark.risk: 社会选择函数可能不满足某些理性公理（如传递性），导致均衡性质与经典纳什均衡差异较大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受经济学中“偏好比效用更基本”的启发，以及社会选择理论中聚合个体偏好的成熟方法。

en.tldr: Proposes a generalization of Nash equilibrium that requires only ordinal preferences over actions in the context of others' joint actions, using social choice theory to define best responses, and establishes existence, regularization, approximation, and learning rules.
en.motivation: Classical Nash equilibrium assumes numerical utilities, but preferences are more fundamental in economics; eliciting utilities is delicate and time-consuming, motivating a purely ordinal approach.
en.method: Redefines best response as the set of actions most preferred according to a social choice function aggregating ordinal preferences, defines context-ordinal Nash equilibrium, and introduces regularization, approximation, and regret.
en.result: Proves existence under mild conditions, analyzes complexity for simple settings, and develops learning algorithms for computing such equilibria.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework for strategic analysis when only ordinal preference data is available, e.g., in human experiments.

idea_spark.idea: Use social choice functions (e.g., Borda count, Condorcet methods) as best-response mappings instead of expected utility maximization.
idea_spark.risk: Social choice functions may violate rationality axioms (e.g., transitivity), leading to equilibrium properties that differ significantly from classical Nash equilibria.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the economic principle that preferences are more fundamental than utilities, and by mature methods from social choice theory for aggregating individual preferences.

papers.title: A Generalized Singular Value Theory for Neural Networks
papers.summary: Building on the abstract Generalized Singular Value Decomposition (GSVD) theory of Brown et al. [2025], we prove that most modern neural architectures admit a generalized SVD representation in which they are left-invertible before a final linear layer, with no change in input-output behavior. Furthermore, the left-invertible nonlinear portion of the input-output behavior can be made to be \emph{norm preserving}, meaning that perturbations in the left-invertible ``embedding'' (the activations prior to the final linear layer in this representation) correspond proportionally to changes in the input, i.e., distance in feature space can be calibrated directly to distance in input space. We provide a data-driven algorithm for estimating this representation from trained models and propose a model architecture that naturally facilitates the decomposition. We then provide a proof-of-concept that the learned representation can be used to identify adversarial perturbations to model inputs, and develop the theory necessary for future applications to areas such as model bias and invertibility.

ai.tldr: 基于广义奇异值分解理论，证明大多数现代神经网络在最终线性层前具有左可逆且保范的表示，并给出数据驱动算法和对抗扰动检测应用。
ai.motivation: 现有神经网络缺乏统一的奇异值表示，难以解释特征空间距离与输入空间距离的关系，且不利于模型偏差、可逆性等分析。
ai.method: 利用Brown等人的抽象GSVD理论，证明网络可重写为左可逆非线性部分加线性层的形式，并设计数据驱动算法从训练模型中估计该表示，同时提出便于分解的架构。
ai.result: 左可逆非线性部分可做到保范，使特征空间距离与输入空间距离成比例；该表示能有效识别对抗扰动。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种理论框架和实用算法，帮助理解神经网络内部表示，并用于检测对抗样本。

idea_spark.idea: 利用保范嵌入，将输入扰动直接映射为特征空间中的距离变化，从而设计更直观的对抗防御或偏差检测工具。
idea_spark.risk: 数据驱动估计可能依赖模型训练质量，且保范性在复杂非线性网络中可能近似成立而非严格成立。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将奇异值分解思想从线性代数推广到深度网络，启发其他数学工具（如谱分析）在神经网络中的类似应用。

en.tldr: Building on abstract GSVD theory, we prove most modern neural networks admit a left-invertible, norm-preserving representation before the final linear layer, provide a data-driven algorithm to estimate it, and demonstrate adversarial perturbation detection.
en.motivation: Lack of a unified singular value representation for neural networks hinders interpretability of feature space distances and analysis of bias/invertibility.
en.method: Leveraging Brown et al.'s abstract GSVD, we show networks can be rewritten as left-invertible nonlinear part plus linear layer, propose a data-driven estimation algorithm, and design an architecture facilitating the decomposition.
en.result: The left-invertible nonlinear part can be made norm-preserving, calibrating feature space distance to input space distance; the representation effectively identifies adversarial perturbations.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework and practical algorithm to understand neural network representations and detect adversarial examples.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage norm-preserving embeddings to map input perturbations directly to feature space distances, enabling intuitive adversarial defense or bias detection tools.
idea_spark.risk: Data-driven estimation may depend on model training quality; norm-preservation may be approximate rather than exact in complex nonlinear networks.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extending singular value decomposition from linear algebra to deep networks inspires similar applications of other mathematical tools (e.g., spectral analysis) in neural networks.

papers.title: Uncertainty Quantification for Cardiac Shape Reconstruction with Deep Signed Distance Functions via MCMC methods
papers.summary: Atlas-based approaches allow high-quality, patient-specific shape reconstructions of cardiac anatomy from sparse and/or noisy data such as point clouds. However, these methods are mainly prior-driven, so the impact of uncertainty can be large, limiting their clinical reliability. We propose a probabilistic framework for uncertainty-aware cardiac shape reconstruction that combines Deep Signed Distance Functions (DeepSDFs) with Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) sampling. Cardiac geometries are modeled implicitly as zero-level sets of a neural network conditioned on learned latent codes, enabling multi-surface reconstruction of the left and right ventricles. By interpreting the reconstruction loss as a log-likelihood, we perform Bayesian inference in the latent space to obtain both maximum a posteriori (MAP) and posterior-sampled reconstructions. Experiments on a public cardiac dataset show that our approach produces accurate reconstructions and well-calibrated uncertainty estimates.

ai.tldr: 提出结合深度符号距离函数与MCMC采样的概率框架，实现心脏形状重建的不确定性量化。
ai.motivation: 基于图谱的方法受先验驱动，不确定性大，影响临床可靠性。
ai.method: 将重建损失解释为对数似然，在潜在空间进行贝叶斯推断，获得MAP和后验采样重建。
ai.result: 在公开心脏数据集上实现准确重建和良好校准的不确定性估计。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解心脏形状重建中的不确定性，提升临床决策可靠性。

idea_spark.idea: 将不确定性量化与深度隐式表示结合，为医学图像分析提供新思路。
idea_spark.risk: MCMC采样计算成本高，可能限制实时应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将贝叶斯深度学习用于其他医学重建问题。

en.tldr: Proposes a probabilistic framework combining DeepSDF with MCMC sampling for uncertainty-aware cardiac shape reconstruction.
en.motivation: Atlas-based methods are prior-driven with large uncertainty, limiting clinical reliability.
en.method: Interprets reconstruction loss as log-likelihood, performs Bayesian inference in latent space to obtain MAP and posterior-sampled reconstructions.
en.result: Achieves accurate reconstructions and well-calibrated uncertainty estimates on a public cardiac dataset.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand uncertainty in cardiac shape reconstruction, improving clinical decision reliability.

idea_spark.idea: Combining uncertainty quantification with deep implicit representations offers a new approach for medical image analysis.
idea_spark.risk: MCMC sampling is computationally expensive, potentially limiting real-time applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires the use of Bayesian deep learning for other medical reconstruction problems.

papers.title: Topological Blocking of the Schwinger Effect in the Salpeter Equation: A Lefschetz Thimble Analysis
papers.summary: We present a comprehensive Lefschetz thimble analysis of the one-dimensional Salpeter equation under a strong electric field. By treating the non-local square-root operator within the framework of algebraic analysis, we construct the full solution space, which includes relativistic generalizations of the Airy Ai and Bi functions and their negative-energy counterparts. Through a direct comparison with the Dirac and Klein-Gordon equations, we provide a geometric explanation for the absence of Klein paradox and the Schwinger effect in the Salpeter equation. Furthermore, our findings establish a unified geometric interpretation of the Schwinger effect across different relativistic wave equations.

ai.tldr: 通过Lefschetz thimble分析，发现Salpeter方程在强电场下拓扑阻塞了Schwinger效应和Klein悖论，并给出了统一的几何解释。
ai.motivation: 理解不同相对论波动方程中Schwinger效应的几何机制，特别是Salpeter方程为何不出现Klein悖论和粒子对产生。
ai.method: 对一维Salpeter方程进行Lefschetz thimble分析，将非局部平方根算子纳入代数框架，构造包含相对论Airy函数及其负能对应物的完整解空间。
ai.result: Salpeter方程中Schwinger效应和Klein悖论被拓扑阻塞，并与Dirac、Klein-Gordon方程对比，建立了统一的几何解释。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解强场下相对论量子力学中不同方程的物理行为差异，以及拓扑方法在分析非局部算子中的作用。

idea_spark.idea: 将拓扑阻塞概念应用于设计抑制粒子对产生的量子模拟器或新型量子材料。
idea_spark.risk: 实际系统中非局部算子的实现可能引入额外复杂性，且拓扑阻塞的鲁棒性需实验验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从几何角度重新审视其他量子效应（如Casimir效应）的拓扑起源。

en.tldr: A Lefschetz thimble analysis reveals topological blocking of the Schwinger effect and Klein paradox in the Salpeter equation, providing a unified geometric interpretation.
en.motivation: To understand the geometric mechanism of the Schwinger effect across different relativistic wave equations, especially why the Salpeter equation lacks Klein paradox and pair production.
en.method: Performed a Lefschetz thimble analysis of the one-dimensional Salpeter equation, treating the non-local square-root operator via algebraic analysis and constructing the full solution space including relativistic Airy functions and their negative-energy counterparts.
en.result: The Schwinger effect and Klein paradox are topologically blocked in the Salpeter equation, with a unified geometric explanation established through comparison with Dirac and Klein-Gordon equations.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the physical behavior differences among relativistic wave equations under strong fields and the role of topological methods in analyzing non-local operators.

idea_spark.idea: Apply topological blocking to design quantum simulators or novel quantum materials that suppress pair production.
idea_spark.risk: Implementing non-local operators in real systems may introduce extra complexity, and the robustness of topological blocking requires experimental verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Re-examine other quantum effects (e.g., Casimir effect) from a geometric/topological perspective.

papers.title: Emergence of Tsallis Statistics from a Self-Referential Nonlinear Operator: A Variational Framework
papers.summary: We develop a variational thermodynamic framework for statistical systems governed by a self-referential nonlinear operator Omega characterized by structural exponents alpha > 0, beta >= 0, a symmetric kernel K, and a self-coupling constant kappa >= 0. The central object is the self-consistency entropy S[Psi] = -D_KL(Psi || Omega Psi), which vanishes at the fixed points of Omega and serves as a natural Lyapunov functional.   Within the local kernel (mean-field) approximation, minimization of the free energy F = U - T S admits the Tsallis q-exponential distribution as an equilibrium state, with the entropic index q = alpha + beta emerging directly from the fixed-point structure of the operator rather than being postulated. The framework yields a consistent thermodynamic description, including a generalized equation of state PV = (2 - q) T, response functions, and a critical temperature associated with spontaneous symmetry breaking.   The relation q = alpha + beta connects independently measurable structural exponents of the feedback mechanism to the observed tail index, providing a parameter-free criterion that distinguishes this approach from superstatistics, constrained entropy maximization, and q-deformed formalisms. This work establishes an operator-theoretic foundation for nonextensive statistical mechanics in which nonlinear self-referential feedback naturally generates Tsallis statistics in the mean-field limit.

ai.tldr: 提出一个自洽非线性算子的变分热力学框架，在平均场近似下自然导出Tsallis q-指数分布，熵指标q由算子的不动点结构决定。
ai.motivation: 为Tsallis统计力学建立算子理论基础，避免人为假设熵指标，揭示非线性自反馈机制与重尾分布的内在联系。
ai.method: 定义自洽熵S[Ψ] = -D_KL(Ψ || ΩΨ)，在局域核近似下最小化自由能F = U - T S，得到q-指数平衡分布。
ai.result: 熵指标q = α + β由算子结构参数直接给出；推导出广义状态方程PV = (2 - q)T、响应函数和临界温度。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解非广延统计力学中熵指标的物理起源，提供参数无关的判别准则。

idea_spark.idea: 将自洽熵作为Lyapunov泛函，可能用于设计稳定学习算法或自适应系统。
idea_spark.risk: 框架依赖平均场近似，超出此近似时结论可能不成立。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从算子不动点结构自然涌现统计分布，启发在机器学习中设计自反馈机制生成目标分布。

en.tldr: A variational thermodynamic framework with a self-referential nonlinear operator yields Tsallis q-exponential distributions in the mean-field limit, with the entropic index emerging from the fixed-point structure.
en.motivation: To provide an operator-theoretic foundation for nonextensive statistical mechanics, avoiding ad hoc postulation of the entropic index and linking nonlinear self-feedback to heavy-tailed distributions.
en.method: Define self-consistency entropy S[Ψ] = -D_KL(Ψ || ΩΨ); minimize free energy F = U - T S under local kernel approximation to obtain q-exponential equilibrium.
en.result: Entropic index q = α + β emerges from operator exponents; generalized equation of state PV = (2 - q)T, response functions, and critical temperature are derived.
en.help_to_user: Clarifies the physical origin of the entropic index in nonextensive statistical mechanics and provides a parameter-free criterion.

idea_spark.idea: Using self-consistency entropy as a Lyapunov functional may inspire stable learning algorithms or adaptive systems.
idea_spark.risk: Results rely on mean-field approximation; validity beyond this regime is not guaranteed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Emergence of statistical distributions from operator fixed points suggests designing self-feedback mechanisms in machine learning to generate target distributions.

papers.title: Beyond the Wrapper: Identifying Artifact Reliance in Static Malware Classifiers using TRUSTEE
papers.summary: Modern cybersecurity relies heavily on static machine-learning-based malware classifiers. However, transformations such as packing and other non-semantic modifications applied to executable files limit their reliability. Malware classifiers often learn these unnecessary artifacts rather than the true binary behavior because of the high association between maliciousness and packing. Moreover, these malware classifiers are black boxes, making it difficult to understand what they learn. To address this issue, we proposed a two-part framework using the post-hoc interpretability XAI tool TRUSTEE, followed by a manual analysis of the top features. We conducted several controlled experiments by varying the dataset composition ratios to understand their impact on the results. The top-ranked features across all experiments, identified by TRUSTEE, were predominantly packing artifacts, portable executable(PE) metadata, and n-grams at the string level, rather than malicious semantics. These results suggest that these malware classifiers are highly sensitive to dataset composition and can misinterpret packing as malicious behavior. Our proposed framework allows for the reproducible diagnosis of such biases and forms a guideline for building more robust and semantically meaningful malware detection models

ai.tldr: 提出TRUSTEE框架，通过事后可解释性分析揭示静态机器学习恶意软件分类器过度依赖打包等非语义伪影，而非真实恶意行为。
ai.motivation: 现代静态恶意软件分类器常因打包等变换而学习非语义伪影，且模型黑箱特性导致难以理解其决策依据。
ai.method: 使用事后可解释性工具TRUSTEE提取关键特征，并通过控制数据集组成比例进行多组实验，手动分析排名靠前的特征。
ai.result: 所有实验中排名靠前的特征主要是打包伪影、PE元数据和字符串级n-gram，而非恶意语义，表明分类器对数据集组成高度敏感，易将打包误判为恶意。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助安全研究人员诊断模型偏差，指导构建更鲁棒、语义相关的恶意软件检测模型。

idea_spark.idea: 结合对抗训练或数据去偏技术，强制模型关注语义特征而非打包伪影。
idea_spark.risk: 过度依赖事后解释可能忽略模型内部复杂交互，且手动分析可能引入主观偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受启发于可解释性在医疗影像中的应用，将类似框架用于检测其他领域模型对无关特征的依赖。

en.tldr: Proposes TRUSTEE, a post-hoc interpretability framework to reveal that static ML malware classifiers rely on non-semantic artifacts like packing rather than true malicious behavior.
en.motivation: Static malware classifiers often learn non-semantic artifacts due to packing transformations, and their black-box nature hinders understanding of decision-making.
en.method: Uses post-hoc XAI tool TRUSTEE to extract top features, conducts controlled experiments with varying dataset compositions, and manually analyzes the top-ranked features.
en.result: Top features across all experiments are predominantly packing artifacts, PE metadata, and string-level n-grams, not malicious semantics, indicating high sensitivity to dataset composition and misinterpretation of packing as malicious.
en.help_to_user: Helps security researchers diagnose model biases and guides building more robust, semantically meaningful malware detection models.

idea_spark.idea: Combine adversarial training or data debiasing to force models to focus on semantic features rather than packing artifacts.
idea_spark.risk: Over-reliance on post-hoc explanations may miss complex internal interactions, and manual analysis can introduce subjective bias.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by interpretability in medical imaging, apply similar frameworks to detect reliance on spurious features in other domains.

papers.title: MoCoTalk: Multi-Conditional Diffusion with Adaptive Router for Controllable Talking Head Generation
papers.summary: Talking-head generation requires joint modeling of identity, head pose, facial expression, and mouth dynamics. Existing methods typically address only a subset of these factors, and rely on fixed-weight or heuristic fusion when multiple conditions are involved. We present MoCoTalk, a multi-conditional video diffusion framework that unifies four complementary control signals: a reference image, facial keypoints, 3DMM-rendered shading meshes, and the corresponding speech audio. To resolve destructive interference among heterogeneous conditions, we introduce an Adaptive Multi-Condition Router that computes channel-wise, timestep-aware gating over the four condition streams, allowing the fusion strategy to vary with both feature subspace and noise level. To better capture speech-related facial dynamics, we design a Mouth-Augmented Shading Mesh, a 3DMM-based representation that decouples head motion, mouth motion, expression, and lighting. This design provides a temporally consistent geometric prior and allows flexible recombination of these attributes at inference. We further introduce a lip consistency loss to tighten audio-visual alignment. Extensive experiments show that MoCoTalk achieves state-of-the-art performance on the majority of structural, motion, and perceptual metrics, while offering attribute-level controllability that single-condition methods do not provide.

ai.tldr: 提出MoCoTalk，一种多条件视频扩散框架，通过自适应路由器和嘴部增强着色网格实现可控说话头生成。
ai.motivation: 现有方法仅处理部分控制因素，且多条件融合采用固定权重或启发式策略，导致异构条件间相互干扰。
ai.method: 统一参考图像、面部关键点、3DMM着色网格和语音音频四种条件；引入自适应多条件路由器实现通道级、时间步感知的门控融合；设计嘴部增强着色网格解耦头部运动、嘴部运动、表情和光照；加入唇部一致性损失。
ai.result: 在结构、运动和感知指标上达到最先进性能，并提供属性级可控性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过多条件扩散模型实现精细可控的说话头生成。

idea_spark.idea: 将嘴部增强着色网格的几何先验与扩散模型结合，实现属性解耦和灵活重组。
idea_spark.risk: 多条件融合可能增加计算开销，且唇部一致性损失对音频质量敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从条件间干扰问题出发，设计动态融合策略，启发其他多条件生成场景。

idea_spark.risk: 多条件融合可能增加计算开销，且唇部一致性损失对音频质量敏感。

en.tldr: Proposes MoCoTalk, a multi-conditional video diffusion framework with an adaptive router and mouth-augmented shading mesh for controllable talking head generation.
en.motivation: Existing methods handle only a subset of control factors and use fixed-weight or heuristic fusion, causing destructive interference among heterogeneous conditions.
en.method: Unifies four conditions: reference image, facial keypoints, 3DMM-rendered shading meshes, and speech audio; introduces an Adaptive Multi-Condition Router for channel-wise, timestep-aware gating; designs a Mouth-Augmented Shading Mesh to decouple head motion, mouth motion, expression, and lighting; adds a lip consistency loss.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on structural, motion, and perceptual metrics, with attribute-level controllability.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to achieve fine-grained controllable talking head generation via multi-conditional diffusion.

idea_spark.idea: Combine the geometric prior of mouth-augmented shading mesh with diffusion models for attribute decoupling and flexible recombination.
idea_spark.risk: Multi-condition fusion may increase computational cost, and the lip consistency loss is sensitive to audio quality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the interference problem among conditions, the dynamic fusion strategy can be applied to other multi-condition generation scenarios.

papers.title: Finite index solutions to the Bernoulli problem in three dimensions are axially symmetric
papers.summary: We show that every entire solution to the Bernoulli (or one-phase) free boundary problem with finite Morse index in $\mathbb{R}^3$ is axially symmetric. In fact, we additionally prove that the same result would follow in any dimension $4 \le n \le 6$ in which stable entire solutions are shown to be flat.

ai.tldr: 证明了三维空间中有限Morse指标的Bernoulli自由边界问题的整体解都是轴对称的。
ai.motivation: 研究Bernoulli自由边界问题中整体解的对称性，这是几何分析中的经典问题。
ai.method: 利用有限Morse指标条件和维度分析，结合稳定解的平坦性结果。
ai.result: 在三维空间中，有限Morse指标的整体解必为轴对称；在四至六维中，若稳定整体解是平坦的，则结论也成立。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解高维自由边界问题中对称性成立的维度界限。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将平坦性条件与更高维的稳定性分析结合，探索七维以上是否仍有类似结论。
idea_spark.risk: 高维情形可能缺乏平坦性结果，需要新的几何或分析工具。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从低维对称性出发，逐步提升维度，寻找反例或证明的临界点。

zh.motivation: 研究Bernoulli自由边界问题中整体解的对称性，这是几何分析中的经典问题。

en.tldr: We prove that every entire solution to the Bernoulli free boundary problem with finite Morse index in ℝ³ is axially symmetric.
en.motivation: To study symmetry properties of entire solutions to the Bernoulli free boundary problem, a classic question in geometric analysis.
en.method: Using finite Morse index and dimensional analysis, combined with flatness results for stable solutions.
en.result: In three dimensions, finite-index entire solutions are axially symmetric; in dimensions 4–6, the same holds if stable entire solutions are flat.
en.help_to_user: Clarifies the dimensional threshold for symmetry in free boundary problems.

idea_spark.idea: Combine flatness conditions with higher-dimensional stability analysis to explore whether similar results hold in dimensions ≥7.
idea_spark.risk: Higher dimensions may lack flatness results, requiring new geometric or analytic tools.
idea_spark.inspiration: Start from low-dimensional symmetry and gradually increase dimension to find counterexamples or proof thresholds.

papers.title: HEART: Hyperspherical Embedding Alignment via Kent-Representation Traversal in Diffusion Models
papers.summary: Text-to-image diffusion models can generate visually stunning images, yet, controlling what appears and how it appears, remains surprisingly difficult, especially when operating solely within the constraints of the text-conditioning space. For example, changing a subject or adjusting an attribute often leads to unintended side effects, such as altered backgrounds or distorted details. This is because most existing text-based control methods treat the embedding space as Euclidean and apply simple linear transformations, which do not reflect how semantic concepts are actually organized. In this work, we take a step back and ask: what is the true geometry of these embeddings? We find that text encoder representations lie on a hypersphere, where concepts are not linear directions but structured, anisotropic distributions better captured by Kent distributions. Building on this insight, we propose HEART, a training-free framework that performs Kent-aware geodesic transformations directly on the hypersphere. By respecting the underlying geometry, HEART enables intuitive and precise edits, such as consistent subject replacement and fine-grained attribute control, while preserving the original scene. Importantly, HEART requires no finetuning, inversion, or optimization, and generalizes across diffusion model architectures. Our results show that a simple shift in perspective, from linear to spherical, can unlock fast, and controllable image generation.

ai.tldr: 提出HEART框架，通过Kent分布在超球面上进行测地线变换，实现无需训练的文本到图像扩散模型精确编辑。
ai.motivation: 现有文本控制方法将嵌入空间视为欧几里得空间，导致编辑时出现意外副作用，而真实语义嵌入位于超球面上且呈各向异性分布。
ai.method: 利用Kent分布建模超球面上的各向异性概念，通过测地线变换实现语义对齐，无需微调、反演或优化。
ai.result: 实现主体替换和属性控制等精确编辑，同时保持场景一致性，且跨扩散模型架构通用。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解扩散模型嵌入的几何结构，并提供一种无需训练即可精确控制图像生成的方法。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将Kent分布用于多模态嵌入对齐，例如文本-图像联合编辑或跨模态检索。
idea_spark.risk: Kent分布假设可能不适用于所有语义概念，复杂场景下测地线变换可能引入新伪影。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从线性到球面的视角转变启发我们重新审视其他领域（如推荐系统、知识图谱）的嵌入空间几何。

zh.tldr: 提出HEART框架，通过Kent分布在超球面上进行测地线变换，实现无需训练的文本到图像扩散模型精确编辑。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解扩散模型嵌入的几何结构，并提供一种无需训练即可精确控制图像生成的方法。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将Kent分布用于多模态嵌入对齐，例如文本-图像联合编辑或跨模态检索。
idea_spark.risk: Kent分布假设可能不适用于所有语义概念，复杂场景下测地线变换可能引入新伪影。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从线性到球面的视角转变启发我们重新审视其他领域（如推荐系统、知识图谱）的嵌入空间几何。

en.tldr: HEART performs Kent-aware geodesic transformations on the hypersphere for training-free, precise editing in text-to-image diffusion models.
en.motivation: Existing text-based control methods treat embedding space as Euclidean, causing unintended side effects, while real semantic embeddings lie on a hypersphere with anisotropic distributions.
en.method: Models anisotropic concepts via Kent distributions and applies geodesic transformations on the hypersphere, requiring no finetuning, inversion, or optimization.
en.result: Enables consistent subject replacement and fine-grained attribute control while preserving scene integrity, generalizing across diffusion architectures.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the geometric structure of diffusion model embeddings and a training-free method for precise image control.

idea_spark.idea: Explore Kent distributions for multimodal embedding alignment, e.g., joint text-image editing or cross-modal retrieval.
idea_spark.risk: Kent distribution assumptions may not hold for all semantic concepts; complex scenes might introduce new artifacts under geodesic transformations.
idea_spark.inspiration: The shift from linear to spherical perspective inspires rethinking embedding geometry in other domains like recommendation systems and knowledge graphs.

papers.title: ImplantMamba: Long-range Sequential Modeling Mamba For Dental Implant Position Prediction
papers.summary: In the design of surgical guides for implant placement, determining the precise implant position is a critical step. However, the implant region itself is often characterized by a lack of distinctive texture in medical images. Consequently, artificial intelligence (AI) models must infer the correct implant position and angulation (slope) primarily by analyzing the texture of the surrounding teeth, which poses a significant challenge. To address this, we propose ImplantMamba, a network architecture designed for long-range sequential modeling to integrate texture information from adjacent teeth. Our approach explicitly couples the regression of the implant position with its slope. The core of ImplantMamba is a hybrid encoder that combines Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) with Mamba layers. This design enables the network to hierarchically extract local anatomical features through CNNs while simultaneously modeling global contextual dependencies across the entire scan volume via Mamba's selective scan operations, leading to a more comprehensive understanding of the implant site. Furthermore, we introduce a Slope-Coupled Prediction Branch (SCP). This branch is designed to connect the prediction of implant position with the slope, ensuring internal consistency and anatomical plausibility by thereby enforcing a coherent relationship between the predicted implant location and its angulation. Extensive experiments on a large-scale dental implant dataset demonstrate that the proposed ImplantMamba achieves superior performance compared to existing methods.

ai.tldr: 提出ImplantMamba网络，利用长程序列建模和斜率耦合预测，从相邻牙齿纹理推断种植体位置与角度。
ai.motivation: 种植体区域缺乏纹理，AI需依赖周围牙齿纹理推断位置与角度，现有方法难以有效整合长程上下文信息。
ai.method: 设计混合编码器（CNN+Mamba）分层提取局部特征并建模全局依赖，引入斜率耦合预测分支（SCP）确保位置与角度的一致性。
ai.result: 在大规模牙科种植数据集上，ImplantMamba优于现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何利用长程序列建模和结构约束提升医学图像中种植体定位的准确性。

idea_spark.idea: 将斜率耦合预测扩展为多参数耦合（如深度、角度、旋转），或引入解剖先验作为可学习约束。
idea_spark.risk: Mamba的长程建模可能增加计算开销，且斜率耦合假设在极端解剖变异下可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用序列模型（如Mamba）处理3D医学体积数据，结合结构约束提升预测的解剖合理性。

zh.tldr: 提出ImplantMamba网络，利用长程序列建模和斜率耦合预测，从相邻牙齿纹理推断种植体位置与角度。
zh.motivation: 种植体区域缺乏纹理，AI需依赖周围牙齿纹理推断位置与角度，现有方法难以有效整合长程上下文信息。

zh.result: 在大规模牙科种植数据集上，ImplantMamba优于现有方法。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何利用长程序列建模和结构约束提升医学图像中种植体定位的准确性。

idea_spark.idea: 将斜率耦合预测扩展为多参数耦合（如深度、角度、旋转），或引入解剖先验作为可学习约束。
idea_spark.risk: Mamba的长程建模可能增加计算开销，且斜率耦合假设在极端解剖变异下可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用序列模型（如Mamba）处理3D医学体积数据，结合结构约束提升预测的解剖合理性。

en.tldr: Proposes ImplantMamba, a network leveraging long-range sequential modeling and slope-coupled prediction to infer implant position and angulation from adjacent tooth textures.
en.motivation: Implant regions lack distinctive texture, so AI must rely on surrounding teeth; existing methods struggle to integrate long-range contextual information effectively.
en.method: Designs a hybrid encoder (CNN+Mamba) for hierarchical local feature extraction and global dependency modeling, and introduces a Slope-Coupled Prediction Branch (SCP) to enforce consistency between position and slope.
en.result: On a large-scale dental implant dataset, ImplantMamba outperforms existing methods.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how long-range sequential modeling and structural constraints improve implant localization accuracy in medical images.

idea_spark.idea: Extend slope-coupled prediction to multi-parameter coupling (e.g., depth, angle, rotation) or incorporate anatomical priors as learnable constraints.
idea_spark.risk: Mamba's long-range modeling may increase computational cost, and the slope-coupling assumption might fail under extreme anatomical variations.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage sequence models (e.g., Mamba) for 3D medical volumes with structural constraints to enhance anatomical plausibility of predictions.

papers.title: Law of large numbers for activated random walk on villages
papers.summary: We consider activated random walk (ARW), an interacting particle system and prototypical model of self-organized criticality in a setting which combines mean-field behavior with the geometry of an arbitrary graph, which we call the village model of ARW, or VARW for short. VARW is obtained from a fixed graph by replacing each vertex with a 'village' that consists of n replicas of that vertex. We focus on VARW where particles walk according to a strictly sub-stochastic transition kernel on a finite underlying graph, so mass is sometimes lost (which guarantees that the system eventually stabilizes almost surely). Under a subcriticality assumption on the initial state we prove a law of large numbers as n goes to infinity for the resulting stable configuration of particles and the odometer of the process, to a limit which is uniquely characterized by a system of non-linear equations.

ai.tldr: 研究了村庄模型中的激活随机游走，在有限图上证明了稳定构型和里程计的大数定律。
ai.motivation: 理解自组织临界性在结合平均场行为与任意图几何的设定中的表现。
ai.method: 将图的每个顶点替换为n个副本形成村庄，粒子按严格次随机构造行走，在次临界初始条件下分析稳定构型和里程计的极限。
ai.result: 当n趋于无穷时，稳定构型和里程计满足大数定律，极限由非线性方程组唯一刻画。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了激活随机游走在村庄模型中的严格极限行为，可用于自组织临界性理论的验证和扩展。

idea_spark.idea: 将图顶点复制为村庄，结合平均场与图几何，可能简化复杂网络上的临界行为分析。
idea_spark.risk: 村庄模型可能过度简化真实图结构，导致结果偏离实际系统。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发在复杂网络上设计类似复制策略，以解析方式研究临界现象。

en.tldr: We study activated random walk on a village model, proving a law of large numbers for the stable configuration and odometer as n goes to infinity.
en.motivation: To understand self-organized criticality in a setting that combines mean-field behavior with arbitrary graph geometry.
en.method: Replace each vertex of a graph with n replicas (village), particles walk via a strictly sub-stochastic kernel, and under a subcritical initial condition we analyze the limit of the stable configuration and odometer.
en.result: As n → ∞, the stable configuration and odometer satisfy a law of large numbers, with the limit uniquely characterized by a system of nonlinear equations.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous limit behavior for activated random walk in the village model, useful for validating and extending self-organized criticality theory.

idea_spark.idea: Replicating graph vertices into villages combines mean-field and geometry, potentially simplifying critical behavior analysis on complex networks.
idea_spark.risk: The village model may oversimplify real graph structures, leading to results that deviate from actual systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires similar replication strategies on complex networks to analytically study critical phenomena.

papers.title: Optimal Recourse Summaries via Bi-Objective Decision Tree Learning
papers.summary: Actionable Recourse provides individuals with actions they can take to change an unfavorable classifier outcome. While useful at the instance level, it is ill-suited for global auditing and bias detection, since aggregating local actions is costly and often inconsistent. Recourse Summaries address this limitation by partitioning the population and assigning one shared action per subgroup, enabling comparison across subgroups. Designing summaries involves a fundamental trade-off between recourse effectiveness and recourse cost, which existing methods do not adequately address. We introduce Summaries of Optimal and Global Actionable Recourse (SOGAR), which formulates recourse summary learning as an optimal decision tree learning problem and finds the Pareto front -- the complete set of solutions where improving one objective necessarily worsens the other. SOGAR enables post-hoc selection of the desired trade-off without retraining. Using shallow axis-parallel decision trees and sparse leaf actions, SOGAR produces stable, low-cost, and effective recourse summaries that outperform existing approaches across effectiveness and cost metrics.

ai.tldr: 提出SOGAR方法，通过双目标决策树学习生成最优且全局可操作的补救摘要，实现效果与成本的帕累托前沿。
ai.motivation: 现有局部补救方法难以用于全局审计和偏差检测，且聚合成本高、不一致。
ai.method: 将补救摘要学习建模为最优决策树学习问题，寻找效果与成本的帕累托前沿。
ai.result: SOGAR生成的摘要稳定、低成本且有效，在效果和成本指标上优于现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解不同子群的最优补救方案，支持事后选择所需的权衡。

idea_spark.idea: 将帕累托前沿引入决策树学习，实现无需重训练即可选择不同权衡。
idea_spark.risk: 浅层树可能限制表达力，稀疏动作可能忽略个体差异。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受多目标优化和可解释机器学习启发，将公平性审计与决策树结合。

en.tldr: Proposes SOGAR, which formulates recourse summary learning as bi-objective decision tree learning to find the Pareto front of effectiveness and cost.
en.motivation: Local recourse methods are unsuitable for global auditing and bias detection due to high aggregation cost and inconsistency.
en.method: Models recourse summary learning as an optimal decision tree problem, finding the complete Pareto front of effectiveness vs. cost.
en.result: SOGAR produces stable, low-cost, and effective summaries, outperforming existing methods on both effectiveness and cost metrics.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand optimal recourse strategies across subgroups and select desired trade-offs post-hoc.

idea_spark.idea: Introducing Pareto front into decision tree learning enables trade-off selection without retraining.
idea_spark.risk: Shallow trees may limit expressiveness; sparse actions may overlook individual nuances.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by multi-objective optimization and interpretable ML, combining fairness auditing with decision trees.

papers.title: The Korteweg-de Vries limit for the global dynamics of the Toda lattice
papers.summary: It has been observed that the dynamics of the Toda lattice can be well described by solutions of the Korteweg-de Vries (KdV) equation in the continuum limit. We show that, under the KdV scaling and a suitable translation, the solution of the Toda lattice with H^1 initial data converges to that of the KdV equation globally in time. Our proof relies on tools from harmonic analysis and also on the construction and the conservation of mass and energy of the Toda lattice, the latter of which are derived from the completely integrable structure of the Toda lattice. As a consequence, we obtain long-wave KdV limits for the Toda lattice.

ai.tldr: 在KdV标度下，Toda格子的解全局收敛到KdV方程的解。
ai.motivation: 观察发现Toda格子动力学在连续极限下可由KdV方程描述，但缺乏全局收敛性的严格证明。
ai.method: 利用调和分析工具，并构造Toda格子的质量和能量守恒律（来自完全可积结构）。
ai.result: 证明了在H^1初值下，Toda格子的解在KdV标度下全局收敛到KdV方程的解，从而得到长波KdV极限。
ai.help_to_user: 为可积系统与连续极限的严格数学联系提供了全局性结果。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试用类似方法证明其他离散系统（如Ablowitz-Ladik格子）的连续极限全局收敛性。
idea_spark.risk: 其他系统可能缺乏类似的完全可积结构，导致守恒律构造困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从完全可积系统的守恒律出发，结合调和分析处理全局时间收敛。

en.tldr: Under KdV scaling, the solution of the Toda lattice converges globally to that of the KdV equation.
en.motivation: Observations suggest Toda lattice dynamics are described by KdV in the continuum limit, but a global convergence proof was missing.
en.method: Using harmonic analysis tools and constructing mass and energy conservation laws from the completely integrable structure of the Toda lattice.
en.result: Proved global convergence of Toda lattice solutions to KdV solutions under H^1 initial data, yielding long-wave KdV limits.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous global result linking integrable systems and continuum limits.

idea_spark.idea: Try to prove global continuum limits for other discrete systems (e.g., Ablowitz-Ladik lattice) using similar methods.
idea_spark.risk: Other systems may lack the completely integrable structure, making conservation law construction difficult.
idea_spark.inspiration: Start from conservation laws of integrable systems and use harmonic analysis to handle global time convergence.

papers.title: Functoriality of the KSGNS Construction for Intertwiners of Strict Positive $C^*$-Correspondences
papers.summary: We prove that the KSGNS construction can be viewed as an endofunctor on a category whose objects are positive $C^*$-correspondences from a fixed $C^*$-algebra and morphisms are given by intertwiners which account for automorphisms of the fixed $C^*$-algebra. Using this perspective, we provide a functorial perspective for strict positive equivariant $C^*$-correspondences of $C^*$-dynamical systems and show every strict positive equivariant $C^*$-correspondence of $C^*$-dynamical systems unitarily uniquely dilates under the KSGNS construction to an equivariant $C^*$-correspondence of the dynamical systems.

ai.tldr: 证明KSGNS构造可视为固定C*-代数上正对应范畴的端函子，并用于严格正等变C*-对应的酉扩张。
ai.motivation: 将KSGNS构造提升为函子，以统一处理C*-动力系统中严格正等变对应的扩张问题。
ai.method: 定义包含自同构的intertwiner作为态射，构造正对应范畴，并验证KSGNS构造的函子性。
ai.result: 每个严格正等变C*-对应在KSGNS构造下唯一地酉扩张为等变C*-对应。
ai.help_to_user: 提供理解C*-对应范畴论性质及等变扩张的严格框架。

idea_spark.idea: 利用intertwiner处理自同构，使KSGNS构造在更广范畴中保持结构。
idea_spark.risk: 范畴的态射定义可能过于严格，限制实际应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将经典构造提升为函子，可系统研究动力系统间的态射与扩张。

en.tldr: Proves that the KSGNS construction is an endofunctor on a category of positive C*-correspondences with intertwiners, and applies it to uniquely dilate strict positive equivariant C*-correspondences.
en.motivation: To provide a functorial perspective for the KSGNS construction, enabling a unified treatment of dilations for equivariant C*-correspondences in C*-dynamical systems.
en.method: Defines a category where objects are positive C*-correspondences and morphisms are intertwiners that account for automorphisms, then verifies the KSGNS construction is an endofunctor.
en.result: Every strict positive equivariant C*-correspondence of a C*-dynamical system unitarily and uniquely dilates to an equivariant C*-correspondence via the KSGNS construction.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous categorical framework for understanding the KSGNS construction and its application to equivariant dilations.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporate automorphisms into morphisms via intertwiners to make the KSGNS construction functorial on a broader category.
idea_spark.risk: The definition of morphisms may be too restrictive, limiting applicability in concrete settings.
idea_spark.inspiration: Lifting classical constructions to functors enables systematic study of morphisms and dilations in dynamical systems.

papers.title: Stochastic Policy Gradient Methods in the Uncertain Volatility Model
papers.summary: The multidimensional Uncertain Volatility Model leads to robust option pricing problems under joint volatility and correlation uncertainty. Their numerical resolution quickly becomes challenging because the associated stochastic control problem is high-dimensional. We propose a backward actor-critic stochastic policy gradient scheme tailored to this setting. The method combines a discrete dynamic programming principle with Proximal Policy Optimization and shallow neural-network approximations of both the value function and the control policy. A key ingredient is the policy parameterization: continuous controls are represented through a squashed Gaussian policy built on a C-vine representation of correlation matrices, which enforces positive semidefiniteness by construction. Numerical experiments on a range of multidimensional derivatives show that the method yields accurate prices, remains computationally efficient, and compares favorably with existing Monte Carlo and machine-learning-based benchmarks for robust pricing in the Uncertain Volatility Model.

ai.tldr: 提出一种后向演员-评论家随机策略梯度方法，用于高维不确定波动率模型下的稳健期权定价。
ai.motivation: 多维不确定波动率模型导致高维随机控制问题，传统数值方法难以求解。
ai.method: 结合离散动态规划原理、近端策略优化和浅层神经网络，采用基于C-vine的挤压高斯策略参数化保证正定性。
ai.result: 数值实验表明该方法在多种多维衍生品上定价准确、计算高效，优于现有基准。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何用强化学习解决高维金融稳健定价问题。

idea_spark.idea: 利用C-vine表示相关矩阵，确保策略参数化中正定性约束。
idea_spark.risk: 浅层网络可能无法捕捉极复杂非线性，需验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将PPO与动态规划结合，为连续控制提供新思路。
