en.tldr: Proposes a backward actor-critic stochastic policy gradient method for robust option pricing under the high-dimensional Uncertain Volatility Model.
en.motivation: The multidimensional Uncertain Volatility Model leads to high-dimensional stochastic control problems that are challenging for traditional numerical methods.
en.method: Combines discrete dynamic programming, Proximal Policy Optimization, and shallow neural networks, with a squashed Gaussian policy using C-vine representation to enforce positive semidefiniteness.
en.result: Numerical experiments show accurate prices, computational efficiency, and favorable comparison with existing benchmarks for robust pricing.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how reinforcement learning can solve high-dimensional robust pricing problems in finance.

idea_spark.idea: Uses C-vine representation of correlation matrices to enforce positive semidefiniteness in policy parameterization.
idea_spark.risk: Shallow networks may not capture extremely complex nonlinearities; generalization needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining PPO with dynamic programming offers a new approach for continuous control.

papers.title: Nonlinear stability threshold for 3D compressible Couette flow
papers.summary: We establish the nonlinear stability threshold $O(ν^{3/2})$ for the three-dimensional Couette flow governed by the compressible Navier--Stokes equations. While stability thresholds are well understood in two dimensions for both compressible and incompressible flows, and in three dimensions for incompressible flows, the three-dimensional compressible case remains open due to additional structural features, strong mode interactions, and wave coupling. The proof is based on a refined frequency-space approach. For zero modes, we improve upon two-dimensional methods by clearly separating and precisely estimating the main contributions from diffusion waves, acoustic waves, and the lift-up mechanism, leading to a systematic way to handle their nonlinear coupling. For the non-zero modes, we introduce new multiplier estimates and a decomposition based on the structure of the compressible system, which allows us to track the interaction between dissipation and acoustic effects.

ai.tldr: 建立了三维可压缩Couette流的非线性稳定性阈值O(ν^{3/2})，通过频域方法处理零模和非零模的耦合效应。
ai.motivation: 三维可压缩流的稳定性阈值问题因结构复杂、模式相互作用强而尚未解决。
ai.method: 采用精细的频域方法，对零模分离扩散波、声波和升力机制并精确估计，对非零模引入新的乘子估计和基于可压缩系统结构的分解。
ai.result: 得到了三维可压缩Couette流的非线性稳定性阈值O(ν^{3/2})。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解三维可压缩流动的非线性稳定性机制和阈值。

idea_spark.idea: 将零模和非零模分别处理，利用波结构分解非线性耦合。
idea_spark.risk: 方法依赖于特定流动结构，推广需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从不可压缩流稳定性理论出发，考虑可压缩性带来的波耦合效应。

en.tldr: Established the nonlinear stability threshold O(ν^{3/2}) for 3D compressible Couette flow using a refined frequency-space approach that handles zero and non-zero modes separately.
en.motivation: The stability threshold for 3D compressible flows remained open due to complex structure and strong mode interactions.
en.method: A refined frequency-space approach: for zero modes, separate and estimate contributions from diffusion waves, acoustic waves, and lift-up; for non-zero modes, introduce new multiplier estimates and a decomposition based on the compressible system structure.
en.result: Obtained the nonlinear stability threshold O(ν^{3/2}) for 3D compressible Couette flow.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the nonlinear stability mechanism and threshold for 3D compressible shear flows.

idea_spark.idea: Treat zero and non-zero modes separately, using wave structure to decompose nonlinear coupling.
idea_spark.risk: The method relies on specific flow structure; generalization requires verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from incompressible stability theory, consider wave coupling effects due to compressibility.

papers.title: AdpSplit: Error-Driven Adaptive Splitting for Faster Geometry Discovery in 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.summary: Adaptive density control in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) repeatedly grows the Gaussian population through fixed-cardinality random splitting to discover useful scene structure. However, in vanilla 3DGS, its binary split operator requires many densification rounds to expose fine details, making it a bottleneck for efficient training schedules with fewer iterations. We introduce AdpSplit, an error-driven adaptive split operator that determines the number of split children and initializes the child parameters from L1-pixel-error region statistics, enabling fewer densification iterations, thus reduced training time, while preserving the rendering quality of full-schedule training. Across the MipNeRF360, Deep-Blending, and Tanks&Temples datasets, AdpSplit reduces the training time of multiple accelerated 3DGS pipelines by 9.2%-22.3% as a simple drop-in replacement for the standard split operator. With FastGS, AdpSplit matches the full-schedule PSNR on MipNeRF360 while reducing training time by 16.4%, corresponding to a 12.6x acceleration over vanilla 3DGS.

ai.motivation: 标准3DGS的固定基数随机分裂需要多次密度化迭代才能发现精细结构，成为高效训练瓶颈。
ai.method: AdpSplit根据L1像素误差区域统计自适应确定分裂子节点数并初始化子节点参数，替代标准分裂算子。
ai.result: 在MipNeRF360、Deep-Blending和Tanks&Temples数据集上，作为即插即用替换，将多个加速3DGS管线的训练时间减少9.2%-22.3%；与FastGS结合，在MipNeRF360上达到全调度PSNR，训练时间减少16.4%，相对原始3DGS加速12.6倍。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过自适应分裂算子加速3DGS训练而不牺牲渲染质量。

idea_spark.risk: 自适应分裂可能引入额外计算开销，需平衡加速与复杂度。

en.tldr: AdpSplit is an error-driven adaptive split operator that determines the number of split children and initializes child parameters from L1-pixel-error region statistics, reducing densification iterations and training time in 3DGS. It achieves 9.2%-22.3% training time reduction across multiple accelerated pipelines and 16.4% reduction with FastGS while matching full-schedule PSNR.
en.motivation: The fixed-cardinality random splitting in vanilla 3DGS requires many densification rounds to discover fine details, bottlenecking efficient training.
en.method: AdpSplit adaptively determines the number of split children and initializes child parameters based on L1-pixel-error region statistics, replacing the standard split operator.
en.result: On MipNeRF360, Deep-Blending, and Tanks&Temples datasets, AdpSplit reduces training time of multiple accelerated 3DGS pipelines by 9.2%-22.3% as a drop-in replacement. With FastGS, it matches full-schedule PSNR on MipNeRF360 while reducing training time by 16.4%, corresponding to a 12.6x acceleration over vanilla 3DGS.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to accelerate 3DGS training via an adaptive split operator without sacrificing rendering quality.

idea_spark.idea: Leveraging pixel-level error statistics to guide splitting decisions can inspire error-feedback-based operator design in other domains.
idea_spark.risk: Adaptive splitting may introduce additional computational overhead, requiring a balance between acceleration and complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extracting region statistics from rendering errors to optimize splitting can inspire adaptive sampling strategies in other generation or reconstruction tasks.

papers.title: Cross-validation-based optimal feature selection for linear SVM classification
papers.summary: This paper addresses feature subset selection for Support Vector Machines (SVMs) based on the cross-validation criterion. Unlike statistical criteria such as the Akaike information criterion (AIC) and the Bayesian information criterion (BIC), cross-validation requires only the mild assumption that samples are independently and identically distributed (i.i.d.). For this reason, the cross-validation criterion is expected to work well across a wide range of prediction problems, and it has already demonstrated its usefulness as a feature subset selection method for regression. The objective of this paper is to extend the framework of best feature subset selection via the cross-validation criterion to SVM classification problems. This subset-selection problem can be formulated as a bilevel mixed-integer optimization problem. Because bilevel optimization problems are generally hard to solve, we introduce the Least Squares Support Vector Machine (LS-SVM), whose optimality conditions admit a closed-form expression, and reduce the problem to a single-level mixed-integer optimization problem. This reformulation allows us to solve the problem using standard optimization software. We evaluate the proposed framework through simulation experiments that compare it with a regularization-based method (L1-regularization), a sequential search method (recursive feature elimination), and mixed-integer optimization (MIO) based on statistical criteria. The results show that the proposed framework achieves favorable performance both in classification accuracy and feature selection accuracy.

ai.tldr: 提出基于交叉验证准则的线性SVM最优特征子集选择方法，通过LS-SVM将双层优化转化为单层混合整数优化问题。
ai.motivation: 现有统计准则（如AIC、BIC）依赖强假设，而交叉验证仅需i.i.d.假设，适用于更广泛的预测问题，但此前主要用于回归，本文将其扩展到SVM分类。
ai.method: 将特征选择问题建模为双层混合整数优化，利用最小二乘支持向量机（LS-SVM）的最优性条件闭式解，转化为单层混合整数优化问题，用标准优化软件求解。
ai.result: 仿真实验表明，该方法在分类准确率和特征选择准确率上优于L1正则化、递归特征消除和基于统计准则的混合整数优化方法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种基于交叉验证的SVM特征选择框架，可提升分类模型的可解释性和泛化能力。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将交叉验证准则与深度学习模型结合，实现端到端的特征选择。
idea_spark.risk: LS-SVM的闭式解依赖特定模型结构，对非线性SVM或深度模型可能不适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 交叉验证作为模型选择准则，其优化框架可启发其他模型选择问题（如超参数调优）的精确求解方法。

zh.help_to_user: 提供了一种基于交叉验证的SVM特征选择框架，可提升分类模型的可解释性和泛化能力。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将交叉验证准则与深度学习模型结合，实现端到端的特征选择。
idea_spark.risk: LS-SVM的闭式解依赖特定模型结构，对非线性SVM或深度模型可能不适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 交叉验证作为模型选择准则，其优化框架可启发其他模型选择问题（如超参数调优）的精确求解方法。

en.tldr: Proposes a cross-validation-based optimal feature subset selection method for linear SVM, transforming the bilevel mixed-integer optimization into a single-level problem using LS-SVM.
en.motivation: Statistical criteria like AIC and BIC rely on strong assumptions, while cross-validation only requires i.i.d. assumption, making it more widely applicable; this work extends its use from regression to SVM classification.
en.method: Formulates feature selection as a bilevel mixed-integer optimization, leverages the closed-form optimality conditions of Least Squares SVM to reduce it to a single-level mixed-integer problem solvable by standard optimization software.
en.result: Simulation experiments show the proposed framework outperforms L1-regularization, recursive feature elimination, and MIO based on statistical criteria in both classification accuracy and feature selection accuracy.
en.help_to_user: Provides a cross-validation-based feature selection framework for SVMs, enhancing model interpretability and generalization.

idea_spark.idea: Explore integrating cross-validation criterion with deep learning for end-to-end feature selection.
idea_spark.risk: The closed-form solution relies on LS-SVM's specific structure and may not apply to nonlinear SVMs or deep models.
idea_spark.inspiration: Cross-validation as a model selection criterion inspires exact optimization approaches for other selection problems, such as hyperparameter tuning.

papers.title: Robust Capacity Expansion under Wildfire Ignition Risk and High Renewable Penetration
papers.summary: In power systems, the risk of wildfire ignition has increased significantly in recent years. The impact and severity of these events on energy dispatch, as well as their societal ramifications, make wildfire prevention critical for power system planning and operation. A common intervention by system operators is to de-energize transmission lines to mitigate the risk of fire caused by equipment failures. With the growing integration of variable renewable generation, managing and preparing the system to de-energization under wildfire risk has become even more challenging. In this context, mitigation decisions such as installing battery energy storage systems and undergrounding transmission lines can reduce the risk and adverse effects associated with de-energization and renewable generation variability. This paper presents a robust optimization model to determine the optimal location of battery storage and undergrounding of transmission line investment, utilizing representative weeks and uncertainty sets to capture the temporal relationship of uncertain variables. Specifically, this paper addresses: (i) the worst-case realization of ignition risk leading to the de-energization of transmission lines, combined with the worst-case realization of renewable energy availability, and (ii) the optimal investment decisions for energy storage capacity and undergrounding of transmission lines that are exposed to ignition risk. The proposed model is formulated as a mixed-integer linear programming (MILP) problem, employing duality theory and binary decomposition to address nonlinearities, and is solved using a column-and-constraint generation algorithm. The proposed framework is evaluated on a model of the San Diego power system, demonstrating its practical effectiveness in improving the resilience to wildfire risk.

ai.tldr: 提出一种鲁棒优化模型，在考虑野火引燃风险和可再生能源高渗透的情况下，确定电池储能和输电线路地下化的最优投资位置。
ai.motivation: 野火引燃风险对电力系统调度影响显著，运营商常通过停运线路来降低风险，但高比例可再生能源并网使系统管理更加困难。
ai.method: 构建混合整数线性规划模型，利用代表性周和不确定性集合捕捉时序关系，采用对偶理论和二元分解处理非线性，通过列与约束生成算法求解。
ai.result: 在圣地亚哥电力系统模型上验证，表明该方法能有效提升系统对野火风险的韧性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助电力系统规划者制定储能和线路地下化投资决策，以应对野火引燃和可再生能源波动带来的不确定性。

idea_spark.idea: 将野火引燃风险与可再生能源不确定性联合建模，通过最坏场景分析指导投资。
idea_spark.risk: 模型依赖代表性周和不确定性集合的选取，可能无法覆盖所有极端场景。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合对偶理论和列生成算法处理大规模混合整数规划，为复杂系统优化提供高效求解思路。

en.tldr: A robust optimization model is proposed to determine optimal investments in battery storage and undergrounding transmission lines under wildfire ignition risk and high renewable penetration.
en.motivation: Wildfire ignition risk significantly impacts power system operations, and de-energizing lines is a common mitigation, but high renewable penetration complicates system management.
en.method: A mixed-integer linear programming model is formulated using representative weeks and uncertainty sets, with duality theory and binary decomposition to handle nonlinearities, solved via column-and-constraint generation.
en.result: Evaluated on the San Diego power system model, demonstrating practical effectiveness in improving resilience to wildfire risk.
en.help_to_user: Assists power system planners in making investment decisions for storage and undergrounding to mitigate wildfire and renewable variability uncertainties.

idea_spark.idea: Jointly model wildfire ignition risk and renewable energy uncertainty, guiding investments through worst-case scenario analysis.
idea_spark.risk: The model relies on selected representative weeks and uncertainty sets, which may not capture all extreme events.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining duality theory and column generation for large-scale MILP offers an efficient solution approach for complex system optimization.

papers.title: PAMPOS: Causal Transformer-based Trajectory Prediction for Attack-Agnostic Misbehavior Detection in V2X Networks
papers.summary: Misbehavior detection in Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) networks is a second line of defense against insider falsification attacks that cryptographic mechanisms alone cannot address. Existing learning-based Misbehavior Detection Schemes (MDSs) are supervised, requiring labeled attack samples at training time, thus failing to counter unseen falsification attacks. We present PAMPOS, a causal transformer-decoder trained on benign VeReMi++ trajectories to learn normal mobility patterns. At inference time, misbehavior is identified as a deviation from the model's next-step kinematic predictions using a top-K normalized anomaly scoring mechanism that localizes falsification to specific kinematic features, without requiring attack-labeled training data. We evaluate PAMPOS across all 19 attack types in VeReMi++ under rush-hour and afternoon scenarios, achieving Area Under the Curve (AUC) values of up to 0.98 and F1-scores of up to 0.95 for most attack categories.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于因果Transformer的轨迹预测方法PAMPOS，用于V2X网络中无需攻击标签的异常行为检测。
ai.motivation: 现有基于学习的误行为检测方案需要攻击样本进行监督训练，无法检测未知伪造攻击。
ai.method: 使用因果Transformer解码器在良性轨迹数据上训练，学习正常移动模式；推理时通过top-K归一化异常评分识别偏离预测的误行为。
ai.result: 在VeReMi++的19种攻击类型上，AUC最高达0.98，F1分数最高达0.95。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需攻击标签即可检测V2X网络中未知伪造攻击的实用方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用因果Transformer的序列预测能力，结合归一化异常评分实现攻击无关的误行为检测。
idea_spark.risk: 对高度动态或非平稳的交通模式可能产生较多误报。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将因果建模与无监督异常检测结合，减少对攻击标签的依赖。

zh.tldr: 提出一种基于因果Transformer的轨迹预测方法PAMPOS，用于V2X网络中无需攻击标签的异常行为检测。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将因果建模与无监督异常检测结合，减少对攻击标签的依赖。

en.tldr: PAMPOS uses a causal transformer-decoder trained on benign trajectories to detect misbehavior in V2X networks without attack labels.
en.motivation: Existing supervised MDSs fail against unseen falsification attacks due to reliance on labeled attack samples.
en.method: A causal transformer-decoder learns normal mobility patterns from benign data; at inference, a top-K normalized anomaly score flags deviations in kinematic predictions.
en.result: Achieves AUC up to 0.98 and F1 up to 0.95 across 19 attack types in VeReMi++.
en.help_to_user: Offers an attack-agnostic misbehavior detection method for V2X networks without requiring attack-labeled training data.

idea_spark.idea: Combine causal sequence prediction with normalized anomaly scoring for attack-agnostic misbehavior detection.
idea_spark.risk: May produce false positives in highly dynamic or non-stationary traffic patterns.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage causal modeling and unsupervised anomaly detection to reduce dependence on attack labels.

papers.title: From Pixels to Primitives: Scene Change Detection in 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.summary: Scene change detection methods built on Gaussian splatting universally follow a render-then-compare paradigm: the pre-change scene is rendered into 2D and compared against post-change images via pixel or feature residuals. This change detection problem with Gaussian Splatting has been treated as a question about pixels; we treat it as a question about primitives. We provide direct evidence that native primitive attributes alone -- position, anisotropic covariance, and color -- carry sufficient signal for scene change detection. What makes primitive-space comparison hard is the under-constrained nature of Gaussian splatting representation: independent optimizations yield primitive solutions whose count, positions, shapes, and colors differ even where nothing has changed. We address this challenge with anisotropic models of geometric and photometric drift, complemented by a per-primitive observability term that reflects the extent to which each Gaussian is constrained by the camera geometry. Operating directly on primitives gives our method, GD-DIFF, two properties that distinguish it from render-then-compare methods. First, change maps are multi-view consistent by construction, where prior work had to learn this through an additional optimization objective. Second, geometric and appearance changes are scored separately, identifying not just where but what kind of change occurred, distinguishing structural changes (e.g., an added object) from surface-level ones (e.g., a color change) without supervision or external model dependencies. On real-world benchmarks, GS-DIFF surpasses the prior state-of-the-art approach by approximatelt 17% in mean Intersection over Union.

ai.tldr: 提出一种直接在3D高斯原语空间中进行场景变化检测的方法，无需渲染到2D再比较。
ai.motivation: 现有基于高斯泼溅的变化检测方法都采用“渲染-比较”范式，将问题简化为像素级比较，忽略了原语本身携带的丰富信息。
ai.method: 利用高斯原语的固有属性（位置、各向异性协方差、颜色）直接比较，并引入各向异性几何与光度漂移模型以及每个原语的可观测性项来应对表示的不确定性。
ai.result: 在真实基准上，GS-DIFF相比先前最优方法平均交并比提升约17%，且变化图天然多视角一致，能区分结构变化与表面变化。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需额外监督或外部模型即可直接检测3D场景变化并区分变化类型的方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用各向异性漂移模型和可观测性项，可进一步设计自适应的原语融合或剪枝策略，提升变化检测的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 原语空间比较对初始优化质量敏感，若原语分布差异过大可能导致误检。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从“像素”到“原语”的视角转换启发我们重新审视其他3D任务（如场景补全、动态建模）中是否也存在类似的表示冗余与直接比较潜力。

idea_spark.risk: 原语空间比较对初始优化质量敏感，若原语分布差异过大可能导致误检。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从“像素”到“原语”的视角转换启发我们重新审视其他3D任务（如场景补全、动态建模）中是否也存在类似的表示冗余与直接比较潜力。

en.tldr: Proposes a method for scene change detection directly in 3D Gaussian primitive space, bypassing the render-then-compare paradigm.
en.motivation: Existing Gaussian splatting change detection methods universally adopt a render-then-compare paradigm, reducing the problem to pixel-level comparison and ignoring the rich information carried by primitives themselves.
en.method: Directly compares native primitive attributes (position, anisotropic covariance, color) and introduces anisotropic models of geometric and photometric drift along with a per-primitive observability term to handle representation ambiguity.
en.result: On real-world benchmarks, GS-DIFF surpasses the prior state-of-the-art by approximately 17% in mean IoU, with change maps that are naturally multi-view consistent and can distinguish structural from surface changes.
en.help_to_user: Provides a method to directly detect 3D scene changes and differentiate change types without additional supervision or external models.

idea_spark.idea: The anisotropic drift models and observability term could be leveraged to design adaptive primitive merging or pruning strategies for more robust change detection.
idea_spark.risk: Primitive-space comparison is sensitive to the quality of initial optimization; large discrepancies in primitive distributions may cause false detections.
idea_spark.inspiration: The shift from 'pixels' to 'primitives' inspires rethinking other 3D tasks (e.g., scene completion, dynamic modeling) for similar representation redundancy and direct comparison potential.

papers.title: LENS: Low-Frequency Eigen Noise Shaping for Efficient Diffusion Sampling
papers.summary: Distilled diffusion models accelerate image generation by reducing the number of denoising steps, but often suffer from degraded image quality. To mitigate this trade-off, test-time optimization methods improve quality, yet their iterative nature incurs substantial computational overhead and leads to slow inference, limiting practical usability. Recent hypernetwork-based approaches amortize this process during training, but still require costly noise modulation in high-dimensional latent spaces. In this work, we propose LENS (Low-frequency Eigen Noise Shaping), an efficient noise modulation framework that operates in a low-dimensional subspace. Our approach is motivated by the observation that low-frequency components of the noise largely determine the global structure and visual fidelity of generated images. Based on this observation, we provide a theoretical justification for restricting modulation to the low-frequency subspace and derive a principled training objective. Building on this, LENS employs a lightweight, standalone network to selectively modulate these components, enabling efficient and targeted noise modulation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LENS achieves competitive image quality while reducing FLOPs by 400-700$\times$, model parameters by 25-75$\times$, and inference-time overhead by 10-20$\times$ compared to prior methods.

ai.tldr: 提出LENS框架，在低维子空间中对噪声低频分量进行调制，大幅降低计算开销同时保持图像质量。
ai.motivation: 蒸馏扩散模型加速生成但质量下降，现有测试时优化或超网络方法计算成本高，需要更高效的噪声调制方案。
ai.method: 基于低频噪声决定全局结构的观察，将调制限制在低维子空间，设计轻量独立网络选择性调制低频分量。
ai.result: 相比先前方法，FLOPs降低400-700倍，参数量减少25-75倍，推理开销降低10-20倍，图像质量具有竞争力。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效扩散采样方法，适合资源受限场景下的图像生成任务。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将低频噪声调制与条件控制结合，实现更精细的生成引导。
idea_spark.risk: 低频假设可能不适用于细节敏感任务（如医学图像），需验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受信号处理中低通滤波启发，将噪声分解为频率分量并针对性优化。

en.tldr: Proposes LENS, a framework that modulates low-frequency noise components in a low-dimensional subspace, drastically reducing computational cost while maintaining image quality.
en.motivation: Distilled diffusion models accelerate generation but degrade quality; existing test-time optimization or hypernetwork methods incur high computational cost, necessitating more efficient noise modulation.
en.method: Based on the observation that low-frequency noise determines global structure, restricts modulation to a low-dimensional subspace and uses a lightweight standalone network to selectively modulate these components.
en.result: Compared to prior methods, reduces FLOPs by 400-700×, parameters by 25-75×, and inference overhead by 10-20× while achieving competitive image quality.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient diffusion sampling method suitable for resource-constrained image generation tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining low-frequency noise modulation with conditional control for finer generation guidance.
idea_spark.risk: The low-frequency assumption may not hold for detail-sensitive tasks (e.g., medical images); generalization needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by low-pass filtering in signal processing, decomposes noise into frequency components and optimizes selectively.

papers.title: Reformulating KV Cache Eviction Problem for Long-Context LLM Inference
papers.summary: Large language models (LLMs) support long-context inference but suffer from substantial memory and runtime overhead due to Key-Value (KV) Cache growth. Existing KV Cache eviction methods primarily rely on local attention weights, neglecting the influence of value representations, output projection, and inter-head interactions. In this work, we reformulate KV Cache eviction from a conventional head-wise, weight-averaging approach into an output-aware, layer-wise matrix multiplication approximation problem. We introduce LaProx, a novel eviction strategy that explicitly models the multiplicative interaction between attention maps and projected value states to accurately quantify token contributions while accounting for inter-head dependencies. Building on this metric, we propose the first unified eviction strategy that assigns globally comparable importance scores to tokens, enabling model-wide selection instead of local, head-wise decisions. Experimental results across 19 datasets on long-context benchmarks LongBench and Needle-In-A-Haystack demonstrate that our approach maintains model performance with only 5\% of the KV cache and consistently outperforms prior works across all configurations. Notably, our method achieves up to 2$\times$ accuracy loss reduction under extreme compression scenarios compared to existing state-of-the-art baselines with minimal overhead.

ai.tldr: 提出将KV缓存淘汰问题重新表述为输出感知的层间矩阵乘法近似问题，并设计LaProx策略，在仅保留5%缓存时仍保持模型性能。
ai.motivation: 现有KV缓存淘汰方法依赖局部注意力权重，忽略值表示、输出投影和跨头交互的影响，导致长上下文推理中内存和计算开销大。
ai.method: 将逐头权重平均方法重新表述为输出感知的层间矩阵乘法近似，显式建模注意力图与投影值状态的乘法交互，并引入全局可比较的重要性分数实现模型级选择。
ai.result: 在19个数据集上，仅用5%缓存保持性能，极端压缩下精度损失减少2倍，优于现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过全局重要性评分和跨头依赖建模，在长上下文LLM推理中高效压缩KV缓存。

idea_spark.idea: 将注意力图与值投影的交互显式建模为矩阵乘法，可能启发更精确的token贡献量化方法。
idea_spark.risk: 全局重要性评分可能引入额外计算开销，需验证在超长序列中的实时性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从层间矩阵乘法近似角度重新定义缓存淘汰，为注意力机制优化提供新视角。

en.tldr: Reformulates KV cache eviction as an output-aware layer-wise matrix multiplication approximation problem, introducing LaProx that maintains performance with only 5% cache.
en.motivation: Existing eviction methods rely on local attention weights, ignoring value representations, output projection, and inter-head interactions, causing high memory and runtime overhead in long-context inference.
en.method: Reformulates head-wise weight-averaging into output-aware layer-wise matrix multiplication approximation, explicitly models multiplicative interaction between attention maps and projected value states, and assigns globally comparable importance scores for model-wide selection.
en.result: Maintains performance with only 5% KV cache across 19 datasets, reduces accuracy loss by 2× under extreme compression, outperforming prior works.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how global importance scoring and inter-head dependency modeling enable efficient KV cache compression for long-context LLM inference.

idea_spark.idea: Explicitly modeling the interaction between attention maps and value projections as matrix multiplication may inspire more precise token contribution quantification methods.
idea_spark.risk: Global importance scoring may introduce additional computational overhead; real-time performance on ultra-long sequences needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Reformulating cache eviction from a layer-wise matrix multiplication approximation perspective offers a new angle for attention mechanism optimization.

papers.title: Can Agents Price a Reaction? Evaluating LLMs on Chemical Cost Reasoning
papers.summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have become increasingly capable as tool-using agents, with benchmarks spanning diverse general agentic tasks. Yet rigorous evaluation of scientific tool use remains limited. In chemistry, recent agents can plan syntheses and invoke domain-specific tools, but evaluations often rely on curated demonstrations, expert assessment, or LLM-as-judge scoring rather than exact, judge-free ground truth. We address this gap with chemical procurement cost estimation, a practical task in which an agent must ground chemical identities, retrieve supplier quotes, select valid purchasable packs, normalize quantities, and compute cost from a reaction description. We introduce ChemCost, a benchmark of 1,427 evaluable reactions grounded to a frozen pricing snapshot covering 2,261 chemicals and 230,775 supplier quotes, supporting scalar scoring and stage-level diagnosis of grounding, retrieval, procurement, and arithmetic failures. To evaluate robustness, we further construct controlled noise-injected views that perturb chemical aliases, quantity expressions, missing fields, and input formatting. Experiments with frontier, open-weight, and chemistry-specialized LLM agents show that tool access is necessary but insufficient for solving the task. The strongest agents reach only 50.6% accuracy within 25% relative error on clean inputs and degrade substantially with realistic noise. Stage-level analysis further shows that failures arise from brittle parsing, ineffective evidence integration, invalid pack selection, and non-convergent tool use.

ai.tldr: 提出了ChemCost基准，评估LLM代理在化学采购成本推理中的表现，发现工具访问必要但不足，最强代理准确率仅50.6%。
ai.motivation: 现有科学工具使用评估缺乏精确的、无裁判的ground truth，化学成本估算任务提供了可量化的评估场景。
ai.method: 构建包含1427个可评估反应的ChemCost基准，冻结定价快照，设计噪声注入视图，评估多种LLM代理。
ai.result: 最强代理在干净输入上准确率仅50.6%，面对噪声显著下降；失败源于解析脆弱、证据整合不足、包装选择无效和工具使用不收敛。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解LLM在化学成本推理中的能力边界和失败模式，指导更鲁棒的代理设计。

idea_spark.idea: 结合结构化解析与多步推理，设计自适应噪声处理模块，提升代理在真实场景中的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 过度依赖冻结快照可能忽略动态定价变化，需定期更新基准。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从失败模式（如包装选择无效）出发，可探索强化学习优化工具调用策略。

en.tldr: Proposes ChemCost benchmark to evaluate LLM agents on chemical procurement cost reasoning, finding tool access necessary but insufficient, with best agent achieving only 50.6% accuracy.
en.motivation: Existing evaluations of scientific tool use lack precise, judge-free ground truth; chemical cost estimation offers a quantifiable evaluation scenario.
en.method: Constructs ChemCost benchmark with 1,427 evaluable reactions, frozen pricing snapshot, noise-injected views, and evaluates various LLM agents.
en.result: Best agent achieves only 50.6% accuracy on clean inputs, degrades significantly with noise; failures stem from brittle parsing, poor evidence integration, invalid pack selection, and non-convergent tool use.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand LLM capabilities and failure modes in chemical cost reasoning, guiding more robust agent design.

idea_spark.idea: Combine structured parsing with multi-step reasoning and adaptive noise handling to improve agent robustness in real-world scenarios.
idea_spark.risk: Over-reliance on frozen snapshot may ignore dynamic pricing changes; benchmark needs periodic updates.
idea_spark.inspiration: From failure modes (e.g., invalid pack selection), explore reinforcement learning to optimize tool invocation strategies.

papers.title: The number and structure of connected graphs with a fixed degree sequence
papers.summary: We study connected graphs with a fixed degree sequence, in the sparse setting where the number of edges grows linearly in the number of vertices. Using the relation to the configuration model, we identify the number of such connected graphs up to the exponential order. We do this by viewing a connected graph with a given degree distribution as the realization of the giant component in a larger configuration model, and carefully choosing the degree distribution of the larger graph so that it is likely that its giant component has the required degree distribution. To ensure that the connected graph has exactly the correct degrees, we use a switching argument. Additionally, we obtain results on rare event probabilities and describe the local structure of a uniform connected graph with a fixed degree sequence.

ai.tldr: 研究了稀疏条件下固定度序列连通图的数量和结构，利用配置模型和巨分量方法得到了指数阶计数，并分析了稀有事件概率和局部结构。
ai.motivation: 理解固定度序列连通图的数量和结构是图论和网络科学的基础问题，但现有结果多限于可交换图或特定度序列，缺乏一般稀疏情形下的精确指数阶估计。
ai.method: 将连通图视为更大配置模型中的巨分量，通过巧妙选择度分布使巨分量具有目标度序列，并利用交换论证确保度数精确匹配。
ai.result: 得到了稀疏固定度序列连通图数量的指数阶表达式，以及稀有事件概率和均匀随机连通图的局部结构描述。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种分析固定度序列连通图计数和结构的系统方法，可用于网络可靠性、图采样等应用。

idea_spark.idea: 利用交换论证和巨分量框架，可进一步研究固定度序列连通图的典型直径、相变行为等性质。
idea_spark.risk: 交换论证的适用性依赖于度序列的稀疏性和连通性条件，对稠密图或高度异质度序列可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受配置模型和随机图巨分量理论的启发，将局部约束（固定度序列）与全局结构（连通性）通过嵌入思想统一处理。

en.tldr: We study the number and structure of connected graphs with a fixed degree sequence in the sparse regime, using the configuration model and giant component approach to obtain exponential-order counts, rare event probabilities, and local structure.
en.motivation: Understanding the count and structure of connected graphs with a prescribed degree sequence is fundamental in graph theory and network science, but existing results are limited to exchangeable graphs or specific sequences, lacking precise exponential-order estimates for the general sparse case.
en.method: We view a connected graph as the giant component of a larger configuration model, carefully choose the degree distribution of the larger graph so that its giant component has the target degree sequence, and use a switching argument to ensure exact degrees.
en.result: We obtain the exponential-order count of sparse connected graphs with a fixed degree sequence, along with rare event probabilities and the local structure of a uniformly random such graph.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic method for counting and characterizing connected graphs with prescribed degrees, applicable to network reliability, graph sampling, and related problems.

idea_spark.idea: Using the switching argument and giant component framework, one can further study typical diameters, phase transitions, and other properties of connected graphs with fixed degree sequences.
idea_spark.risk: The switching argument relies on sparsity and connectivity conditions; it may fail for dense graphs or highly heterogeneous degree sequences.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the configuration model and the theory of giant components in random graphs, we unify local constraints (fixed degree sequence) with global structure (connectivity) via an embedding approach.

papers.title: Virasoro extensions for diffeomorphisms with breaks
papers.summary: We study homeomorphisms of the circle that are smooth diffeomorphisms away from a finite set of $n$ points. These "broken diffeomorphisms" do not form a Lie group, but instead naturally assemble into a Lie groupoid. We construct an explicit nontrivial $n$-dimensional central extension of this groupoid, which restricts to the classical Virasoro group when confined to smooth diffeomorphisms. We further describe the associated "broken Virasoro" algebroid, defined as a nontrivial $n$-dimensional central extension of the Lie algebroid of vector fields on the circle that are smooth except at $n$ points. This construction generalizes the Virasoro algebra.   As a byproduct, we analyze a related setting on an interval: we construct a nontrivial central extension of the Lie algebra of vector fields vanishing at the endpoints, together with the corresponding central extension of the group of diffeomorphisms fixing the endpoints. We also describe the associated Lie algebroid and groupoid obtained by allowing the endpoints to vary.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了在有限个点处有间断的圆同胚，构造了其非平凡的n维中心扩张，推广了Virasoro代数。
ai.motivation: 经典Virasoro代数是微分同胚群的中心扩张，但实际物理和数学问题中常遇到仅在有限个点处光滑的“间断微分同胚”，它们不构成李群而构成李群胚，需要建立相应的中心扩张理论。
ai.method: 通过构造显式的n维中心扩张，将Virasoro群推广到间断微分同胚群胚；同时分析区间上端点固定的向量场和微分同胚的类似构造。
ai.result: 得到了间断微分同胚群胚的非平凡n维中心扩张（间断Virasoro群胚）及其对应的李代数胚（间断Virasoro代数胚），以及区间情形的中心扩张。
ai.help_to_user: 该工作为处理带有奇点或间断的对称性系统提供了代数框架，可用于可积系统、共形场论等领域的推广。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将间断点视为动态变量，研究其运动方程与Virasoro中心荷的相互作用。
idea_spark.risk: 间断点集合的拓扑变化可能导致中心扩张的退化或非平凡性改变，需要仔细分析。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受量子场论中边界条件或缺陷的启发，将间断点视为可移动的缺陷，探索其代数结构。

zh.tldr: 本文研究了在有限个点处有间断的圆同胚，构造了其非平凡的n维中心扩张，推广了Virasoro代数。
zh.motivation: 经典Virasoro代数是微分同胚群的中心扩张，但实际物理和数学问题中常遇到仅在有限个点处光滑的“间断微分同胚”，它们不构成李群而构成李群胚，需要建立相应的中心扩张理论。
zh.method: 通过构造显式的n维中心扩张，将Virasoro群推广到间断微分同胚群胚；同时分析区间上端点固定的向量场和微分同胚的类似构造。
zh.result: 得到了间断微分同胚群胚的非平凡n维中心扩张（间断Virasoro群胚）及其对应的李代数胚（间断Virasoro代数胚），以及区间情形的中心扩张。
zh.help_to_user: 该工作为处理带有奇点或间断的对称性系统提供了代数框架，可用于可积系统、共形场论等领域的推广。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将间断点视为动态变量，研究其运动方程与Virasoro中心荷的相互作用。
idea_spark.risk: 间断点集合的拓扑变化可能导致中心扩张的退化或非平凡性改变，需要仔细分析。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受量子场论中边界条件或缺陷的启发，将间断点视为可移动的缺陷，探索其代数结构。

en.tldr: This paper studies circle homeomorphisms that are smooth except at a finite set of n points, constructs a nontrivial n-dimensional central extension of the resulting Lie groupoid, generalizing the Virasoro algebra.
en.motivation: The classical Virasoro algebra is a central extension of the diffeomorphism group, but many physical and mathematical problems involve 'broken diffeomorphisms' that are smooth only at finitely many points; these form a Lie groupoid rather than a Lie group, requiring a corresponding central extension theory.
en.method: By constructing an explicit n-dimensional central extension, the Virasoro group is generalized to the groupoid of broken diffeomorphisms; analogous constructions are also analyzed for vector fields and diffeomorphisms on an interval with fixed endpoints.
en.result: A nontrivial n-dimensional central extension of the broken diffeomorphism groupoid (broken Virasoro groupoid) and its associated Lie algebroid (broken Virasoro algebroid) are obtained, along with central extensions for the interval case.
en.help_to_user: This work provides an algebraic framework for systems with singularities or breaks, useful for generalizations in integrable systems, conformal field theory, and related areas.

idea_spark.idea: Consider treating the break points as dynamical variables and study their equations of motion and interaction with the Virasoro central charge.
idea_spark.risk: Topological changes in the set of break points may cause degeneracy or nontriviality changes in the central extension, requiring careful analysis.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by boundaries or defects in quantum field theory, treat break points as movable defects and explore their algebraic structure.

papers.title: Flow-OPD: On-Policy Distillation for Flow Matching Models
papers.summary: Existing Flow Matching (FM) text-to-image models suffer from two critical bottlenecks under multi-task alignment: the reward sparsity induced by scalar-valued rewards, and the gradient interference arising from jointly optimizing heterogeneous objectives, which together give rise to a 'seesaw effect' of competing metrics and pervasive reward hacking. Inspired by the success of On-Policy Distillation (OPD) in the large language model community, we propose Flow-OPD, the first unified post-training framework that integrates on-policy distillation into Flow Matching models. Flow-OPD adopts a two-stage alignment strategy: it first cultivates domain-specialized teacher models via single-reward GRPO fine-tuning, allowing each expert to reach its performance ceiling in isolation; it then establishes a robust initial policy through a Flow-based Cold-Start scheme and seamlessly consolidates heterogeneous expertise into a single student via a three-step orchestration of on-policy sampling, task-routing labeling, and dense trajectory-level supervision. We further introduce Manifold Anchor Regularization (MAR), which leverages a task-agnostic teacher to provide full-data supervision that anchors generation to a high-quality manifold, effectively mitigating the aesthetic degradation commonly observed in purely RL-driven alignment. Built upon Stable Diffusion 3.5 Medium, Flow-OPD raises the GenEval score from 63 to 92 and the OCR accuracy from 59 to 94, yielding an overall improvement of roughly 10 points over vanilla GRPO, while preserving image fidelity and human-preference alignment and exhibiting an emergent 'teacher-surpassing' effect. These results establish Flow-OPD as a scalable alignment paradigm for building generalist text-to-image models.

ai.tldr: 提出Flow-OPD，首个将在线策略蒸馏集成到流匹配模型中的统一后训练框架，通过两阶段对齐策略和流式冷启动方案，显著提升文本到图像生成的多任务对齐性能。
ai.motivation: 现有流匹配文本到图像模型在多任务对齐中面临奖励稀疏和梯度干扰导致的跷跷板效应和奖励黑客问题。
ai.method: 采用两阶段对齐：先通过单奖励GRPO微调培养领域专家教师模型，再通过流式冷启动建立初始策略，并利用在线策略采样、任务路由标注和密集轨迹级监督三步整合异构专家知识；引入流形锚点正则化提供全数据监督。
ai.result: 基于SD3.5 Medium，GenEval从63提升至92，OCR准确率从59提升至94，整体比原始GRPO提升约10点，同时保持图像保真度和人类偏好对齐，并出现超越教师的效果。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过在线策略蒸馏和流形正则化解决多任务对齐中的竞争指标和奖励黑客问题。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将在线策略蒸馏与扩散模型结合，用于多模态对齐任务（如文本到视频、文本到3D）。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖多个专家教师模型，训练成本高；流式冷启动方案可能对超参数敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从大语言模型的在线策略蒸馏成功中借鉴，将其适配到连续生成模型（流匹配）中，并引入流形正则化避免美学退化。

en.tldr: Proposes Flow-OPD, the first unified post-training framework integrating on-policy distillation into Flow Matching models, using a two-stage alignment strategy and a Flow-based Cold-Start scheme to significantly improve multi-task alignment for text-to-image generation.
en.motivation: Existing Flow Matching text-to-image models suffer from reward sparsity and gradient interference in multi-task alignment, leading to a seesaw effect and reward hacking.
en.method: Adopts a two-stage alignment: first cultivates domain-specialized teacher models via single-reward GRPO fine-tuning, then establishes a robust initial policy via Flow-based Cold-Start and consolidates heterogeneous expertise through on-policy sampling, task-routing labeling, and dense trajectory-level supervision; introduces Manifold Anchor Regularization for full-data supervision.
en.result: Based on SD3.5 Medium, GenEval improves from 63 to 92, OCR accuracy from 59 to 94, overall ~10 points over vanilla GRPO, while preserving fidelity and human-preference alignment, exhibiting a teacher-surpassing effect.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how on-policy distillation and manifold regularization address competing metrics and reward hacking in multi-task alignment.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining on-policy distillation with diffusion models for multimodal alignment tasks (e.g., text-to-video, text-to-3D).
idea_spark.risk: Relies on multiple expert teachers, increasing training cost; Flow-based Cold-Start may be sensitive to hyperparameters.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrows from the success of on-policy distillation in LLMs, adapts it to continuous generative models (flow matching), and introduces manifold regularization to avoid aesthetic degradation.

papers.title: Nonnegativity of the second largest eigenvalue of $4 \times 4$ tridiagonal stochastic matrices
papers.summary: The spectral study of nonnegative and more specifically stochastic matrices is an important topic in matrix theory. In this paper, we prove a conjecture, formulated by Ran and Teng, which states that the second largest eigenvalue of an irreducible $4\times4$ tridiagonal stochastic matrix is nonnegative. We establish this conjecture and extend the result to arbitrary $4\times4$ tridiagonal stochastic matrices, including both irreducible and reducible cases.

ai.tldr: 证明了4×4三对角随机矩阵的第二大特征值非负的猜想，并推广到所有此类矩阵。
ai.motivation: Ran和Teng提出的猜想认为不可约4×4三对角随机矩阵的第二大特征值非负，本文旨在证明该猜想。
ai.method: 通过矩阵理论分析，分别处理不可约和可约情形，证明特征值非负性。
ai.result: 成功证明猜想，并将结果扩展到所有4×4三对角随机矩阵。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解低维随机矩阵的谱性质，为相关理论提供基础。

idea_spark.idea: 利用矩阵分解或特征多项式根的性质来证明特征值非负。
idea_spark.risk: 高维情形可能缺乏类似的结构约束，导致证明失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从低维特例出发，探索随机矩阵谱非负的通用条件。

zh.tldr: 证明了4×4三对角随机矩阵的第二大特征值非负的猜想，并推广到所有此类矩阵。
zh.motivation: Ran和Teng提出的猜想认为不可约4×4三对角随机矩阵的第二大特征值非负，本文旨在证明该猜想。

en.tldr: Proves the conjecture that the second largest eigenvalue of 4×4 tridiagonal stochastic matrices is nonnegative, extending to all such matrices.
en.motivation: To prove the conjecture by Ran and Teng regarding the nonnegativity of the second largest eigenvalue for irreducible 4×4 tridiagonal stochastic matrices.
en.method: Matrix-theoretic analysis covering both irreducible and reducible cases to establish eigenvalue nonnegativity.
en.result: Conjecture proven and result extended to all 4×4 tridiagonal stochastic matrices.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into spectral properties of low-dimensional stochastic matrices, foundational for related theory.

idea_spark.idea: Use matrix decomposition or properties of characteristic polynomial roots to prove eigenvalue nonnegativity.
idea_spark.risk: Higher dimensions may lack similar structural constraints, causing the proof to fail.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explore general conditions for spectral nonnegativity in stochastic matrices starting from low-dimensional cases.

papers.title: The Free Boundary in a Higher-Dimensional Long-Range Segregation Model
papers.summary: We consider a system of elliptic equations, depending on a small parameter $\eps$, that models long-range segregation of populations. The diffusion is governed by the Laplacian. This system was previously investigated by Caffarelli, Patrizi, and Quitalo in \cite{CL2} as a model in population dynamics, and they established the regularity of the free boundary in two dimensions. In this paper we study the free boundary in the higher dimensional case. We extend the concept of angles and asymptotic cones to higher dimensions, and give a characterization of regular and singular points in terms of their densities and angles. We obtain a structure result of the free boundary and show that, if the angles at the singular points are away from $\frac{nω_n}{2}$, the regular set is open in the free boundary and locally a $C^1$ manifold of dimension $n-1$. We also show that, if the supports of the populations are convex, they are convex polytopes. A weak form of the equality of angles for the convex configuration is also derived.

ai.tldr: 研究高维长程隔离模型中自由边界的正则性，将角度和渐近锥概念推广到高维，刻画正则点和奇异点，证明正则集是开集且为C^1流形，并得到凸支撑下种群区域为凸多面体。
ai.motivation: 先前工作仅处理二维情形，本文旨在将自由边界正则性理论推广到任意高维。
ai.method: 引入高维角度和渐近锥定义，通过密度和角度分类正则点与奇异点，结合几何测度论和椭圆方程估计。
ai.result: 正则点在自由边界中构成开集且局部为C^1流形；若奇异点角度远离nω_n/2，则正则集开；凸支撑下种群区域为凸多面体，并推导出弱形式的角相等关系。
ai.help_to_user: 为高维隔离模型提供自由边界结构理论，可用于种群动力学或材料科学中的相分离问题。

idea_spark.idea: 利用凸支撑假设将自由边界问题转化为凸多面体分类，可能简化高维正则性证明。
idea_spark.risk: 高维奇异点分类可能依赖特定角度条件，一般情形下正则性可能更复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合凸几何与自由边界理论，启发设计数值算法追踪高维隔离界面。

zh.tldr: 研究高维长程隔离模型中自由边界的正则性，将角度和渐近锥概念推广到高维，刻画正则点和奇异点，证明正则集是开集且为C^1流形，并得到凸支撑下种群区域为凸多面体。

en.tldr: We study the free boundary in a higher-dimensional long-range segregation model, extend angles and asymptotic cones to higher dimensions, characterize regular and singular points, prove the regular set is open and a C^1 manifold, and show that convex supports yield convex polytopes.
en.motivation: Previous work only covered two dimensions; this paper generalizes free boundary regularity to arbitrary higher dimensions.
en.method: Introduce higher-dimensional angles and asymptotic cones, classify points by density and angle, and use geometric measure theory and elliptic estimates.
en.result: Regular points form an open subset of the free boundary and are locally C^1 manifolds; if singular point angles are away from nω_n/2, the regular set is open; convex supports imply the populations are convex polytopes, with a weak equality of angles.
en.help_to_user: Provides free boundary structure theory for higher-dimensional segregation models, applicable to population dynamics or phase separation in materials science.

idea_spark.idea: Using convex support assumptions reduces the free boundary problem to classification of convex polytopes, potentially simplifying regularity proofs in higher dimensions.
idea_spark.risk: Classification of singular points may depend on specific angle conditions; general cases might exhibit more complex regularity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining convex geometry with free boundary theory inspires numerical algorithms for tracking high-dimensional segregation interfaces.

papers.title: Universality of the fluctuations of the free energy in generalized Sherrington-Kirkpatrick models and the log likelihood ratio in spiked Wigner models
papers.summary: We consider the fluctuations of the free energy in generalized Sherrington-Kirkpatrick models and the log likelihood ratio of spiked Wigner models in the high temperature/subcritical regime. We prove that the limiting laws of the fluctuations are Gaussian under suitable assumptions, and the result is universal in the sense that it does not depend on the distribution of the disorder or the prior except that the means and the variances of the limiting laws depend on a few parameters of the model. The proof is based on the multigraph expansion that provides a unified approach to analyze both models.

ai.tldr: 证明了广义Sherrington-Kirkpatrick模型自由能涨落和尖峰Wigner模型对数似然比在高温和亚临界区域具有普适的高斯极限分布。
ai.motivation: 理解这两类重要统计物理和随机矩阵模型中涨落的普适性规律。
ai.method: 采用多图展开方法统一分析两类模型，证明在适当假设下涨落的高斯极限与具体分布无关。
ai.result: 涨落极限分布为高斯型，其均值和方差仅依赖于少数模型参数，具有普适性。
ai.help_to_user: 为统计物理和随机矩阵理论中的涨落分析提供了统一的数学框架和普适性结论。

idea_spark.idea: 将多图展开与自由能涨落分析结合，可能用于研究更一般的随机优化或学习问题中的统计行为。
idea_spark.risk: 方法对模型假设敏感，推广时需验证条件是否满足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从物理模型涨落普适性出发，启发设计更鲁棒的统计推断算法。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从物理模型涨落普适性出发，启发设计更鲁棒的统计推断算法。

en.tldr: We prove that the fluctuations of the free energy in generalized Sherrington-Kirkpatrick models and the log likelihood ratio in spiked Wigner models have universal Gaussian limiting laws in the high temperature/subcritical regime.
en.motivation: To understand the universality of fluctuations in these two important classes of statistical physics and random matrix models.
en.method: A multigraph expansion approach is used to analyze both models in a unified way, showing that the Gaussian limit does not depend on the specific disorder distribution under suitable assumptions.
en.result: The limiting distributions are Gaussian, with mean and variance depending only on a few model parameters, demonstrating universality.
en.help_to_user: Provides a unified mathematical framework and universality results for fluctuation analysis in statistical physics and random matrix theory.

idea_spark.idea: Combining multigraph expansion with free energy fluctuation analysis may be applied to study statistical behavior in more general stochastic optimization or learning problems.
idea_spark.risk: The method is sensitive to model assumptions; generalization requires verifying conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: The universality of fluctuations in physical models inspires the design of more robust statistical inference algorithms.

papers.title: 2.5-D Decomposition for LLM-Based Spatial Construction
papers.summary: Autonomous systems that build structures from natural-language instructions need reliable spatial reasoning, yet large language models (LLMs) make systematic coordinate errors when generating three-dimensional block placements. We present a neuro-symbolic pipeline based on \emph{2.5-D decomposition}: the LLM plans in the two-dimensional horizontal plane while a deterministic executor computes all vertical placement from column occupancy, eliminating an entire class of errors. On the Build What I Mean benchmark (160 rounds), GPT-4o-mini with this pipeline achieves 94.6\% mean structural accuracy across 12 independent runs, within 3.0 percentage points of the 97.6\% ceiling imposed by architect-agent errors that no builder-side improvement can address. This outperforms both GPT-4o at 90.3\% and the best competing system at 76.3\%. A controlled ablation confirms that 2.5-D decomposition is the dominant contributor, accounting for 50.7 percentage points of accuracy. The pipeline transfers directly to edge hardware: Nemotron-3 120B running locally on an NVIDIA Jetson Thor AGX matches the cloud result at 94.5\% with no prompt modifications. The underlying principle, removing deterministic dimensions from the LLM's output space, applies to any autonomous construction or assembly task where gravity or other physical constraints fix one or more degrees of freedom. A transfer experiment on 500 IGLU collaborative building tasks confirm the effect generalizes beyond the primary benchmark.

ai.tldr: 提出2.5-D分解方法，让LLM只在二维水平面规划，由确定性执行器处理垂直放置，显著提升空间构建准确率。
ai.motivation: LLM在三维块放置中产生系统性坐标错误，需要可靠的空间推理来执行自然语言构建指令。
ai.method: 神经符号流水线：LLM负责二维水平面规划，确定性执行器根据列占用计算垂直位置，消除垂直维度错误。
ai.result: 在Build What I Mean基准上，GPT-4o-mini达到94.6%结构准确率，优于GPT-4o的90.3%和最佳竞品的76.3%；消融实验显示2.5-D分解贡献50.7个百分点。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种将确定性维度从LLM输出空间移除的通用原则，适用于受物理约束的自主构建任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将2.5-D分解与多模态感知结合，使LLM能处理更复杂的非规则物体构建。
idea_spark.risk: 过度依赖确定性执行器可能限制LLM在非标准物理环境中的适应性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类建造时先定平面再考虑高度的启发，将复杂问题分解为LLM擅长的高层规划和确定性计算。

zh.tldr: 提出2.5-D分解方法，让LLM只在二维水平面规划，由确定性执行器处理垂直放置，显著提升空间构建准确率。
zh.motivation: LLM在三维块放置中产生系统性坐标错误，需要可靠的空间推理来执行自然语言构建指令。
zh.method: 神经符号流水线：LLM负责二维水平面规划，确定性执行器根据列占用计算垂直位置，消除垂直维度错误。
zh.result: 在Build What I Mean基准上，GPT-4o-mini达到94.6%结构准确率，优于GPT-4o的90.3%和最佳竞品的76.3%；消融实验显示2.5-D分解贡献50.7个百分点。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种将确定性维度从LLM输出空间移除的通用原则，适用于受物理约束的自主构建任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将2.5-D分解与多模态感知结合，使LLM能处理更复杂的非规则物体构建。
idea_spark.risk: 过度依赖确定性执行器可能限制LLM在非标准物理环境中的适应性。

en.tldr: Proposes 2.5-D decomposition where the LLM plans only in the 2D horizontal plane and a deterministic executor handles vertical placement, significantly improving spatial construction accuracy.
en.motivation: LLMs make systematic coordinate errors in 3D block placement, requiring reliable spatial reasoning for natural-language construction instructions.
en.method: A neuro-symbolic pipeline: the LLM plans in the 2D horizontal plane while a deterministic executor computes all vertical placements from column occupancy, eliminating an entire class of errors.
en.result: On the Build What I Mean benchmark, GPT-4o-mini achieves 94.6% structural accuracy, outperforming GPT-4o at 90.3% and the best competing system at 76.3%; ablation confirms 2.5-D decomposition contributes 50.7 percentage points.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general principle of removing deterministic dimensions from the LLM's output space, applicable to any physically constrained autonomous construction task.

idea_spark.idea: Combine 2.5-D decomposition with multimodal perception to enable LLMs to handle more complex non-regular object construction.
idea_spark.risk: Over-reliance on deterministic executors may limit LLM adaptability in non-standard physical environments.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by human construction where the plane is decided first and height is considered later, decomposing complex problems into LLM-friendly high-level planning and deterministic computation.

papers.title: Probabilistic denoising for reliable signal extraction in spectroscopy
papers.summary: While deep learning offers powerful capabilities for scientific research, its application is often hindered by a lack of quantitative reliability. To address this, we introduce a probabilistic denoising framework that simultaneously extracts denoised signals and element-wise predictive uncertainties from noisy data. We demonstrate this approach on three-dimensional angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy data, showing that the model reliably recovers the spectral features of a cuprate superconductor from Poisson-distributed noise with an average count of only 0.02 electrons per voxel. Crucially, we show that these predicted uncertainties can be propagated into subsequent superconducting gap analyses, enabling quantitative parameter extraction with scientifically meaningful error bars. Furthermore, we validate the broad applicability of our approach by successfully extending it to two-dimensional X-ray diffraction data. Ultimately, this approach establishes uncertainty-aware deep learning not merely as a visualization tool, but as a rigorous framework for scientific data analysis.

ai.tldr: 提出概率去噪框架，从噪声光谱数据中同时提取信号和逐元素预测不确定性，并在ARPES和XRD数据上验证。
ai.motivation: 深度学习在科学研究中缺乏定量可靠性，传统方法无法提供科学上有意义的误差条。
ai.method: 概率去噪框架，输出去噪信号和逐元素不确定性，并传播到后续分析中。
ai.result: 在每体素平均0.02电子的泊松噪声下可靠恢复超导谱特征，不确定性可传播至超导能隙分析。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种在光谱分析中获取可靠误差条的方法，增强深度学习在科学数据分析中的可信度。

idea_spark.idea: 将不确定性传播与物理模型结合，实现自动化的定量参数提取。
idea_spark.risk: 不确定性估计的校准性需在更多实验条件下验证，避免过度自信。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将深度学习从可视化工具转变为严格科学分析框架，类似贝叶斯方法在实验物理中的应用。

en.tldr: A probabilistic denoising framework extracts signals and element-wise uncertainties from noisy spectroscopy data, demonstrated on ARPES and XRD.
en.motivation: Deep learning lacks quantitative reliability in scientific research; traditional methods cannot provide scientifically meaningful error bars.
en.method: Probabilistic denoising framework outputs denoised signals and per-element uncertainties, propagated into downstream analysis.
en.result: Reliable recovery of spectral features from Poisson noise with 0.02 electrons per voxel; uncertainties propagated into superconducting gap analysis.
en.help_to_user: Provides a method to obtain reliable error bars in spectroscopy analysis, enhancing trustworthiness of deep learning in scientific data analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Combine uncertainty propagation with physical models for automated quantitative parameter extraction.
idea_spark.risk: Calibration of uncertainty estimates needs validation under diverse experimental conditions to avoid overconfidence.
idea_spark.inspiration: Transform deep learning from a visualization tool into a rigorous scientific analysis framework, akin to Bayesian methods in experimental physics.

papers.title: Gradient Catastrophe for Solutions to the Conservation Laws with Source Term
papers.summary: This paper studies singularity formation for conservation laws with a source term. Motivated by John (1974) and Barlin (2023), we prove finite-time blow-up under initial data conditions weaker than those in Barlin. Moreover, we show that a sufficiently small compact support length of the initial data promotes blow-up. Hence, global existence can only be achieved when the initial data have a large compact support length.

ai.tldr: 研究带源项守恒律的梯度灾难，证明在比现有结果更弱的初始条件下解会在有限时间内爆破，且初始数据紧支集长度足够小会促进爆破。
ai.motivation: 受John(1974)和Barlin(2023)启发，希望放宽初始条件并揭示紧支集长度对爆破的影响。
ai.method: 通过分析初始数据的紧支集长度与解演化的关系，利用比较原理和能量估计证明有限时间爆破。
ai.result: 证明了在弱于Barlin的初始条件下解仍会有限时间爆破，且小紧支集长度促进爆破，大紧支集长度是全局存在的必要条件。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解带源项守恒律中奇性形成的条件，特别是初始数据紧支集长度对解行为的关键作用。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试构造反例，验证当紧支集长度足够大时是否确实存在全局光滑解。
idea_spark.risk: 大紧支集长度下全局存在的充分性证明可能依赖特定源项形式，通用性有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将紧支集长度视为控制参数，类似地研究其他非线性偏微分方程中解的长时间行为。

en.tldr: Studies gradient catastrophe for conservation laws with a source term, proving finite-time blow-up under weaker initial conditions than existing results, and showing that a sufficiently small compact support length of initial data promotes blow-up.
en.motivation: Inspired by John (1974) and Barlin (2023), aims to relax initial conditions and reveal the role of compact support length in blow-up.
en.method: Analyzes the relationship between the compact support length of initial data and solution evolution, using comparison principles and energy estimates to prove finite-time blow-up.
en.result: Proves finite-time blow-up under initial conditions weaker than Barlin's, and shows that small compact support length promotes blow-up while large compact support length is necessary for global existence.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand conditions for singularity formation in conservation laws with source terms, especially the critical role of initial data compact support length.

idea_spark.idea: Attempt to construct counterexamples to verify whether global smooth solutions indeed exist when compact support length is sufficiently large.
idea_spark.risk: The sufficiency proof for global existence under large compact support length may depend on specific source term forms, limiting generality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Treat compact support length as a control parameter to similarly study long-time behavior of solutions in other nonlinear PDEs.

papers.title: Unlocking Deep Demand Flexibility via Dynamic Signals
papers.summary: The rapid proliferation of distributed energy resources (DERs) and the electrification of residential loads offer significant potential for grid flexibility but pose stability challenges under static pricing regimes. Specifically, high levels of automation under static Time-of-Use (TOU) tariffs often induce ``device synchronization,'' where simultaneous responses from home energy management systems (HEMS) create artificial demand peaks that threaten grid stability. This paper proposes a privacy-preserving, one-way dynamic signaling framework to unlock deep demand flexibility from HEMS. We utilize a feedback-based learning algorithm that updates day-ahead price profiles based on aggregate substation demand and environmental contexts, effectively closing the loop between utility objectives and aggregated edge behaviors. The framework is rigorously validated using high-fidelity simulations on an 84-bus distribution network populated with hundreds of HEMS controlling diverse devices, including HVAC, PV, batteries, and flexible loads. Results demonstrate that the proposed mechanism achieves substantial reductions in both peak demand and total load variation. Extensive analyses across diverse climates and scalable deployments confirm the framework's robustness, indicating that dynamic pricing acts as a force multiplier for DERs, with peak shaving potential increasing significantly under high renewable penetration scenarios.

ai.tldr: 提出一种隐私保护的动态信号框架，通过反馈学习算法更新日前电价，以解锁家庭能源管理系统（HEMS）的深度需求灵活性，并在84节点配电网仿真中验证了其降低峰值负荷和总负荷波动的效果。
ai.motivation: 静态分时电价下，HEMS的自动化响应会导致设备同步，产生人工需求尖峰，威胁电网稳定性。
ai.method: 采用基于反馈的学习算法，根据变电站聚合需求和环境上下文更新日前电价曲线，实现单向动态信号闭环。
ai.result: 在84节点配电网仿真中，该机制显著降低了峰值负荷和总负荷变化；在高可再生能源渗透场景下，削峰潜力大幅提升。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何通过动态定价策略协调大量分布式能源和柔性负荷，避免同步响应带来的电网风险。

idea_spark.idea: 将动态信号与用户隐私保护结合，仅利用聚合数据更新电价，避免直接控制用户设备。
idea_spark.risk: 动态电价可能引发用户不满或博弈行为，需考虑公平性和用户接受度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受启发于控制理论中的闭环反馈思想，将电网目标与边缘行为通过价格信号间接耦合。

en.tldr: This paper proposes a privacy-preserving dynamic signaling framework that updates day-ahead prices via a feedback-based learning algorithm to unlock deep demand flexibility from home energy management systems (HEMS), validated on an 84-bus distribution network with significant peak demand and load variation reductions.
en.motivation: Static Time-of-Use tariffs cause device synchronization in automated HEMS, creating artificial demand peaks that threaten grid stability.
en.method: A feedback-based learning algorithm updates day-ahead price profiles based on aggregate substation demand and environmental contexts, forming a one-way dynamic signaling loop.
en.result: Simulations on an 84-bus network show substantial reductions in peak demand and total load variation; peak shaving potential increases significantly under high renewable penetration.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how dynamic pricing can coordinate distributed energy resources and flexible loads to avoid synchronization risks.

idea_spark.idea: Combine dynamic signals with user privacy by using only aggregate data to update prices, avoiding direct control of user devices.
idea_spark.risk: Dynamic pricing may cause user dissatisfaction or gaming behavior; fairness and acceptance need consideration.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by closed-loop feedback in control theory, coupling grid objectives with edge behaviors indirectly through price signals.

papers.title: Delta-Adapter: Scalable Exemplar-Based Image Editing with Single-Pair Supervision
papers.summary: Exemplar-based image editing applies a transformation defined by a source-target image pair to a new query image. Existing methods rely on a pair-of-pairs supervision paradigm, requiring two image pairs sharing the same edit semantics to learn the target transformation. This constraint makes training data difficult to curate at scale and limits generalization across diverse edit types. We propose Delta-Adapter, a method that learns transferable editing semantics under single-pair supervision, requiring no textual guidance. Rather than directly exposing the exemplar pair to the model, we leverage a pre-trained vision encoder to extract a semantic delta that encodes the visual transformation between the two images. This semantic delta is injected into a pre-trained image editing model via a Perceiver-based adapter. Since the target image is never directly visible to the model, it can serve as the prediction target, enabling single-pair supervision without requiring additional exemplar pairs. This formulation allows us to leverage existing large-scale editing datasets for training. To further promote faithful transformation transfer, we introduce a semantic delta consistency loss that aligns the semantic change of the generated output with the ground-truth semantic delta extracted from the exemplar pair. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Delta-Adapter consistently improves both editing accuracy and content consistency over four strong baselines on seen editing tasks, while also generalizing more effectively to unseen editing tasks. Code will be available at https://delta-adapter.github.io.

ai.tldr: 提出Delta-Adapter方法，仅需单对图像监督即可学习可迁移的编辑语义，无需文本指导。
ai.motivation: 现有范例图像编辑依赖成对监督，数据难以规模化，限制了编辑类型的泛化。
ai.method: 利用预训练视觉编码器提取源-目标图像对的语义增量，通过Perceiver适配器注入预训练编辑模型，并引入语义增量一致性损失。
ai.result: 在四种强基线方法上，编辑准确性和内容一致性均有提升，且能泛化到未见编辑任务。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种仅需单对图像即可训练的图像编辑方法，降低数据需求，便于实际应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将语义增量与扩散模型结合，实现更精细的局部编辑控制。
idea_spark.risk: 单对监督可能无法覆盖复杂编辑模式，导致语义增量提取不准确。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴对比学习思想，增强语义增量的判别性，提升编辑保真度。

idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴对比学习思想，增强语义增量的判别性，提升编辑保真度。

en.tldr: Proposes Delta-Adapter, which learns transferable editing semantics with single-pair supervision, requiring no text guidance.
en.motivation: Existing exemplar-based editing relies on pair-of-pairs supervision, making data curation difficult and limiting generalization.
en.method: Extracts a semantic delta from the source-target pair via a pre-trained vision encoder, injects it into a pre-trained editing model using a Perceiver-based adapter, and adds a semantic delta consistency loss.
en.result: Consistently improves editing accuracy and content consistency over four baselines on seen tasks, and generalizes to unseen tasks.
en.help_to_user: Enables training with only one exemplar pair, reducing data requirements and facilitating practical deployment.

idea_spark.idea: Combine semantic delta with diffusion models for finer-grained local editing control.
idea_spark.risk: Single-pair supervision may not cover complex editing patterns, leading to inaccurate delta extraction.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage contrastive learning to enhance discriminability of semantic deltas for better editing fidelity.

papers.title: Prox-PEP: A Proximal Partial Exact Penalty Algorithm for Weakly Convex Stochastic Nonlinear Programming
papers.summary: This paper considers stochastic optimization problems with weakly convex objective and constraint functions. We propose Prox-PEP, a proximal method equipped with quadratic subproblems. To handle nonlinear equality constraints, we employ an exact penalty approach, transforming them into inequality constraints with auxiliary slack variables. At each iteration, we construct quadratic approximations for both the objective and the constraint functions to facilitate efficient subproblem computation. By carefully designing the second-order approximation matrices, the subproblem constructed via the augmented Lagrangian function is strictly guaranteed to be strongly convex. Furthermore, we adopt a dynamic strategy for the equality penalty parameter: it monotonically increases up to a predefined threshold and remains constant thereafter. Building upon this algorithmic framework, we establish comprehensive asymptotic complexities. We prove that Prox-PEP achieves an $\mathcal{O}(T^{-1/4})$ average expected oracle complexity for $ε$-KKT stationarity, specifically bounding the squared norm of the gradient of the Moreau envelope of the Lagrangian function, alongside constraint violations and complementarity conditions. Additionally, under standard light-tailed martingale noise assumptions, we derive an $\mathcal{O}(T^{-1/8})$ high-probability convergence bound for the norm of the gradient of the Lagrangian's Moreau envelope, as well as $\mathcal{O}(T^{-1/4})$ high-probability bounds for both constraint violations and complementarity conditions.

ai.tldr: 提出一种针对弱凸随机非线性规划问题的近端精确罚算法，并建立了渐近复杂度分析。
ai.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理弱凸目标与约束的随机优化问题，特别是等式约束的处理。
ai.method: 采用近端方法结合二次子问题，通过精确罚函数将等式约束转化为不等式约束，并动态调整罚参数。
ai.result: 算法在期望意义下达到O(T^{-1/4})的KKT驻点复杂度，在高概率下达到O(T^{-1/8})的收敛界。
ai.help_to_user: 为弱凸随机非线性规划提供了一种理论保证的求解框架，可用于机器学习、工程优化等领域。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Moreau包络的梯度范数作为收敛度量，替代传统KKT条件。
idea_spark.risk: 罚参数动态调整可能引入额外调参负担，且高概率界依赖于轻尾噪声假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将确定性优化中的精确罚方法推广到随机设置，并建立概率收敛保证。

zh.tldr: 提出一种针对弱凸随机非线性规划问题的近端精确罚算法，并建立了渐近复杂度分析。
zh.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理弱凸目标与约束的随机优化问题，特别是等式约束的处理。
zh.method: 采用近端方法结合二次子问题，通过精确罚函数将等式约束转化为不等式约束，并动态调整罚参数。
zh.result: 算法在期望意义下达到O(T^{-1/4})的KKT驻点复杂度，在高概率下达到O(T^{-1/8})的收敛界。
zh.help_to_user: 为弱凸随机非线性规划提供了一种理论保证的求解框架，可用于机器学习、工程优化等领域。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Moreau包络的梯度范数作为收敛度量，替代传统KKT条件。
idea_spark.risk: 罚参数动态调整可能引入额外调参负担，且高概率界依赖于轻尾噪声假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将确定性优化中的精确罚方法推广到随机设置，并建立概率收敛保证。

en.tldr: Proposes a proximal exact penalty algorithm for weakly convex stochastic nonlinear programming with asymptotic complexity guarantees.
en.motivation: Existing methods struggle with weakly convex objectives and constraints, especially equality constraints in stochastic settings.
en.method: Uses a proximal method with quadratic subproblems, transforms equality constraints via exact penalty with slack variables, and dynamically adjusts the penalty parameter.
en.result: Achieves O(T^{-1/4}) expected oracle complexity for ε-KKT stationarity and O(T^{-1/8}) high-probability bound on the gradient norm of the Lagrangian's Moreau envelope.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretically grounded solver for weakly convex stochastic nonlinear programs, applicable to machine learning and engineering optimization.

idea_spark.idea: Uses the gradient norm of the Moreau envelope as a stationarity measure instead of traditional KKT conditions.
idea_spark.risk: Dynamic penalty tuning may introduce extra hyperparameter burden, and high-probability bounds rely on light-tailed noise assumptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extends deterministic exact penalty methods to stochastic settings with probabilistic convergence guarantees.

papers.title: Moderate Deviation Principle for a Stochastic Approximation Process
papers.summary: In this paper, we investigate a stochastic approximation procedure $\left(X_n\right)_{n\ge 0}$ taking values in $R$. The process is adapted to a filtration $(F_n)_{n\ge 0}$ and satisfies the recursion $X_{n+1}=X_n+\frac{b}{n+1}\big[g(X_n)+U_{n+1}\big]$, where $b>0$, $g:R \to R$ is a function and $\left(U_n\right)_{n\ge 1}$ is a sequence of bounded martingale differences adapted to the filtration $(F_n)_{n\ge 1}$. We establish the moderate deviation principle for the stochastic process $(X_n)_{n\ge 0}$. As auxiliary results, we also obtain the exponential inequality for $(X_n)_{n\ge 0}$ and the moderate deviation principle for weighted sums of bounded martingale differences.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了一类取值于实数的随机逼近过程，建立了其适度偏差原理，并得到了指数不等式和有界鞅差加权和的适度偏差原理。
ai.motivation: 随机逼近过程在优化和机器学习中广泛应用，其波动行为的精确刻画对算法设计和分析至关重要。
ai.method: 通过鞅差序列的指数不等式和加权和技巧，推导出过程的适度偏差原理。
ai.result: 建立了随机逼近过程的适度偏差原理，并给出了有界鞅差加权和的相应结果。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解随机逼近过程的尾部概率和大偏差行为，为算法收敛性分析提供理论工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将鞅差加权和的方法应用于强化学习中的策略梯度估计。
idea_spark.risk: 高维情形下指数不等式可能退化，需要更精细的鞅控制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用鞅差结构分析随机梯度下降的波动性，可能改进学习率调度。

idea_spark.inspiration: 利用鞅差结构分析随机梯度下降的波动性，可能改进学习率调度。

en.tldr: This paper studies a stochastic approximation process taking values in R, establishes its moderate deviation principle, and obtains exponential inequalities and moderate deviation principles for weighted sums of bounded martingale differences.
en.motivation: Stochastic approximation processes are widely used in optimization and machine learning; precise characterization of their fluctuations is crucial for algorithm design and analysis.
en.method: Using exponential inequalities for martingale difference sequences and weighted sum techniques to derive the moderate deviation principle.
en.result: Established the moderate deviation principle for the stochastic approximation process and corresponding results for weighted sums of bounded martingale differences.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand tail probabilities and large deviation behavior of stochastic approximation processes, providing theoretical tools for convergence analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the martingale difference weighted sum method to policy gradient estimation in reinforcement learning.
idea_spark.risk: In high dimensions, exponential inequalities may degrade, requiring finer martingale control.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using martingale difference structure to analyze fluctuations of stochastic gradient descent may improve learning rate scheduling.

papers.title: Self Driving Datasets: From 20 Million Papers to Nuanced Biomedical Knowledge at Scale
papers.summary: Manually curated biomedical repositories -- spanning bioactivity, genomics, and chemistry -- are expensive to maintain, lag behind primary literature, and discard experimental context, obscuring nuances needed to assess data correctness and coverage. We show that PubMed itself can be autonomously and cost-effectively turned into structured datasets that are larger, more nuanced, and more accurate than the curated databases they replace. We present three coupled contributions: (1) an LLM-based entity-tagging pipeline, grounded in nine biomedical ontologies, that tags 4.5B entities across 19 categories in a 22.5M-paper, 2.5T-token PubMed corpus; (2) hybrid sparse-dense retrieval supporting entity-filtered semantic queries over the tagged corpus; and (3) Starling, a multi-agent deep research system that, given only a natural-language task description, designs precision- and recall-targeted retrieval filters, induces an extraction schema, and emits structured records with nuance-rich fields and supporting passages. Across six tasks -- blood-brain barrier permeability, oral bioavailability, acute toxicity (LD50), gene-disease associations, protein subcellular localization, and chemical reactions -- Starling produces ~6.3M records (91K-3M per task); several are, to our knowledge, the largest public datasets for their property. Frontier-model rejection of our extractions is 0.6-7.7% across tasks, far below error rates we measure on widely used curated counterparts (e.g., 16.5% on BBB_Martins, 7.3% on Bioavailability_Ma). Beyond scale and accuracy, the supporting passages carry nuance tabular databases discard -- e.g., oral bioavailability may depend on fed vs. fasted state. Together, the corpus, retrieval, and agent establish a foundation for AI-driven therapeutic design. Code and datasets: https://github.com/starling-labs/starling.

ai.tldr: 提出一种自主构建结构化生物医学数据集的方法，利用LLM从PubMed中提取比人工数据库更大、更准确且保留实验细节的数据。
ai.motivation: 人工维护的生物医学数据库成本高、更新慢、丢失实验上下文，难以评估数据正确性和覆盖范围。
ai.method: 包括三个部分：基于LLM的实体标注管道（覆盖9个本体）、混合稀疏-稠密检索系统、以及多智能体深度研究系统Starling，可根据自然语言任务自动设计检索过滤器和提取模式。
ai.result: 在6个任务上生成约630万条记录，错误率远低于现有人工数据库（如BBB_Martins错误率16.5% vs 本方法0.6-7.7%）。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员快速获取大规模、高精度且保留实验细节的生物医学结构化数据，支持药物设计和知识发现。

idea_spark.idea: 结合多模态数据（如图表、公式）进一步丰富提取的语义信息。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖LLM的准确性，可能对罕见或复杂实体提取失败；本体覆盖范围有限可能遗漏新概念。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用多智能体协作和检索增强生成（RAG）来提升结构化数据提取的鲁棒性和可解释性。
