en.tldr: Proposes a method to autonomously construct structured biomedical datasets from PubMed using LLMs, yielding larger, more accurate, and context-rich data than manual databases.
en.motivation: Manually curated biomedical databases are expensive, lag behind literature, and discard experimental context, obscuring nuances needed for correctness and coverage assessment.
en.method: Three contributions: an LLM-based entity tagging pipeline covering 9 ontologies, hybrid sparse-dense retrieval, and Starling, a multi-agent deep research system that designs retrieval filters and extraction schemas from natural language tasks.
en.result: Generates ~6.3M records across 6 tasks with error rates 0.6-7.7%, far below curated counterparts (e.g., 16.5% for BBB_Martins).
en.help_to_user: Enables researchers to obtain large-scale, high-precision biomedical structured data with preserved experimental nuances, supporting drug design and knowledge discovery.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporate multimodal data (e.g., figures, equations) to further enrich extracted semantic information.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on LLM accuracy, may fail on rare or complex entities; ontology coverage may miss novel concepts.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage multi-agent collaboration and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) to improve robustness and interpretability of structured data extraction.

papers.title: Randomness is sometimes necessary for coordination
papers.summary: Full parameter sharing is standard in cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) for homogeneous agents. Under permutation-symmetric observations, however, a shared deterministic policy outputs identical action distributions for every agent, making role differentiation impossible. This failure can theoretically be resolved using symmetry breaking among anonymous identical processors, which requires randomness. We propose Diamond Attention, a cross-attention architecture in which each agent samples a scalar random number per timestep, inducing a transient rank ordering that masks lower-ranked peers from agent-to-agent attention while leaving task attention fully unmasked. This realizes a random-bit coordination protocol in a single broadcast round, and the set-based attention enables zero-shot deployment to teams of different sizes. We evaluate across three regimes that isolate when structured randomness matters. On the perfectly symmetric XOR game, our method achieves $1.0$ success while all deterministic baselines plateau near $0.5$. On control coordination tasks, a policy trained on $N=4$ generalizes zero-shot to $N \in [2,8]$. On SMACLite cross-scenario transfer, we achieve zero-shot transfer where standard baselines cannot transfer due to structural limitations. Furthermore, replacing the structured mask with standard dropout-based randomness results in a 0\% win rate, confirming that protocol-space structure, not stochastic noise, is the operative ingredient. https://anonymous.4open.science/r/randomness-137A/

ai.tldr: 提出Diamond Attention架构，通过每个智能体每步采样随机数实现瞬态排序，打破对称性，使同质智能体在共享策略下完成角色分化，并在XOR游戏、控制协调和SMACLite迁移中取得零样本泛化。
ai.motivation: 标准全参数共享策略在置换对称观测下输出相同动作分布，无法实现角色分化，而理论表明匿名同质处理器间的对称破缺需要随机性。
ai.method: 设计Diamond Attention交叉注意力架构：每个智能体每时间步采样一个标量随机数，产生瞬态排序，在智能体间注意力中屏蔽排名较低的同伴，任务注意力保持全连接，实现单轮广播的随机比特协调协议。
ai.result: 在完美对称XOR游戏中成功率1.0（确定性基线约0.5）；N=4训练的策略零样本泛化到N∈[2,8]；SMACLite跨场景零样本迁移成功，标准基线因结构限制无法迁移；替换为dropout随机性后胜率为0%。
ai.help_to_user: 该工作展示了在需要角色分化的多智能体协调任务中，结构化随机性（而非噪声）是必要的，为设计可泛化的同质智能体协作策略提供了新思路。

idea_spark.idea: 将随机排序与注意力遮蔽结合，实现单轮通信下的协调协议，避免复杂通信或显式角色分配。
idea_spark.risk: 随机排序可能引入不稳定；对随机数质量敏感；在任务注意力与同伴注意力需要不同遮蔽模式时可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受分布式系统中随机化协议（如随机化共识）启发，将随机性作为对称破缺的廉价手段，而非依赖确定性角色分配。

en.tldr: Proposes Diamond Attention, a cross-attention architecture where each agent samples a scalar random number per timestep to induce transient rank ordering, breaking symmetry and enabling role differentiation under shared deterministic policies, achieving zero-shot generalization in XOR game, control coordination, and SMACLite transfer.
en.motivation: Standard full parameter sharing under permutation-symmetric observations yields identical action distributions for all agents, preventing role differentiation; theory suggests symmetry breaking among anonymous identical processors requires randomness.
en.method: Diamond Attention: each agent samples a scalar random number per timestep, producing a transient rank ordering that masks lower-ranked peers in agent-to-agent attention while leaving task attention fully unmasked, realizing a random-bit coordination protocol in a single broadcast round.
en.result: Achieves 1.0 success rate on the perfectly symmetric XOR game (deterministic baselines plateau near 0.5); policy trained on N=4 generalizes zero-shot to N∈[2,8]; zero-shot transfer on SMACLite cross-scenario where standard baselines fail; replacing structured mask with dropout yields 0% win rate.
en.help_to_user: This work demonstrates that structured randomness (not stochastic noise) is necessary for coordination tasks requiring role differentiation among homogeneous agents, offering a new approach for designing generalizable multi-agent policies.

idea_spark.idea: Combine random ranking with attention masking to implement a coordination protocol in a single communication round, avoiding complex communication or explicit role assignment.
idea_spark.risk: Random ranking may introduce instability; sensitive to quality of random numbers; may fail when task and peer attention require different masking patterns.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by randomized protocols in distributed systems (e.g., randomized consensus), using randomness as a cheap symmetry-breaking mechanism rather than deterministic role assignment.

papers.title: OneViewAll: Semantic Prior Guided One-View 6D Pose Estimation for Novel Objects
papers.summary: In many practical 6D object pose estimation scenarios, we often have access to only a single real-world RGB-D reference view per object, typically without CAD models. Existing methods largely rely on explicit 3D models or multi-view data, which limits their scalability. To address this challenging single-reference model-free setting, we propose \textbf{OneViewAll}, a semantic-prior-guided framework that performs pose estimation via a novel Project-and-Compare paradigm. Instead of relying on computationally expensive CAD-based rendering, our method directly aligns reference and query observations within a projection-equivariant space. OneViewAll progressively integrates hierarchical semantic priors across three levels: (1) \textit{category- and scene-level} priors for efficient hypothesis initialization; (2) \textit{object-level symmetry} priors for geometry completion via mirror fusion; and (3) \textit{patch-level} priors for discriminative refinement. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OneViewAll achieves \textbf{92.5\%} ADD-0.1 accuracy on the LINEMOD dataset using only one real reference view -- significantly outperforming the CVPR 2025 baseline One2Any (52.6\%). It also yields consistent improvements on YCB-V, Real275, and Toyota-Light while maintaining low inference latency. Our results underscore the efficacy of symmetry-aware projection in handling symmetric, texture-less, and occluded objects.

ai.tldr: 提出OneViewAll框架，仅用单张真实RGB-D参考图即可实现新颖物体的6D姿态估计，无需CAD模型，在LINEMOD上达到92.5% ADD-0.1精度。
ai.motivation: 实际场景中常只有单张真实参考图且无CAD模型，现有方法依赖3D模型或多视图，可扩展性差。
ai.method: 采用Project-and-Compare范式，在投影等变空间中直接对齐参考与查询观测，并逐步融合类别/场景、物体对称性、局部块三级语义先验。
ai.result: 在LINEMOD上92.5% ADD-0.1，远超CVPR 2025基线One2Any的52.6%，在YCB-V、Real275、Toyota-Light上均有提升，推理延迟低。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户在仅有单张参考图且无CAD模型时，快速准确地估计物体6D姿态。

idea_spark.idea: 利用物体对称性先验进行镜像融合，补全几何信息，可推广到对称性更强的物体或场景。
idea_spark.risk: 对高度非对称或纹理极少的物体，对称性先验可能引入错误匹配。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将语义先验分层融入投影空间，启发其他任务中多层级先验的渐进式融合设计。

idea_spark.idea: 利用物体对称性先验进行镜像融合，补全几何信息，可推广到对称性更强的物体或场景。
idea_spark.risk: 对高度非对称或纹理极少的物体，对称性先验可能引入错误匹配。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将语义先验分层融入投影空间，启发其他任务中多层级先验的渐进式融合设计。

en.tldr: Proposes OneViewAll, a framework that estimates 6D pose for novel objects using only a single real RGB-D reference view without CAD models, achieving 92.5% ADD-0.1 on LINEMOD.
en.motivation: Real-world scenarios often provide only a single reference view without CAD models; existing methods rely on 3D models or multi-view data, limiting scalability.
en.method: Adopts a Project-and-Compare paradigm to directly align reference and query observations in a projection-equivariant space, progressively integrating hierarchical semantic priors at category/scene, object symmetry, and patch levels.
en.result: 92.5% ADD-0.1 on LINEMOD, significantly outperforming the CVPR 2025 baseline One2Any (52.6%), with consistent improvements on YCB-V, Real275, and Toyota-Light, and low inference latency.
en.help_to_user: Enables accurate 6D pose estimation when only a single reference view is available and CAD models are absent.

idea_spark.idea: Using object symmetry priors via mirror fusion to complete geometry could be extended to more symmetric objects or scenes.
idea_spark.risk: For highly asymmetric or texture-less objects, symmetry priors may introduce incorrect matches.
idea_spark.inspiration: Layered integration of semantic priors into projection space inspires progressive multi-level prior fusion in other tasks.

papers.title: Online Allocation with Unknown Shared Supply
papers.summary: Many real-world resource allocation systems, such as humanitarian logistics and vaccine distribution, must preposition limited supply across multiple locations before demand is realized while stockouts incur irreversible service losses. To study this, we introduce the Online Shared Supply Allocation (OSSA) problem, a stateful online model in which a central hub allocates a finite, unknown supply to multiple sites facing sequential demand under fixed-charge transportation costs and lost-sales penalties. Unlike classical make-to-stock or make-to-order inventory models, OSSA precludes backlogging and replenishment only hedges against future demand. To tackle OSSA, we propose a deterministic threshold-proportional policy GPA and prove that it achieves a $4/3$-approximation to the offline optimum up to an additive term independent of the total supply. We complement this with matching lower bounds showing that the $4/3$ ratio is tight and that the additive-error dependence is unavoidable, even for randomized algorithms that know the total supply upfront. Finally, we develop a learning-augmented extension to GPA that principally incorporates imperfect forecasts (e.g., from human experts or ML models) commonly available in practice, enabling us to exploit high-quality advice while being robust against arbitrary bad ones. Synthetic and real-world experiments show that GPA outperforms natural baselines with global supply is scarce.

ai.tldr: 提出在线共享供应分配问题，设计阈值比例策略GPA，达到4/3近似比，并扩展为学习增强版本以利用预测信息。
ai.motivation: 人道主义物流和疫苗分配等场景需在需求未知前预置有限供应，且缺货导致不可逆损失，现有模型未考虑此类共享供应约束。

ai.result: GPA在全局供应稀缺时优于自然基线，4/3比紧且加性误差不可避免。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解在线资源分配中共享供应约束下的最优策略及预测融合方法。

idea_spark.risk: 预测质量不稳定时，学习增强部分可能退化；加性误差在极端场景下影响性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从库存管理中的报童模型和在线学习中的专家建议融合获得启发。

en.motivation: Real-world systems like humanitarian logistics and vaccine distribution must preposition limited supply before demand is known, with stockouts causing irreversible losses; existing models do not capture shared supply constraints.

papers.title: Model-Driven Policy Optimization in Differentiable Simulators via Stochastic Exploration
papers.summary: Differentiable planning enables gradient-based optimization of decision-making problems by leveraging differentiable models of system dynamics. However, in highly nonlinear and hybrid discrete-continuous domains, the resulting optimization landscapes are often ill-conditioned, with flat regions and sharp transitions that hinder effective optimization.   We propose Model-Driven Policy Optimization (MDPO), a framework that introduces stochastic exploration into differentiable planning by injecting noise into the action space during optimization. Leveraging access to the model, MDPO further adapts the noise magnitude based on gradient-derived sensitivity of the trajectory objective, yielding a time-dependent exploration profile. This enables improved exploration of the objective landscape and helps escape poor local optima via dynamic allocation of exploration across timesteps and iterations.   Experiments on benchmark domains demonstrate that MDPO consistently outperforms deterministic differentiable planning, including both the noise-free variant of our method and available state-of-the-art implementations, as well as model-free baselines such as PPO, significantly improving solution quality across challenging nonlinear and hybrid settings. We further analyze the evolution of the adaptive noise magnitude across both time steps and optimization iterations, providing insight into how exploration is allocated during learning.

ai.tldr: 提出MDPO框架，通过在可微规划中注入自适应噪声来改善非线性混合离散连续域中的优化。
ai.motivation: 可微规划在高度非线性和混合离散连续域中面临病态优化景观，平坦区域和急剧转换阻碍有效优化。
ai.method: 在可微规划的动作空间注入噪声，并基于梯度敏感性自适应调整噪声幅度，实现时间相关的探索分配。
ai.result: 在基准域上持续优于确定性可微规划和PPO等无模型基线，显著提升解质量。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种在可微模拟器中结合随机探索的优化方法，适用于复杂控制与规划问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将噪声幅度与梯度敏感性动态关联，实现探索与利用的自动平衡。
idea_spark.risk: 噪声注入可能引入额外方差，需谨慎调节以避免不稳定。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受随机优化和可微规划结合启发，探索在可微模型中主动控制探索程度。

en.tldr: Proposes MDPO, which injects adaptive noise into differentiable planning to improve optimization in nonlinear hybrid discrete-continuous domains.
en.motivation: Differentiable planning suffers from ill-conditioned landscapes with flat regions and sharp transitions in highly nonlinear and hybrid domains.
en.method: Injects noise into the action space during differentiable planning and adapts noise magnitude based on gradient-derived sensitivity for time-dependent exploration.
en.result: Consistently outperforms deterministic differentiable planning and model-free baselines like PPO on benchmark domains, significantly improving solution quality.
en.help_to_user: Provides an optimization method combining stochastic exploration with differentiable simulators for complex control and planning tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Dynamically link noise magnitude to gradient sensitivity for automatic exploration-exploitation balance.
idea_spark.risk: Noise injection may introduce extra variance, requiring careful tuning to avoid instability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by combining stochastic optimization with differentiable planning to actively control exploration in differentiable models.

papers.title: Causal-Aware Foundation-Model for Bilevel Optimization in Discrete Choice Settings
papers.summary: We introduce a causal aware foundation-model framework for real time optimal decision making in discrete choice environments. We propose a constrained triple-head price optimization (C3PO) network to solve a bilevel decision problem in which a service provider selects an optimal assortment while heterogeneous users make personalized acceptance or rejection choices optimizing their own personalized preferences. C3PO integrates imitation learning of prices, multi-task learning of revenue responses, and in context learning of price elasticity to generate pricing recommendations while adhering to business constraints. During inference, frontier model prompting retrieves an enhanced elasticity prior for new products from behavioral economics literature, improving pricing effectiveness. We demonstrate strong in context learning performance using simulated, synthetic, and real-world datasets. C3PO is trained on simulated data generated from multiple classical discrete choice models in economics. The model is trained on data comprising simulated customer segments and counterfactual action and outcome pairs and evaluated on randomly generated choice environments with no access to the underlying preference structure. The trained model consistently improves the pricing KPIs, with gains increasing as customer price sensitivity increases. We also deploy the tuned foundation model for optimal pricing in real-world applications such as healthcare, tender pricing, airline ancillary pricing, and other domains, achieving substantial gains across multiple products, markets, and divisions.

ai.tldr: 提出因果感知基础模型C3PO，用于离散选择环境中的双层定价优化，通过模仿学习、多任务学习和上下文学习实现实时最优决策。
ai.motivation: 离散选择场景中服务商与异质用户存在双层决策冲突，传统方法难以实时优化定价并满足业务约束。
ai.method: 构建约束三头价格优化网络（C3PO），集成模仿学习、多任务收益响应学习和价格弹性上下文学习，并通过前沿模型提示从行为经济学文献中提取弹性先验。
ai.result: 在模拟、合成和真实数据集上表现优异，定价KPI持续提升，尤其在客户价格敏感度高时增益更大，并在医疗、招标、航空辅助定价等实际应用中取得显著收益。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用因果感知基础模型在复杂离散选择环境中实现实时、约束感知的定价优化。

idea_spark.idea: 利用前沿模型提示从经济学文献中提取弹性先验，可推广至其他领域知识增强的机器学习任务。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖模拟数据训练，真实场景中用户偏好结构未知可能导致泛化风险；弹性先验的检索质量影响定价效果。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将行为经济学理论与基础模型结合，为数据稀缺场景下的决策优化提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes Causal-Aware Foundation-Model C3PO for bilevel pricing optimization in discrete choice settings, integrating imitation learning, multi-task learning, and in-context learning for real-time optimal decisions.
en.motivation: Service providers and heterogeneous users have conflicting bilevel decisions in discrete choice environments; traditional methods cannot optimize pricing in real time while satisfying business constraints.
en.method: Constructs a Constrained Triple-Head Price Optimization (C3PO) network that integrates imitation learning of prices, multi-task learning of revenue responses, and in-context learning of price elasticity, enhanced by frontier model prompting to retrieve elasticity priors from behavioral economics literature.
en.result: Achieves strong performance on simulated, synthetic, and real-world datasets; consistently improves pricing KPIs, with larger gains under higher customer price sensitivity; deployed successfully in healthcare, tender pricing, airline ancillary pricing, and other domains.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to leverage causal-aware foundation models for real-time, constraint-aware pricing optimization in complex discrete choice settings.

idea_spark.idea: Using frontier model prompting to retrieve elasticity priors from economics literature can be generalized to knowledge-enhanced machine learning tasks in other domains.
idea_spark.risk: Training on simulated data may cause generalization issues in real-world scenarios with unknown preference structures; quality of retrieved elasticity priors affects pricing effectiveness.
idea_spark.inspiration: Integrating behavioral economics theory with foundation models offers a new approach for decision optimization in data-scarce settings.

papers.title: Seeing Across Skies and Streets: Feedforward 3D Reconstruction from Satellite, Drone, and Ground Images
papers.summary: Cross-view localization classically asks: where does this ground image lie on the satellite tile? Existing methods are typically limited to 3-DoF estimates -- an $(x,y)$ position and a yaw angle -- because nadir satellite imagery provides no direct cues for roll, pitch, or altitude, forcing a reliance on planar-motion and zero-tilt assumptions. These assumptions break on real terrain with slopes, ramps, and tilted camera mounts. To overcome this, we introduce a single UAV image as an intermediate viewpoint: it reveals the 3D structure invisible from nadir, supplies the cues for roll, pitch, and altitude that the satellite alone cannot provide, and needs only spatial overlap with the ground camera -- no known relative pose is required. Building on this insight, we propose **Cross3R**, a flexible feed-forward model that ingests a satellite tile together with a UAV image, a ground image, or both, and, in a single forward pass, recovers a cross-view 3D point cloud, the 6-DoF poses of every input camera, and the on-tile $(x,y)$ position and yaw of each perspective camera. For training and evaluation, we also construct **CrossGeo**, a 278K-image tri-view dataset spanning 85 scenes across every continent except Antarctica. On CrossGeo, Cross3R consistently outperforms feed-forward 3D baselines in point-cloud reconstruction, 6-DoF camera-pose estimation, and cross-view localization. On KITTI, it outperforms dedicated cross-view methods trained on KITTI on most metrics, despite having no KITTI training itself.

ai.tldr: 提出Cross3R，一个前馈模型，通过融合卫星、无人机和地面图像，单次前向传播即可恢复跨视角3D点云、6自由度相机位姿和地面位置。
ai.motivation: 传统跨视角定位仅能估计2D位置和偏航角，无法处理真实地形中的坡度、倾斜等三维结构。
ai.method: 引入无人机图像作为中间视角，提供卫星无法获取的俯仰、滚转和高度信息，设计前馈模型Cross3R联合处理多源图像。
ai.result: 在CrossGeo数据集上优于基线，在KITTI上超越专用方法，且无需KITTI训练数据。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户从卫星、无人机和地面图像中快速获取精确的3D场景结构和相机位姿。

idea_spark.idea: 利用无人机视角作为桥梁，弥补卫星与地面视角之间的几何信息缺失。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖无人机与地面图像的空间重叠，可能限制在无重叠场景的适用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 引入中间视角可有效解决极端视角差异下的3D重建难题。

idea_spark.risk: 依赖无人机与地面图像的空间重叠，可能限制在无重叠场景的适用性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 引入中间视角可有效解决极端视角差异下的3D重建难题。

en.tldr: Proposes Cross3R, a feed-forward model that fuses satellite, UAV, and ground images to recover cross-view 3D point clouds, 6-DoF camera poses, and ground positions in a single forward pass.
en.motivation: Traditional cross-view localization only estimates 2D position and yaw, failing on real terrain with slopes and tilted cameras.
en.method: Introduces a UAV image as an intermediate viewpoint to provide roll, pitch, and altitude cues missing from satellite imagery, and designs a feed-forward model Cross3R to jointly process multi-source images.
en.result: Outperforms baselines on CrossGeo dataset and surpasses dedicated methods on KITTI without KITTI training data.
en.help_to_user: Helps users quickly obtain accurate 3D scene structure and camera poses from satellite, UAV, and ground images.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage UAV viewpoint as a bridge to compensate for geometric information missing between satellite and ground views.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on spatial overlap between UAV and ground images, potentially limiting applicability in non-overlapping scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Introducing an intermediate viewpoint can effectively address extreme viewpoint differences in 3D reconstruction.

papers.title: SatSurfGS: Generalizable 2D Gaussian Splatting for Sparse-View Satellite Surface Reconstruction
papers.summary: Sparse-view satellite image surface reconstruction remains highly challenging, fundamentally because the reliability of multi-view matching under satellite imaging conditions is strongly spatially heterogeneous. Affected by large photometric differences, weak textures, and repetitive textures, multi-view geometric constraints are often sparse, unevenly distributed, and locally unreliable. Although 2D Gaussian Splatting (2DGS) is more suitable than 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) for the explicit representation of continuous surfaces, research on generalizable feed-forward 2DGS frameworks for sparse-view satellite surface reconstruction is still lacking. To address this issue, we propose SatSurfGS, a generalizable sparse-view surface reconstruction method for satellite imagery based on 2DGS. The proposed method builds a coarse-to-fine Gaussian attribute prediction framework and explicitly models local geometric reliability at three levels: feature learning, Gaussian parameter estimation, and training optimization. Specifically, we propose a confidence-aware monocular multi-view feature fusion module to adaptively integrate monocular priors and multi-view matching features according to local confidence; a cross-stage self-consistency residual guidance module to stabilize stage-wise Gaussian parameter refinement using the residual between the rendered height map from the previous stage and the current-stage MVS height map, together with confidence information; and a confidence bidirectional routing loss to achieve differentiated allocation of geometric and appearance supervision. Experiments on satellite datasets show that the proposed method achieves improved rendering quality, surface reconstruction accuracy, cross-dataset generalization, and inference efficiency compared with representative generalizable baselines and competitive per-scene optimization methods.

ai.tldr: 提出SatSurfGS，一种基于2D高斯溅射的通用稀疏视图卫星表面重建方法，通过粗到细的属性预测和三级几何可靠性建模，提升重建质量与泛化能力。
ai.motivation: 稀疏视图卫星影像表面重建中，多视图匹配可靠性因光照差异、弱纹理和重复纹理而高度空间异质，现有2DGS框架缺乏通用前馈方法。
ai.method: 构建粗到细的高斯属性预测框架，在特征学习、参数估计和训练优化三级显式建模局部几何可靠性，包括置信感知单目多视图特征融合、跨阶段自一致性残差引导和置信双向路由损失。
ai.result: 在卫星数据集上，相比代表性通用基线和逐场景优化方法，在渲染质量、表面重建精度、跨数据集泛化和推理效率上均取得提升。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用2D高斯溅射和置信度建模解决稀疏视图卫星影像的表面重建问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将跨阶段残差引导与置信度信息结合，用于稳定多阶段参数优化，可启发其他迭代式三维重建方法。
idea_spark.risk: 对卫星影像特定假设（如大光照差异）可能限制在光照均匀场景的泛化；置信度估计的准确性依赖训练数据。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从多视图匹配的空间异质性出发，显式建模局部可靠性，为通用前馈重建提供了新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes SatSurfGS, a generalizable sparse-view satellite surface reconstruction method based on 2D Gaussian Splatting, using coarse-to-fine attribute prediction and three-level geometric reliability modeling to improve quality and generalization.
en.motivation: Sparse-view satellite surface reconstruction suffers from spatially heterogeneous multi-view matching reliability due to large photometric differences, weak textures, and repetitive textures; existing 2DGS lacks generalizable feed-forward frameworks.
en.method: Builds a coarse-to-fine Gaussian attribute prediction framework with explicit local geometric reliability modeling at three levels: feature learning, parameter estimation, and training optimization, including confidence-aware monocular multi-view feature fusion, cross-stage self-consistency residual guidance, and confidence bidirectional routing loss.
en.result: On satellite datasets, achieves improved rendering quality, surface reconstruction accuracy, cross-dataset generalization, and inference efficiency compared to representative generalizable baselines and competitive per-scene optimization methods.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to leverage 2D Gaussian Splatting and confidence modeling for sparse-view satellite surface reconstruction.

idea_spark.idea: Combining cross-stage residual guidance with confidence information to stabilize multi-stage parameter optimization could inspire other iterative 3D reconstruction methods.
idea_spark.risk: Assumptions specific to satellite imagery (e.g., large photometric differences) may limit generalization to uniform illumination scenes; confidence estimation accuracy depends on training data.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explicitly modeling local reliability from the spatial heterogeneity of multi-view matching provides a new perspective for generalizable feed-forward reconstruction.

papers.title: Characterizing bulk properties of gapped phases by smeared boundary conformal field theories: Role of duality in unusual ordering
papers.summary: We study the classification of the gapped phases or massive renormalization group (RG) flows dual to the massless RG flows under changing the sign of the coupling constants. Whereas our formalism is based on combining Higgs- or Nambu-Goldstone-type arguments with Cardy's smeared boundary conformal field theories (SBCFTs), several puzzling structures arise. More specifically, the established Higgs or Nambu-Goldstone type arguments on the duality imply that the natural basis for the gapped states should be constructed from a set of smeared Ishibashi states, which are unphysical in boundary critical phenomena. Hence, the module of the gapped phases can be outside of that of boundary critical phenomena, whereas one can still calculate characterizing quantities by applying SBCFTs to the models. For example, we demonstrate that the massive RG flow dual to the massless RG flow from the tricritical Ising model to the Ising model, one of the simplest massless RG flows, has this unusual structure. This can be regarded as a quantum field-theoretic analogue of order-disorder coexistence in lattice models. More generally, the resultant gapped phases usually spontaneously break non-group-like symmetry (or noninvertible symmetry). Our work provides systematic quantum field theoretic descriptions of such unusual phases with spontaneous symmetry breaking of non-group-like (or noninvertible) symmetries.

ai.motivation: 理解对偶下质量间隙相与无质量重整化群流之间的关系，特别是当耦合常数变号时出现的非群状对称性自发破缺。

ai.help_to_user: 为研究非常规有序相（如非可逆对称性破缺）提供系统的量子场论描述框架。

papers.title: Bounded Fitting for Expressive Description Logics
papers.summary: Bounded fitting is an attractive paradigm for learning logical formulas from labeled data examples that offers PAC-style generalization guarantees and can often be implemented leveraging SAT solvers. It has been successfully applied to learning concepts of the description logic ALC. We study bounded fitting for learning concepts in expressive description logics that extend ALC with inverse roles, qualified number restrictions, and feature comparisons. We investigate under which conditions bounded fitting keeps its favorable theoretical properties in this setting, and implement it using a SAT solver. We compare our tool with state-of-the-art concept learners with encouraging results, demonstrating that it is a practical approach to expressive concept learning.

ai.tldr: 研究在表达能力更强的描述逻辑中应用有界拟合方法，并验证其理论性质和实际效果。
ai.motivation: 有界拟合在简单描述逻辑ALC中成功，但扩展到更丰富的逻辑（如含逆角色、数量限制、特征比较）时，其理论保证和实现可行性尚不明确。
ai.method: 分析有界拟合在扩展逻辑中保持PAC风格泛化保证的条件，并利用SAT求解器实现算法。
ai.result: 工具与现有概念学习器相比表现良好，证明有界拟合在表达能力更强的逻辑中仍是一种实用方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何将PAC学习理论扩展到复杂描述逻辑，并提供可实现的算法参考。

idea_spark.risk: 扩展逻辑可能增加计算复杂度，实际应用中需平衡表达力与效率。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将形式化逻辑与机器学习结合，启发更多可解释学习方法的开发。

en.tldr: Studies bounded fitting for learning concepts in expressive description logics beyond ALC, preserving theoretical guarantees and showing practical effectiveness via SAT solver implementation.
en.motivation: Bounded fitting works well for ALC, but its theoretical properties and feasibility for richer logics (inverse roles, qualified number restrictions, feature comparisons) are unexplored.
en.method: Analyzes conditions for PAC-style generalization guarantees in extended logics and implements the approach using a SAT solver.
en.result: The tool compares favorably with state-of-the-art concept learners, demonstrating bounded fitting as a practical method for expressive concept learning.
en.help_to_user: Provides insights into extending PAC learning theory to complex description logics and offers a concrete implementation reference.

papers.title: From Synthetic to Real: Toward Identity-Consistent Makeup Transfer with Synthetic and Real Data
papers.summary: Makeup transfer aims to apply the makeup style of a reference portrait to a source portrait while preserving identity and background. Early methods formulate this task as unsupervised image-to-image translation, relying on surrogate objectives and often yielding limited performance. Recent diffusion- and flow-based approaches instead exploit synthetic data for supervised training, leading to significant improvements. However, these methods still face two critical challenges: synthetic supervision frequently fails to faithfully preserve identity, and the domain gap between synthetic and real data limits generalization, resulting in degraded performance in complex real-world scenarios. To address these issues, this paper first proposes ConsistentBeauty, a novel data curation pipeline that ensures makeup fidelity and strict identity consistency within the synthesized data. Second, we propose RealBeauty, a synthetic-to-real post-training framework. Beyond supervised learning on curated synthetic data, we further adapt the model to real-world scenarios through reinforcement learning and design novel verifiable rewards tailored to the makeup transfer task. It allows the model to further benefit from real makeup patterns beyond synthetic supervision. In addition, we establish a new diverse benchmark for makeup transfer, covering a wide range of skin tones, ages, genders, poses, and makeup styles, thereby enabling a more comprehensive evaluation of model performance under diverse real-world conditions. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks and demonstrates clear advantages in identity preservation and performance on complex real-world cases.

ai.tldr: 提出一种从合成数据到真实数据的妆容迁移方法，通过数据筛选和强化学习后训练，在保持身份一致性的同时提升真实场景性能。
ai.motivation: 现有基于合成数据的妆容迁移方法存在身份保持不足和合成-真实域差距问题，导致复杂真实场景性能下降。
ai.method: 提出ConsistentBeauty数据筛选管道确保合成数据中妆容保真度和身份一致性，以及RealBeauty合成到真实后训练框架，在合成监督学习后通过强化学习和定制可验证奖励适应真实场景。
ai.result: 在多个基准上达到最先进性能，在身份保持和复杂真实场景中表现优异。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过合成数据与强化学习结合提升图像编辑任务中身份保持和域泛化能力。

en.tldr: Proposes a makeup transfer method from synthetic to real data, using a data curation pipeline and reinforcement learning post-training to improve identity preservation and real-world performance.
en.motivation: Existing synthetic-data-based makeup transfer methods suffer from insufficient identity preservation and synthetic-to-real domain gap, leading to degraded performance in complex real scenarios.
en.method: Proposes ConsistentBeauty data curation pipeline for makeup fidelity and identity consistency in synthetic data, and RealBeauty synthetic-to-real post-training framework that adapts the model to real scenarios via reinforcement learning with novel verifiable rewards.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks, with clear advantages in identity preservation and complex real-world cases.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how combining synthetic data with reinforcement learning can enhance identity preservation and domain generalization in image editing tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Design task-specific verifiable reward functions to enable self-improvement of the model on unsupervised real data via reinforcement learning.
idea_spark.risk: Imperfect reward design may cause optimization bias; synthetic data quality depends on curation pipeline, potentially introducing bias.
idea_spark.inspiration: The idea of using RL to bridge synthetic-to-real domain gap can inspire other vision tasks requiring sim-to-real transfer.

papers.title: A Unified Framework for the Detection and Classification of Fatty Pancreas in Ultrasound Images
papers.summary: Non-alcoholic fatty pancreas disease (NAFPD) is an underdiagnosed condition associated with metabolic syndrome, insulin resistance, and increased risk of pancreatic cancer. Diagnosis typically relies on subjective visual assessment of ultrasound images by clinicians. We propose an end-to-end framework for automatically classifying normal versus fatty pancreas from abdominal ultrasound images. Our method employs a TransUNet-based segmentation architecture with a ResNet encoder and transformer bottleneck to delineate the pancreas and the splenic vein, followed by anatomically-guided patch extraction and patient-level classification through pairwise texture comparison. The feature engineering mimics clinical reasoning by comparing the echogenicity of peri-venous fat to the pancreatic parenchyma, providing an interpretable signal for classification. The segmentation models are initialized via domain-specific transfer learning from a liver segmentation task. We validate the full pipeline on a clinical dataset of 214 abdominal ultrasound images with 107 expert-labeled cases using 5-fold cross-validation. SVM with RBF kernel achieves a mean cross-validated accuracy of 89.7\%\,$\pm$\,1.8\% and F1 of 0.898\,$\pm$\,0.019, while the unsupervised K-Means baseline reaches 87.8\% accuracy, demonstrating that the proposed features capture the relevant clinical signal even without labeled training data. To our knowledge, this is the first end-to-end automated framework for fatty pancreas classification from ultrasound using segmentation-guided texture analysis.

papers.title: TimeLesSeg: Unified Contrast-Agnostic Cross-Sectional and Longitudinal MS Lesion Segmentation via a Stochastic Generative Model
papers.summary: Multiple sclerosis (MS) expresses substantial clinical and radiological heterogeneity, which poses significant challenges for automatic lesion segmentation. The current deep learning-based SOTA is highly susceptible to changes in both distribution, e.g., changes in scanner; as well as the structure of inputs, evident in the current divide between cross-sectional and longitudinal approaches. We introduce TimeLesSeg, a unified contrast-agnostic framework designed to segment MS lesions regardless of the presence of a temporal dimension in its inputs, with a single convolutional neural network. Our approach models pathological priors through lesion masks, which are processed together with the current scan. Cross-sectional processing is enabled by exposing the model to training cases where no prior information is available, which are modeled with an empty mask, allowing it to operate seamlessly in both scenarios. To overcome the scarcity and inconsistency of longitudinal datasets, we propose a novel generative pipeline in which patterns of lesion evolution are simulated by stochastically deforming each individual lesion with morphological operations, producing realistic prior timepoints. In parallel, we achieve contrast agnosticism through Gaussian mixture model-based domain randomization, enabling the network to experience a wide spectrum of intensity profiles. Results on three publicly available and two in-house datasets show that TimeLesSeg outperforms the contrast-agnostic state of the art on single-modality inputs across overlap- and distance-based metrics. In longitudinal processing, our method outperforms SAMSEG, and captures lesion load dynamics more accurately than both the former and LST-AI. All source code related to the development of TimeLesSeg is available at https://github.com/NeuroADaS-Lab/TimeLesSeg.

ai.tldr: 提出TimeLesSeg，一个统一的对比度无关框架，通过随机生成模型同时处理横断面和纵向的多发性硬化病灶分割。
ai.motivation: 现有方法对输入分布和结构变化敏感，且横断面与纵向方法分离，缺乏统一框架。
ai.method: 使用卷积神经网络，通过空掩码实现横断面处理，通过形态学操作随机变形病灶模拟纵向演变，并采用高斯混合模型域随机化实现对比度无关。
ai.result: 在三个公开和两个内部数据集上，单模态输入超越对比度无关SOTA，纵向处理优于SAMSEG和LST-AI。
ai.help_to_user: 提供可直接使用的统一分割工具，支持单时间点和多时间点数据，代码开源。

zh.motivation: 现有方法对输入分布和结构变化敏感，且横断面与纵向方法分离，缺乏统一框架。
zh.method: 使用卷积神经网络，通过空掩码实现横断面处理，通过形态学操作随机变形病灶模拟纵向演变，并采用高斯混合模型域随机化实现对比度无关。
zh.result: 在三个公开和两个内部数据集上，单模态输入超越对比度无关SOTA，纵向处理优于SAMSEG和LST-AI。
zh.help_to_user: 提供可直接使用的统一分割工具，支持单时间点和多时间点数据，代码开源。

idea_spark.idea: 将域随机化与病变先验结合，可进一步扩展到多模态输入或跨中心数据。
idea_spark.risk: 模拟的病变演变可能无法完全覆盖真实临床异质性，需验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用空掩码处理缺失先验信息，为半监督或弱监督学习提供新范式。

en.tldr: TimeLesSeg is a unified contrast-agnostic framework for MS lesion segmentation that handles both cross-sectional and longitudinal inputs via a stochastic generative model.
en.motivation: Existing methods are sensitive to input distribution and structure, and cross-sectional and longitudinal approaches are separate, lacking a unified framework.
en.method: Uses a CNN with empty masks for cross-sectional processing, stochastic morphological deformations to simulate lesion evolution, and Gaussian mixture model-based domain randomization for contrast agnosticism.
en.result: Outperforms contrast-agnostic SOTA on single-modality inputs across five datasets, and surpasses SAMSEG and LST-AI in longitudinal processing.
en.help_to_user: Provides a ready-to-use unified segmentation tool for both single- and multi-timepoint data, with open-source code.

idea_spark.idea: Combining domain randomization with lesion priors could be extended to multi-modal inputs or cross-center data.
idea_spark.risk: Simulated lesion evolution may not fully capture real clinical heterogeneity, requiring validation of generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using empty masks to handle missing prior information offers a new paradigm for semi-supervised or weakly supervised learning.

papers.title: UniD-Shift: Towards Unified Semantic Segmentation via Interpretable Share-Private Multimodal Decomposition
papers.summary: Semantic segmentation of large-scale 3D point clouds is crucial for applications such as autonomous driving and urban digital twins. However, the sparse sampling pattern of LiDAR and the view-dependent geometric distortion in image observations complicate cross-modal alignment and hinder stable fusion. Inspired by the fact that 2D images captured by cameras are representations of the 3D world, we recognize that the features learned from 2D and 3D segmentation share some common semantics, while other aspects remain modality-specific. This insight motivates a unified multimodal framework for joint 2D-3D semantic segmentation. We combine a SAM-based vision encoder with a SPTNet-based geometric encoder to extract complementary semantic and geometric representations. The resulting features from both modalities are explicitly decomposed into shared and private subspaces, where the shared components summarize semantic factors common to both domains, and the private components preserve properties that are unique to each modality. A lightweight attention-based fusion module aggregates the shared features into a consistent cross-modal representation, and a regularized training objective ensures both semantic alignment and subspace independence. Experiments on the SemanticKITTI and nuScenes benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements in segmentation accuracy over representative multimodal baselines, accompanied by competitive computational efficiency. Cross-domain evaluation on nuScenes USA-Singapore shows stable performance under distribution shifts, demonstrating strong generalization. The implementation code is publicly available at: https://github.com/shuaizhang69/UniD-Shift.

ai.tldr: 提出UniD-Shift框架，通过可解释的共享-私有多模态分解实现统一的2D-3D语义分割，在SemanticKITTI和nuScenes上取得一致提升。
ai.motivation: LiDAR稀疏采样与图像几何畸变导致跨模态对齐困难，现有融合方法不稳定。
ai.method: 结合SAM视觉编码器和SPTNet几何编码器提取互补特征，显式分解为共享和私有子空间，轻量注意力融合模块聚合共享特征，正则化训练保证语义对齐和子空间独立性。
ai.result: 在SemanticKITTI和nuScenes上分割精度一致提升，计算效率有竞争力，跨域评估显示强泛化能力。
ai.help_to_user: 提供统一2D-3D语义分割的实用框架，代码开源，便于复现和应用。

idea_spark.idea: 利用SAM的强语义先验辅助3D点云分割，减少对大量标注的依赖。
idea_spark.risk: 分解过程可能丢失模态间互补信息，需平衡共享与私有表示。
idea_spark.inspiration: 2D图像是3D世界的投影，启发从共享语义角度统一多模态特征。

en.tldr: Proposes UniD-Shift, a unified 2D-3D semantic segmentation framework via interpretable share-private multimodal decomposition, achieving consistent improvements on SemanticKITTI and nuScenes.
en.motivation: LiDAR sparse sampling and image geometric distortion hinder cross-modal alignment and stable fusion.
en.method: Combines SAM-based vision encoder and SPTNet-based geometric encoder, explicitly decomposes features into shared and private subspaces, lightweight attention fusion aggregates shared features, regularized training ensures alignment and independence.
en.result: Consistent segmentation accuracy improvements on SemanticKITTI and nuScenes with competitive efficiency; strong generalization on cross-domain evaluation.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical unified 2D-3D segmentation framework with open-source code for easy reproduction and application.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage SAM's strong semantic priors to aid 3D point cloud segmentation, reducing annotation dependence.
idea_spark.risk: Decomposition may lose complementary information; balance between shared and private representations is critical.
idea_spark.inspiration: 2D images as projections of 3D world inspire unifying multimodal features from shared semantics.

papers.title: AGA3DNet: Anatomy-Guided Gaussian Priors with Multi-view xLSTM for 3D Brain MRI Subtype Classification
papers.summary: Accurate 3D brain MRI subtype classification benefits from both localized anatomical cues and long-range contextual reasoning. We present AGA3DNet, a report-grounded framework that incorporates brief anatomical phrases extracted from radiology reports as a soft anatomical prior channel and fuses it with a lightweight 3D CNN and multi-view xLSTM aggregation. Specifically, extracted anatomical phrases are mapped to atlas-defined regions and converted into smooth spatial priors using a signed-distance transform followed by Gaussian weighting, providing interpretable, anatomy-grounded guidance without requiring dense voxel annotations. We evaluate AGA3DNet on a retrospective institutional brain MRI cohort for abnormal subtype discrimination and compare against reproducible 3D classification baselines. AGA3DNet achieves improved overall balance across performance metrics and supports clinically interpretable localization through the prior channel. We discuss limitations related to single-cohort evaluation and the lack of large-scale public brain MRI datasets paired with radiology reports under broadly usable terms.

ai.tldr: 提出AGA3DNet，利用放射学报告中的解剖短语生成高斯先验，结合3D CNN和多视角xLSTM进行脑MRI亚型分类。
ai.motivation: 现有3D脑MRI分类方法缺乏对局部解剖线索和长程上下文推理的有效结合。
ai.method: 从放射学报告中提取解剖短语，映射到图谱区域，通过符号距离变换和高斯加权生成软解剖先验，与轻量3D CNN及多视角xLSTM融合。
ai.result: 在回顾性脑MRI队列上，AGA3DNet在异常亚型判别中实现了更均衡的性能指标，并支持可解释定位。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需密集体素标注即可引入解剖先验的框架，提升分类准确性和可解释性。

idea_spark.idea: 将放射学报告中的语义信息转化为空间先验，与序列模型结合，实现解剖引导的3D分类。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖高质量放射学报告，缺乏大规模公开数据集可能限制泛化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从报告到先验的映射思路可启发其他弱监督医学影像分析任务。

en.tldr: Proposes AGA3DNet, which uses anatomical phrases from radiology reports to generate Gaussian priors, combined with a 3D CNN and multi-view xLSTM for brain MRI subtype classification.
en.motivation: Existing 3D brain MRI classification methods lack effective integration of localized anatomical cues and long-range contextual reasoning.
en.method: Extracts anatomical phrases from radiology reports, maps them to atlas-defined regions, and converts them into soft spatial priors via signed-distance transform and Gaussian weighting, fused with a lightweight 3D CNN and multi-view xLSTM.
en.result: On a retrospective brain MRI cohort, AGA3DNet achieves balanced performance metrics for abnormal subtype discrimination and supports interpretable localization.
en.help_to_user: Provides a framework to incorporate anatomical priors without dense voxel annotations, improving classification accuracy and interpretability.

idea_spark.idea: Transforms semantic information from radiology reports into spatial priors combined with sequential models for anatomy-guided 3D classification.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on high-quality radiology reports; lack of large-scale public datasets may limit generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: The report-to-prior mapping approach can inspire other weakly supervised medical image analysis tasks.

papers.title: The Pseudo-Analytic Mass of a Beltrami-Vekua Equation
papers.summary: Every smooth first-order real planar elliptic system admits a universal complex form $w_{\bar z} - μw_z + \mathcal{A} w + \mathcal{B} \bar w = \mathcal{F}$, which we call the Beltrami-Vekua equation: the data $(μ, \mathcal{A}, \mathcal{B}, \mathcal{F})$ are produced from the original system by algebraic operations and differentiations, with no auxiliary PDE. On this space we study the joint action of multiplicative gauges $w \mapsto φw$ and orientation-preserving diffeomorphisms. Our main result is that the 2-form $Θ= |\mathcal{B}|^2 / (1 - |μ|^2) \, dx \, dy$ is gauge-invariant and pulls back covariantly under diffeomorphisms; its form is forced, with $|\mathcal{B}|^2$ the unique $\mathcal{B}$-quadratic combination invariant under $\mathcal{B} \mapsto \mathcal{B}φ/\barφ$ and $1 - |μ|^2$ the conformal distortion factor from the diffeomorphism law for $μ$. The total mass $\mathcal{M}(D) = \int_ΩΘ$, the \emph{pseudo-analytic mass}, vanishes precisely on the analytic class $\mathcal{B} \equiv 0$ and separates a continuous family of pairwise inequivalent pseudo-analytic equations on the disk. As a by-product, Vekua's two-stage reduction - uniformization then gauge elimination - requires only one variable-coefficient PDE solve: the Beltrami diffeomorphism supplies the integrating factor for a flat $\bar\partial$-equation.

ai.tldr: 本文研究Beltrami-Vekua方程，发现一个规范不变且协变的2-形式Θ，其积分定义为伪解析质量，该质量在解析类上为零，并区分了圆盘上不等价的伪解析方程族。
ai.motivation: 统一处理一阶实平面椭圆系统，并寻找其规范不变和微分同胚协变的量，以区分不同的伪解析方程类。
ai.method: 通过乘法规范变换和保定向微分同胚的联合作用，推导出2-形式Θ的规范不变性和协变性，并定义伪解析质量。
ai.result: 伪解析质量在解析类上为零，且能区分圆盘上连续族的不等价伪解析方程；Vekua两步约化只需一次变系数PDE求解。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解Beltrami-Vekua方程的结构不变量，以及如何通过伪解析质量分类椭圆系统。

idea_spark.idea: 利用伪解析质量作为分类工具，可能用于研究非线性椭圆方程或几何流中的不变量。
idea_spark.risk: 该质量定义依赖于特定规范，推广到高维或非线性情形可能不保持协变性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从规范场论中质量的概念出发，类比到椭圆系统的分类问题。

zh.motivation: 统一处理一阶实平面椭圆系统，并寻找其规范不变和微分同胚协变的量，以区分不同的伪解析方程类。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解Beltrami-Vekua方程的结构不变量，以及如何通过伪解析质量分类椭圆系统。

idea_spark.idea: 利用伪解析质量作为分类工具，可能用于研究非线性椭圆方程或几何流中的不变量。
idea_spark.risk: 该质量定义依赖于特定规范，推广到高维或非线性情形可能不保持协变性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从规范场论中质量的概念出发，类比到椭圆系统的分类问题。

en.tldr: This paper studies the Beltrami-Vekua equation, discovers a gauge-invariant and diffeomorphism-covariant 2-form Θ, whose integral defines the pseudo-analytic mass that vanishes exactly on the analytic class and distinguishes a continuous family of inequivalent pseudo-analytic equations on the disk.
en.motivation: To unify first-order real planar elliptic systems and find gauge-invariant and diffeomorphism-covariant quantities to classify inequivalent pseudo-analytic equations.
en.method: By studying the joint action of multiplicative gauges and orientation-preserving diffeomorphisms, derive the gauge invariance and covariance of the 2-form Θ and define the pseudo-analytic mass.
en.result: The pseudo-analytic mass vanishes on the analytic class and separates a continuous family of inequivalent pseudo-analytic equations on the disk; Vekua's two-stage reduction requires only one variable-coefficient PDE solve.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand structural invariants of Beltrami-Vekua equations and how to classify elliptic systems via pseudo-analytic mass.

idea_spark.idea: Use pseudo-analytic mass as a classification tool, possibly for studying nonlinear elliptic equations or invariants in geometric flows.
idea_spark.risk: The mass definition depends on a specific gauge; generalization to higher dimensions or nonlinear settings may not preserve covariance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the concept of mass in gauge field theory, analogously applied to classification problems in elliptic systems.

papers.title: AccelSync: Verifying Synchronization Coverage in Accelerator Pipeline Programs
papers.summary: AI accelerator operators are compiled into multi-stage pipeline programs where DMA, vector, matrix, and scalar units execute concurrently on shared on-chip buffers. A missing or misplaced synchronization primitive introduces hardware-visible data races that escape both simulation and golden testing, because neither models the accelerator's cross-unit visibility semantics. We formalize accelerator pipeline programs as a restricted concurrent language, define a parameterized hardware event semantics with three ordering relations -- program order, synchronization order, and barrier order -- and reduce the correctness question to barrier sufficiency: whether every cross-unit write-read pair on the same buffer is ordered by happens-before. Here "barrier" denotes an abstract ordering primitive in the model, covering vendor pipe barriers, hard-event synchronization, and equivalent frontend-normalized synchronization points. We prove that barrier sufficiency is decidable in $O(|E|^2)$ time and that our checker is both sound and complete under the modeled semantics. We implement AccelSync, a static verification tool instantiated for Ascend 910B2 and Cambricon MLU370 by changing only the hardware model. On 6,292 production kernels from the CANN operator library, AccelSync identifies 3 previously unknown synchronization hazards -- one matching a hazard class for which we observed nondeterministic outputs on Ascend 910B2 under a specific toolkit/driver configuration (CANN 8.0.RC3), though this observation was not reproducible after a subsequent driver upgrade -- and on 120 LLM-generated kernels it flags a 19.2% defect rate (95% CI: [13.0%, 27.4%]). A mutation study on 688 non-equivalent mutants yields 100% detection, and a head-to-head comparison shows AccelSync detects hazards that Huawei's runtime sanitizer msSanitizer misses, at 400x lower cost per kernel.

ai.tldr: 提出AccelSync，一种静态验证工具，用于检测AI加速器流水线程序中的同步缺失或错位导致的硬件可见数据竞争。
ai.motivation: 现有仿真和黄金测试无法建模加速器的跨单元可见性语义，导致同步缺陷逃逸。
ai.method: 将加速器流水线程序形式化为受限并发语言，定义参数化硬件事件语义（程序序、同步序、屏障序），将正确性归约为屏障充分性，并证明其可判定性。
ai.result: 在CANN算子库的6292个生产内核中发现3个未知同步风险，在120个LLM生成内核中缺陷率达19.2%，突变检测率100%，且比华为运行时消毒器msSanitizer成本低400倍。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助开发者自动验证加速器流水线程序中的同步完整性，避免硬件数据竞争。

idea_spark.idea: 将同步验证问题转化为屏障充分性的可判定检查，并实现高效静态分析。
idea_spark.risk: 硬件模型参数化可能无法覆盖所有厂商的同步原语，需持续适配。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从硬件事件语义出发，将并发正确性简化为有序关系检查，启发其他领域的形式化验证。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助开发者自动验证加速器流水线程序中的同步完整性，避免硬件数据竞争。

en.tldr: AccelSync is a static verification tool that detects missing or misplaced synchronization primitives in AI accelerator pipeline programs, which cause hardware-visible data races.
en.motivation: Simulation and golden testing fail to model cross-unit visibility semantics of accelerators, allowing synchronization defects to escape.
en.method: Formalizes accelerator pipeline programs as a restricted concurrent language, defines parameterized hardware event semantics with program order, synchronization order, and barrier order, and reduces correctness to barrier sufficiency, proven decidable in O(|E|^2) time.
en.result: Found 3 unknown synchronization hazards in 6,292 production kernels from CANN operator library, 19.2% defect rate on 120 LLM-generated kernels, 100% detection on 688 non-equivalent mutants, and 400x lower cost than Huawei's msSanitizer.
en.help_to_user: Helps developers automatically verify synchronization coverage in accelerator pipeline programs to prevent hardware data races.

idea_spark.idea: Reduces synchronization verification to a decidable barrier sufficiency check with efficient static analysis.
idea_spark.risk: Parameterized hardware model may not cover all vendor-specific synchronization primitives, requiring continuous adaptation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging hardware event semantics to simplify concurrent correctness to ordering relation checks inspires formal verification in other domains.

papers.title: Not All Tokens Need 40 Steps: Heterogeneous Step Allocation in Diffusion Transformers for Efficient Video Generation
papers.summary: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have achieved state-of-the-art video generation quality, but they incur immense computational cost because standard inference applies the same number of denoising steps uniformly to every token in the sequence. It is well known that human vision ignores vast amounts of redundant motion. Why, then, do our densest models treat every spatiotemporal token with equal priority? In this paper, we introduce Heterogeneous Step Allocation (HSA), a training-free inference algorithm that assigns varying step budgets to different spatiotemporal tokens based on their velocity dynamics. To resolve the resulting sequence-length mismatch without sacrificing global context, HSA introduces a KV-cache synchronization mechanism that allows active tokens to attend to the full sequence while entirely bypassing inactive tokens. Furthermore, we derive a cached Euler update that advances the latent states of skipped tokens in a single operation without additional model evaluations. We evaluate HSA on the Wan-2 and LTX-2 models for both text-to-video (T2V) and image-to-video (I2V) generation. Our results demonstrate that HSA significantly outperforms previous state-of-the-art caching methods and the vanilla Flow Matching baseline, especially at aggressive acceleration regimes (e.g., 50% and 25% runtimes). Crucially, HSA achieves a superior quality-runtime Pareto frontier without the need for expensive offline profiling, robustly preserving structural integrity and generation quality even under tight computational budgets.   Project page: https://ernestchu.github.io/hsa

ai.tldr: 提出异质步分配（HSA）算法，根据令牌的运动速度动态分配去噪步数，在不额外训练的情况下加速视频生成。
ai.motivation: 现有扩散变换器对所有时空令牌使用相同的去噪步数，导致大量冗余计算，而人类视觉会忽略多余运动。
ai.method: 基于速度动力学为不同令牌分配不同步预算；通过KV缓存同步机制让活跃令牌关注完整序列，同时跳过非活跃令牌；推导缓存欧拉更新一步推进跳过令牌的隐状态。
ai.result: 在Wan-2和LTX-2模型上，HSA在50%和25%运行时下显著优于先前缓存方法和原始流匹配基线，实现质量-运行时帕累托前沿。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户在计算资源有限时高效生成高质量视频，无需离线配置。

idea_spark.idea: 结合令牌重要性动态调整计算预算，并利用缓存避免重复模型评估。
idea_spark.risk: 极端加速下可能丢失细微运动细节；依赖速度估计的准确性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类视觉冗余运动忽略启发，将生物感知原理融入模型推理优化。

zh.tldr: 提出异质步分配（HSA）算法，根据令牌的运动速度动态分配去噪步数，在不额外训练的情况下加速视频生成。
zh.motivation: 现有扩散变换器对所有时空令牌使用相同的去噪步数，导致大量冗余计算，而人类视觉会忽略多余运动。
zh.method: 基于速度动力学为不同令牌分配不同步预算；通过KV缓存同步机制让活跃令牌关注完整序列，同时跳过非活跃令牌；推导缓存欧拉更新一步推进跳过令牌的隐状态。
zh.result: 在Wan-2和LTX-2模型上，HSA在50%和25%运行时下显著优于先前缓存方法和原始流匹配基线，实现质量-运行时帕累托前沿。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户在计算资源有限时高效生成高质量视频，无需离线配置。

en.tldr: Proposes Heterogeneous Step Allocation (HSA), a training-free inference algorithm that assigns varying denoising steps to tokens based on velocity dynamics, accelerating video generation in Diffusion Transformers.
en.motivation: Existing Diffusion Transformers apply uniform denoising steps to all tokens, causing massive redundant computation, while human vision ignores redundant motion.
en.method: Allocates step budgets per token based on velocity dynamics; uses KV-cache synchronization for active tokens to attend full sequence while skipping inactive ones; derives cached Euler update to advance skipped tokens in one operation.
en.result: On Wan-2 and LTX-2 models, HSA significantly outperforms prior caching methods and vanilla Flow Matching baseline at 50% and 25% runtimes, achieving a superior quality-runtime Pareto frontier.
en.help_to_user: Enables efficient high-quality video generation under tight computational budgets without offline profiling.

idea_spark.idea: Dynamically adjust compute budget based on token importance and use caching to avoid redundant model evaluations.
idea_spark.risk: Extreme acceleration may miss fine motion details; relies on accuracy of velocity estimation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by human vision ignoring redundant motion, applying biological perception principles to model inference optimization.

papers.title: What is ... Robin harmonic measure?
papers.summary: We present here the Robin boundary condition and its significance in mathematics and physics.

ai.tldr: 本文介绍了Robin边界条件及其在数学和物理中的重要性。
ai.motivation: 阐述Robin边界条件的基本概念及其在数学物理中的核心作用。
ai.method: 通过理论推导和概念阐述，解释Robin调和测度的定义与性质。
ai.result: 明确了Robin边界条件在调和测度理论中的角色。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解Robin边界条件与经典Dirichlet/Neumann条件的区别与联系。

idea_spark.idea: 探索Robin调和测度在非均匀介质或分形边界上的行为。
idea_spark.risk: 理论推导可能缺乏具体应用场景的验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将Robin条件与随机过程（如反射布朗运动）结合研究。

en.tldr: This paper introduces the Robin boundary condition and its significance in mathematics and physics.
en.motivation: To explain the fundamental concept of Robin boundary condition and its role in mathematical physics.
en.method: Theoretical exposition and conceptual derivation of Robin harmonic measure properties.
en.result: Clarifies the role of Robin boundary condition in harmonic measure theory.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the differences and connections between Robin and classical Dirichlet/Neumann conditions.

idea_spark.idea: Explore the behavior of Robin harmonic measure on heterogeneous media or fractal boundaries.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical derivations may lack validation in concrete applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine Robin condition with stochastic processes (e.g., reflected Brownian motion).

papers.title: Exact Regular-Constrained Variable-Order Markov Generation via Sparse Context-State Belief Propagation
papers.summary: Variable-order Markov models generate sequences over a finite alphabet by conditioning each symbol on the longest available suffix of the generated history. Regular constraints, by contrast, describe finite-horizon control requirements by an automaton: fixed positions, forced endings, metrical patterns, and forbidden copied fragments are all special cases. Existing exact methods already handle regular constraints with belief propagation for first-order Markov chains. The contribution here is the variable-order extension: identifying the state space on which the existing BP-regular machinery must be run when the generator is a variable-order/backoff model. A first-order constraint layer can enforce useful support conditions, but it computes future mass after merging histories that a variable-order generator deliberately keeps distinct. We formalize this mismatch and give the sparse construction obtained by replacing the first-order Markov state with the observed context state, then taking the standard product with the regular constraint automaton. For a fixed trained context graph and automaton, inference is linear in the sequence horizon; in general it is polynomial in the number of reachable product edges. This gives the correct variable-order distribution conditioned on regular constraints without expanding to all K-tuples. The same finite-source interface supports reversible data augmentation by inverse count lookup, matching materialized transposition augmentation without storing transformed corpora. We also separate exact BP inference from generation-time backoff policies, such as singleton avoidance, whose stochastic semantics must be made explicit if exactness is claimed.

ai.tldr: 提出一种稀疏上下文-状态置信传播方法，在变阶马尔可夫生成中精确满足正则约束，无需展开所有K元组。
ai.motivation: 现有精确方法仅支持一阶马尔可夫链的正则约束，而变阶模型因保留历史区分导致状态空间不匹配，无法直接应用。
ai.method: 将一阶马尔可夫状态替换为观测到的上下文状态，并与正则约束自动机做标准乘积，得到稀疏乘积图，在此图上运行置信传播。
ai.result: 对于固定上下文图和自动机，推理时间与序列长度线性相关；一般情况多项式于可达乘积边数。支持可逆数据增强，无需存储变换语料。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在变阶马尔可夫生成中精确施加正则约束（如固定位置、强制结尾、禁止重复片段），并实现高效推理。

idea_spark.idea: 将变阶马尔可夫模型的后退策略（如避免单例）与精确置信传播分离，要求显式随机语义以保证精确性。
idea_spark.risk: 稀疏乘积图可能在某些复杂约束下状态空间仍然较大，影响实际效率；后退策略的显式化可能增加模型设计复杂度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受一阶马尔可夫链置信传播处理正则约束的启发，通过状态空间重定义将变阶模型纳入同一框架。

en.tldr: Proposes a sparse context-state belief propagation method to exactly enforce regular constraints in variable-order Markov generation without expanding all K-tuples.
en.motivation: Existing exact methods only handle regular constraints for first-order Markov chains; variable-order models keep distinct histories, causing a state-space mismatch.
en.method: Replace the first-order Markov state with the observed context state, take the standard product with the regular constraint automaton, and run belief propagation on the resulting sparse product graph.
en.result: Inference is linear in the sequence horizon for a fixed context graph and automaton; polynomial in the number of reachable product edges in general. Supports reversible data augmentation without storing transformed corpora.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to exactly enforce regular constraints (e.g., fixed positions, forced endings, forbidden copied fragments) in variable-order Markov generation with efficient inference.

idea_spark.idea: Separate backoff policies (e.g., singleton avoidance) from exact belief propagation, requiring explicit stochastic semantics for exactness claims.
idea_spark.risk: The sparse product graph may still have large state space under complex constraints, affecting practical efficiency; explicit backoff semantics may increase model design complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by belief propagation for regular constraints in first-order Markov chains, redefining the state space to accommodate variable-order models within the same framework.

papers.title: SpecBlock: Block-Iterative Speculative Decoding with Dynamic Tree Drafting
papers.summary: Speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference by drafting a tree of candidate continuations and verifying it in one target forward. Existing drafters fall into two camps with opposite weaknesses. Autoregressive drafters such as EAGLE-3 preserve dependence along each draft path but call the drafter once per tree depth, making drafting a non-trivial share of per-iteration latency. Parallel drafters cut drafter calls by predicting multiple future positions in one forward, but each position is predicted without seeing the others, producing paths the verifier rejects. In this paper, we propose SpecBlock, a block-iterative drafter that combines path dependence with cheap drafting. Each drafter forward produces K dependent positions and we call this a block. The draft tree grows through repeated block expansions. Two mechanisms explicitly carry path dependence to keep later draft positions accurate. Within each block, a layer-wise shift carries the previous position's hidden state into every decoder layer. Across blocks, each new block can start from any position of the previous block, inheriting its hidden state to extend the path. To spend verifier budget where acceptance is likely, a co-trained rank head replaces the fixed top-k tree by allocating per-position branching during drafting. To avoid training the drafter on prefixes it never produces at inference, a valid-prefix mask drops the loss at later positions once an earlier one is wrong. Beyond static drafting, a cost-aware bandit at deployment uses free verifier feedback to update the drafter selectively, only when the expected throughput gain exceeds the update cost. Experiments show that SpecBlock improves mean speedup by 8-13% over EAGLE-3 at 44-52% of its drafting cost, and cost-aware adaptation extends this lead to 11-19%.

ai.tldr: 提出一种块迭代推测解码方法SpecBlock，通过块内层间移位和块间隐藏状态继承保持路径依赖，结合协同训练的排序头和有效前缀掩码，以及部署时的成本感知自适应，在降低起草成本的同时提升加速比。
ai.motivation: 现有推测解码的起草器要么是自回归的（如EAGLE-3），每次深度调用一次起草器，延迟高；要么是并行的，一次预测多个位置但缺乏路径依赖，导致验证器拒绝率高。需要一种既能保持路径依赖又成本低廉的起草方案。
ai.method: SpecBlock采用块迭代起草：每个起草器前向生成K个依赖位置（一个块），通过层间移位传递前一个位置的隐藏状态；块间可从上一块任意位置继承隐藏状态扩展路径。协同训练的排序头替代固定top-k树，在起草时动态分配分支。有效前缀掩码避免在推理中从未出现的前缀上训练。部署时，成本感知的bandit根据验证器反馈选择性更新起草器。
ai.result: 在实验中，SpecBlock相比EAGLE-3平均加速比提升8-13%，起草成本仅为EAGLE-3的44-52%；成本感知自适应进一步将优势扩大到11-19%。
ai.help_to_user: 如果你正在优化LLM推理速度，SpecBlock提供了一种更高效的推测解码方案，尤其适合需要低延迟的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将块迭代与强化学习结合，让起草器根据验证器反馈在线调整块大小和分支策略，实现更细粒度的自适应。
idea_spark.risk: 块迭代可能增加实现复杂度，且动态分支分配需要额外训练排序头，可能对资源有限的应用不友好。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受块迭代和成本感知bandit启发，可探索在分布式推理系统中动态调整推测深度和分支数，以平衡通信开销和计算效率。

en.tldr: Proposes SpecBlock, a block-iterative speculative decoding method that maintains path dependence via layer-wise shift and cross-block hidden state inheritance, combined with a co-trained rank head and valid-prefix mask, plus cost-aware bandit adaptation at deployment, improving speedup while reducing drafting cost.
en.motivation: Existing drafters for speculative decoding are either autoregressive (e.g., EAGLE-3) with high latency due to per-depth drafter calls, or parallel with low cost but no path dependence, leading to high rejection by the verifier. A method that combines path dependence with cheap drafting is needed.
en.method: SpecBlock uses block-iterative drafting: each drafter forward produces K dependent positions (a block) via layer-wise shift that carries the previous position's hidden state; across blocks, a new block can start from any position of the previous block, inheriting its hidden state. A co-trained rank head replaces fixed top-k tree by dynamically allocating per-position branching. A valid-prefix mask drops loss at later positions when an earlier one is wrong. At deployment, a cost-aware bandit selectively updates the drafter based on verifier feedback.
en.result: Experiments show SpecBlock improves mean speedup by 8-13% over EAGLE-3 at 44-52% of its drafting cost, and cost-aware adaptation extends this lead to 11-19%.
en.help_to_user: If you are optimizing LLM inference speed, SpecBlock offers a more efficient speculative decoding approach, especially for low-latency scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Combine block-iterative drafting with reinforcement learning to allow the drafter to online adjust block size and branching strategy based on verifier feedback for finer-grained adaptation.
idea_spark.risk: Block-iterative may increase implementation complexity, and dynamic branching requires additional training of a rank head, which may be less friendly for resource-constrained applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by block-iterative and cost-aware bandit, one could explore dynamically adjusting speculation depth and branching in distributed inference systems to balance communication overhead and computational efficiency.

papers.title: A Diffeological Construction of Singer's Universal Connection
papers.summary: We provide a rigorous construction of I.M. Singer's universal connection, a natural connection on a bundle of paths associated to any manifold, using the theory of diffeology. Furthermore, we generalize the universal connection to the diffeological setting, which enables the reconstruction of diffeological principal bundles with connections from their holonomy representations. We show that any two diffeological bundle-connection pairs with conjugate holonomy representations must be equivalent in a certain sense. These constructions are functorial in that, ultimately, our results can be summarized as an equivalence of categories between the so-called holonomy category and the category of diffeological bundle-connection pairs.

ai.tldr: 利用微分几何中的微分学理论，严格构造了Singer的通用联络，并将其推广到微分学框架，实现了从和乐表示重建微分学主丛联络，并证明了范畴等价。
ai.motivation: 为Singer通用联络提供严格的微分学构造，并推广到微分学设置，以建立和乐表示与微分学丛-联络对之间的对应关系。
ai.method: 采用微分学理论构造路径丛上的自然联络，并定义微分学主丛联络的范畴，通过和乐表示建立范畴等价。
ai.result: 成功构造了Singer通用联络，证明了微分学丛-联络对与和乐范畴之间的等价性，且共轭和乐表示对应的丛-联络对在某种意义下等价。
ai.help_to_user: 为微分几何和数学物理中联络与和乐的研究提供了严格的微分学框架，有助于理解联络的泛性质。

idea_spark.idea: 利用微分学范畴等价性，可尝试将和乐表示作为数据来重建或分类微分学主丛联络。
idea_spark.risk: 微分学框架可能过于抽象，实际计算或应用时需额外验证可操作性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将微分学与范畴论结合，为几何结构提供新的分类工具。

en.tldr: Using diffeology, we rigorously construct Singer's universal connection on a bundle of paths, generalize it to diffeological principal bundles, and prove an equivalence of categories between the holonomy category and diffeological bundle-connection pairs.
en.motivation: To provide a rigorous diffeological construction of Singer's universal connection and extend it to diffeological settings, establishing a correspondence between holonomy representations and bundle-connection pairs.
en.method: We employ diffeology to construct a natural connection on the path bundle, define the category of diffeological principal bundles with connections, and prove a categorical equivalence via holonomy representations.
en.result: We construct Singer's universal connection, show that diffeological bundle-connection pairs with conjugate holonomy representations are equivalent, and establish an equivalence of categories between the holonomy category and the category of diffeological bundle-connection pairs.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous diffeological framework for studying connections and holonomy in differential geometry and mathematical physics, clarifying the universal property of connections.

idea_spark.idea: Using the categorical equivalence, one could attempt to reconstruct or classify diffeological principal bundle connections from holonomy data.
idea_spark.risk: The diffeological framework may be too abstract; practical computations or applications may require additional verification of feasibility.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining diffeology with category theory offers a new classification tool for geometric structures.

papers.title: TriDE: Triangle-Consistent Translation Directions for Global Camera Pose Estimation
papers.summary: Pairwise translation directions are a key input to camera location estimation in global structure-from-motion. Existing estimators usually process each image pair independently, producing directions that may be locally plausible but inconsistent with the other relative directions in the viewing graph. To jointly estimate the direction, we propose TriDE, which exploits camera-triangle consistency as an efficient higher-order verification signal. Instead of solving a costly global nonlinear optimization problem that is sensitive to initialization, TriDE refines unreliable pairwise directions through message passing between directions and their incident weighted triangles. This information propagation strategy enables us to establish a strong phase-transition bound for exact recovery under a realistic random corruption model. Experiments on real image graphs show that TriDE improves direction accuracy by a large margin and yields better downstream camera locations, providing a practical link between local pairwise estimation and global camera pose geometry.

ai.tldr: 提出TriDE方法，利用三角形一致性约束联合优化全局相机位姿估计中的平移方向，显著提升精度。
ai.motivation: 现有方法独立处理每对图像，导致平移方向局部合理但全局不一致。
ai.method: 通过消息传递在方向与加权三角形之间传播信息，实现高效联合优化。
ai.result: 在真实图像图上方向精度大幅提升，下游相机位置估计更准确。
ai.help_to_user: 可用于三维重建、增强现实等需要高精度相机位姿的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将局部估计与全局几何约束通过消息传递结合。
idea_spark.risk: 对噪声模型假设的鲁棒性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用图结构中的高阶信息进行联合优化。

zh.method: 通过消息传递在方向与加权三角形之间传播信息，实现高效联合优化。
zh.result: 在真实图像图上方向精度大幅提升，下游相机位置估计更准确。
zh.help_to_user: 可用于三维重建、增强现实等需要高精度相机位姿的场景。

idea_spark.risk: 对噪声模型假设的鲁棒性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用图结构中的高阶信息进行联合优化。

en.tldr: TriDE uses triangle consistency constraints to jointly refine pairwise translation directions for global camera pose estimation, achieving large accuracy improvements.
en.motivation: Existing methods process each image pair independently, yielding locally plausible but globally inconsistent directions.
en.method: Message passing between directions and weighted incident triangles enables efficient joint optimization.
en.result: Direction accuracy is significantly improved on real image graphs, leading to better downstream camera locations.
en.help_to_user: Useful for 3D reconstruction, AR, and any application requiring precise camera poses.

idea_spark.idea: Combine local estimates with global geometric constraints via message passing.
idea_spark.risk: Robustness under different noise models needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage higher-order information in graph structures for joint optimization.

papers.title: Dynamic Mode Decomposition along Depth in Vision Transformers
papers.summary: Recent work has shown that contiguous vision transformer (ViT) blocks (a) can be replaced by a linear map and (b) organize into recurrent phases of computation. We ask whether these observations coincide: does ViT depth implement approximately \textit{autonomous linear} dynamics, admitting a single operator $K$ applied recurrently across a contiguous span? We test this using Dynamic Mode Decomposition (DMD), which fits $K$ from selected, consecutive hidden-state pairs and predicts $p$ steps ahead via $K^p$. On four pretrained DINO ViTs, we study the regularization, rank, and calibration budget required for stable fitting. For short spans ($p \leq 4$), $K^p$ tracks an unconstrained endpoint map to within $0.02$ cosine similarity on DINOv3-H/16+, while also recovering intermediate activations at each skipped block. At early cut starts, the fitted operators compress to rank $\ll d$ with minimal calibration data, and across tokens, \texttt{cls} is most amenable to linearization; both properties decay monotonically with depth. Yet this local fidelity does not transfer downstream. At the final hidden state, after propagating through the remaining blocks, an identity baseline becomes competitive.

ai.tldr: 本文研究视觉Transformer（ViT）深度是否近似自治线性动力学，使用动态模态分解（DMD）拟合连续隐藏状态对，并预测中间激活。
ai.motivation: 先前工作发现ViT块可被线性映射替代并形成循环计算阶段，本文探究这些观察是否一致：ViT深度是否实现近似自治线性动力学。
ai.method: 采用动态模态分解（DMD），从选定的连续隐藏状态对拟合线性算子K，并通过K^p预测p步后的隐藏状态。在四个预训练DINO ViT上测试正则化、秩和校准预算。
ai.result: 短跨度（p≤4）时，K^p与无约束端点映射的余弦相似度在0.02以内，且能恢复中间激活。早期切割时算子秩压缩至远小于d，cls令牌最易线性化，但局部保真度不传递到下游。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解ViT内部计算的可线性化程度，为模型压缩和加速提供理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 利用DMD拟合的线性算子设计轻量级预测模块，跳过部分ViT块以加速推理。
idea_spark.risk: 局部线性化可能不适用于深层或复杂任务，需验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受循环阶段观察启发，探索ViT深度中的自治线性动力学。

en.tldr: This paper investigates whether vision transformer (ViT) depth implements approximately autonomous linear dynamics, using Dynamic Mode Decomposition (DMD) to fit a linear operator from consecutive hidden-state pairs and predict intermediate activations.
en.motivation: Previous work showed that contiguous ViT blocks can be replaced by a linear map and organize into recurrent phases; this work asks whether these observations coincide, i.e., whether ViT depth exhibits autonomous linear dynamics.
en.method: Dynamic Mode Decomposition (DMD) is applied to fit a linear operator K from selected consecutive hidden-state pairs, and K^p predicts p steps ahead. Experiments are conducted on four pretrained DINO ViTs, studying regularization, rank, and calibration budget.
en.result: For short spans (p ≤ 4), K^p tracks an unconstrained endpoint map within 0.02 cosine similarity and recovers intermediate activations. At early cut starts, fitted operators compress to rank ≪ d with minimal calibration data; cls token is most amenable to linearization, but local fidelity does not transfer downstream.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the degree of linearizability in ViT internal computations, providing theoretical basis for model compression and acceleration.

idea_spark.idea: Use the fitted linear operator from DMD to design lightweight prediction modules that skip some ViT blocks for faster inference.
idea_spark.risk: Local linearization may not generalize to deeper layers or complex tasks; generalization needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the observation of recurrent phases, exploring autonomous linear dynamics in ViT depth.

papers.title: TajPersLexon: A Tajik-Persian Lexical Resource and Hybrid Model for Cross-Script Low-Resource NLP
papers.summary: This work introduces TajPersLexon, a curated Tajik--Persian parallel lexical resource of 40,112 word and short-phrase pairs for cross-script lexical retrieval, transliteration, and alignment in low-resource settings. We conduct a comprehensive CPU-only benchmark comparing three methodological families: (i) a lightweight hybrid pipeline, (ii) neural sequence-to-sequence models, and (iii) retrieval methods. Our evaluation establishes that the task is essentially solvable, with neural and retrieval baselines achieving 98-99% top-1 accuracy. Crucially, we demonstrate that while large multilingual sentence transformers fail on this exact lexical matching, our interpretable hybrid model offers a favorable accuracy-efficiency trade-off for practical applications, achieving 96.4% accuracy in an OCR post-correction task. All experiments use fixed random seeds for full reproducibility. The dataset, code, and models will be publicly released.

ai.tldr: 提出了一个包含40,112对塔吉克语-波斯语词汇的平行资源TajPersLexon，并在CPU环境下比较了混合流水线、神经序列到序列模型和检索方法，发现神经和检索基线达到98-99%的top-1准确率，而可解释的混合模型在OCR后校正任务中达到96.4%准确率，兼顾了准确性和效率。
ai.motivation: 塔吉克语和波斯语使用不同文字系统，但词汇高度相似，现有大规模多语言句子变换器在精确词汇匹配上表现不佳，需要专门的低资源跨文字词汇资源和方法。
ai.method: 构建了40,112对词汇/短语的平行资源，并设计了三种方法族：轻量级混合流水线、神经序列到序列模型和检索方法，所有实验在CPU上使用固定随机种子进行。
ai.result: 神经和检索基线达到98-99% top-1准确率；混合模型在OCR后校正任务中达到96.4%准确率，且具有更好的可解释性和效率。
ai.help_to_user: 为塔吉克语-波斯语跨文字NLP任务（如词汇检索、音译、对齐）提供了基准数据集和可复现的实验结果，并推荐了适合实际应用的混合模型。

idea_spark.idea: 将混合模型与OCR后校正结合，可构建端到端的跨文字文档数字化系统，用于历史文献或多文字地区的文本处理。
idea_spark.risk: 混合模型依赖手工设计的规则或特征，可能难以扩展到词汇差异较大的语言对；数据集规模较小，可能影响泛化能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 在低资源场景下，可解释的轻量级方法有时比大规模预训练模型更实用，启发我们关注效率与准确性的平衡。

zh.help_to_user: 为塔吉克语-波斯语跨文字NLP任务（如词汇检索、音译、对齐）提供了基准数据集和可复现的实验结果，并推荐了适合实际应用的混合模型。
