en.tldr: Proxy3D generates compact 3D proxy representations for VLMs via semantic clustering and alignment, achieving competitive results on 3D tasks with only video frames as input.
en.motivation: Existing VLMs for 3D suffer from either spatial inconsistency (correspondence-based) or low efficiency (representation-based), calling for a compact yet comprehensive 3D visual representation.
en.method: Extract scene features with semantic and geometric encoders, perform semantic-aware clustering to obtain 3D proxies, and align them with the VLM via multi-stage training on the curated SpaceSpan dataset.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art or competitive performance on 3D VQA, visual grounding, and general spatial intelligence benchmarks while using shorter vision sequences.
en.help_to_user: Helps users achieve efficient 3D reasoning with fewer visual tokens, beneficial for resource-constrained applications like robotics and autonomous driving.

idea_spark.idea: Compress 3D scenes into a small set of semantic proxies, replacing dense pixel or voxel representations to drastically reduce VLM sequence length.
idea_spark.risk: Clustering quality depends on the semantic encoder, which may lose details in complex scenes; multi-stage training requires careful alignment loss design.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by point cloud downsampling and token compression in vision transformers, fusing 3D geometry and semantics into learnable proxies.

papers.title: MORPH-U: Multi-Objective Resilient Motion Planning for V2X-Enabled Autonomous Driving in High-Uncertainty Environments via Simulation
papers.summary: V2X can warn an autonomous vehicle about hazards beyond line-of-sight, but it also brings uncertainty: messages may be delayed, dropped, or even forged. Meanwhile, map knowledge may change during a trip, forcing the vehicle to replan under tight real-time budgets. This paper studies how to make motion planning and low-level control robust to such uncertain, event-driven updates. We present MORPH-U, a CARLA-based closed-loop stack that fuses LiDAR/radar/camera with V2X (CAM/DENM) into a Local Dynamic Map (LDM) and triggers Hybrid-A* replanning when validated hazards or map changes affect the planned route. We expose the planning/control trade-offs via a multi-objective formulation over tracking error, safety margin (minimum TTC), responsiveness, and smoothness, and select operating points using Pareto-frontier analysis. To avoid unsafe replanning from faulty V2X triggers, MORPH-U adds a lightweight Byzantine-inspired acceptance gate that combines a quorum rule with an on-board sensor veto. Experiments in dynamic CARLA scenarios show that V2X-augmented LDM improves downstream safety, Pareto tuning provides controllable accuracy-comfort trade-offs, and the gate prevents replanning under saturated false-DENM injection ($p_{\text{attack}}=1.0$).

ai.tldr: 提出MORPH-U框架，融合V2X与本地传感器，通过混合A*重规划和拜占庭容错门控，实现高不确定性环境下的鲁棒运动规划。
ai.motivation: V2X通信存在延迟、丢包和伪造消息等不确定性，同时地图知识可能动态变化，现有方法难以在实时约束下保证安全。
ai.method: 构建CARLA闭环栈，融合LiDAR/雷达/相机与V2X消息为局部动态地图，触发混合A*重规划；采用多目标优化（跟踪误差、安全裕度、响应性、平顺性）并通过帕累托前沿选择工作点；加入拜占庭容错门控（法定人数规则+车载传感器否决）防止错误触发。
ai.result: V2X增强的LDM提升下游安全性；帕累托调优实现可控的精度-舒适度权衡；门控在饱和伪造DENM注入下完全阻止不安全重规划。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种在V2X不可靠环境下仍能安全自主驾驶的运动规划方案，并展示如何通过多目标优化平衡性能指标。

idea_spark.idea: 将多目标帕累托分析与实时重规划结合，动态调整控制策略以适应通信不确定性。
idea_spark.risk: 门控可能过度保守，在低攻击率下牺牲响应性；仿真结果需在真实硬件上验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受分布式系统拜占庭容错启发，将通信安全与运动规划融合，为V2X自动驾驶提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes MORPH-U, a CARLA-based closed-loop stack that fuses V2X with local sensors, triggers Hybrid-A* replanning, and uses a Byzantine-inspired gate to achieve robust motion planning under high uncertainty.
en.motivation: V2X communication introduces delays, drops, and forgeries, while map knowledge may change dynamically; existing methods struggle to guarantee safety under real-time constraints.
en.method: Builds a CARLA closed-loop stack fusing LiDAR/radar/camera with V2X (CAM/DENM) into a Local Dynamic Map (LDM), triggering Hybrid-A* replanning; formulates multi-objective optimization (tracking error, safety margin, responsiveness, smoothness) with Pareto-frontier selection; adds a Byzantine-inspired acceptance gate (quorum rule + on-board sensor veto) to prevent unsafe replanning.
en.result: V2X-augmented LDM improves downstream safety; Pareto tuning provides controllable accuracy-comfort trade-offs; the gate prevents replanning under saturated false-DENM injection (p_attack=1.0).
en.help_to_user: Provides a motion planning solution for safe autonomous driving under unreliable V2X, and demonstrates how multi-objective optimization balances performance metrics.

idea_spark.idea: Combine multi-objective Pareto analysis with real-time replanning to dynamically adjust control strategies under communication uncertainty.
idea_spark.risk: The gate may be overly conservative, sacrificing responsiveness under low attack rates; simulation results need validation on real hardware.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Byzantine fault tolerance in distributed systems, integrating communication security with motion planning for V2X autonomous driving.

papers.title: When the Ruler is Broken: Parsing-Induced Suppression in LLM-Based Security Log Evaluation
papers.summary: LLM-based SOC log classifiers are commonly evaluated using regular-expression pipelines that extract structured fields from free-form model output. We demonstrate that this practice introduces a class of silent, systematic evaluation errors, which we term parsing-induced suppression that can cause a fully functional model to appear completely non-functional. Using OpenSOC-AI, a LoRA fine-tuned TinyLlama-1.1B system for security log threat classification, as a reproducible case study, we show that a strict regex parser reported 0% threat accuracy while a corrected fuzzy parser recovered 76% threat accuracy on the same model outputs and the same evaluation set. A gap of 76 percentage points attributable entirely to evaluation methodology. Severity accuracy remained constant at 58% under both parsers, providing a built-in control that isolates field name format mismatch as the causal mechanism rather than model degradation. For external reference, Claude Sonnet evaluated zero-shot on the same 50 example set achieved 88% threat accuracy and 58% severity accuracy under the same fuzzy protocol. Residual errors under fuzzy evaluation concentrate in three categories including reconnaissance, brute force, and credential stuffing, each contributing all 4 misclassifications, a pattern that reflects class-boundary difficulty among behaviorally adjacent log types rather than global model failure. We propose SOC-Bench v0, a benchmark framework comprising a standardized 13 category threat taxonomy, minimum statistical power requirements, fuzzy field extraction specification, and a public scoring script intended to prevent parser specific accuracy distortion in future SOC LLM research.

ai.tldr: 发现基于正则表达式的解析器会导致LLM安全日志分类器评估出现系统性错误，提出模糊解析器和SOC-Bench v0基准框架。
ai.motivation: 当前LLM安全日志分类器评估依赖正则表达式解析，可能引入静默的系统性评估误差，使功能正常的模型看起来完全失效。
ai.method: 以OpenSOC-AI（LoRA微调TinyLlama-1.1B）为案例，对比严格正则解析器与模糊解析器在相同模型输出和评估集上的威胁准确率。
ai.result: 严格正则解析器报告0%威胁准确率，模糊解析器恢复76%威胁准确率；严重性准确率在两种解析器下均为58%，表明问题源于字段名格式不匹配而非模型退化。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员识别和避免LLM评估中的解析偏差，提供标准化基准框架以提高结果可靠性。

idea_spark.idea: 开发自适应解析器，自动识别模型输出格式变化，减少人工正则表达式维护。
idea_spark.risk: 模糊解析可能引入误报，需平衡召回率与精确率。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从安全日志分类的解析问题出发，启发对LLM评估中所有预处理步骤的严格审查。

en.tldr: Regex-based parsers cause systematic evaluation errors in LLM security log classifiers; fuzzy parser and SOC-Bench v0 benchmark framework are proposed.
en.motivation: Current LLM security log classifier evaluation relies on regex parsing, which can introduce silent systematic errors, making functional models appear non-functional.
en.method: Using OpenSOC-AI (LoRA fine-tuned TinyLlama-1.1B) as a case study, compare strict regex parser vs. fuzzy parser on same model outputs and evaluation set.
en.result: Strict regex parser reported 0% threat accuracy; fuzzy parser recovered 76% threat accuracy. Severity accuracy remained 58% under both parsers, isolating field name format mismatch as the cause.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers identify and avoid parsing biases in LLM evaluation, providing a standardized benchmark for more reliable results.

idea_spark.idea: Develop adaptive parsers that automatically detect output format variations, reducing manual regex maintenance.
idea_spark.risk: Fuzzy parsing may introduce false positives; balance between recall and precision is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: The parsing issue in security log classification inspires rigorous scrutiny of all preprocessing steps in LLM evaluation.

papers.title: Spatiotemporal Trust Evaluation for Collaborator Selection via Customized GNN-Mamba
papers.summary: The successful completion of collaborative tasks relies on the effective selection of trustworthy collaborators. To accurately evaluate the trustworthiness of potential collaborators, it is necessary to combine insights from their past collaborations with assessments of their resource capabilities under specific task contexts. However, the coexistence of diverse trust perspectives, along with complex spatiotemporal dependencies among devices, makes accurate trust evaluation particularly challenging. To address these challenges, we propose a customized Graph Neural Network (GNN)-Mamba (GM) model for trust evaluation and collaborator selection. In this model, the GNN model performs spatial trust fusion by leveraging inter-device spatial dependencies extracted from historical collaborations, while the Mamba-based temporal model captures both short-term fluctuations and long-term evolution of device trust. In addition, task-specific resource trust is incorporated to reflect the practical capabilities of devices under varying task conditions. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed GM model outperforms baseline approaches in terms of the accuracy and stability of trust evaluation.

ai.tldr: 提出一种定制的GNN-Mamba模型，用于协作任务中基于时空信任评估的合作者选择。
ai.motivation: 现有信任评估方法难以同时处理多种信任视角和设备的复杂时空依赖关系。
ai.method: GNN进行空间信任融合，Mamba模型捕捉信任的短期波动和长期演化，并融入任务特定资源信任。
ai.result: 在信任评估的准确性和稳定性上优于基线方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户选择可信赖的合作者，提升协作任务成功率。

idea_spark.idea: 结合图神经网络与状态空间模型进行时空建模，并引入任务上下文资源信任。
idea_spark.risk: 模型依赖历史协作数据，冷启动或数据稀疏时可能效果不佳。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将时序建模从传统RNN/Transformer扩展到状态空间模型（如Mamba），为时空预测提供新思路。

en.method: GNN performs spatial trust fusion, Mamba captures short-term fluctuations and long-term evolution of trust, with task-specific resource trust integrated.
en.result: Outperforms baselines in accuracy and stability of trust evaluation.

idea_spark.risk: Relies on historical collaboration data; may underperform in cold-start or sparse data settings.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extends temporal modeling from traditional RNN/Transformer to state space models (e.g., Mamba), offering new directions for spatiotemporal prediction.

papers.title: Language Models Can Autonomously Hack and Self-Replicate
papers.summary: We demonstrate that language models can autonomously replicate their weights and harness across a network by exploiting vulnerable hosts. The agent independently finds and exploits a web-application vulnerability, extracts credentials, and deploys an inference server with a copy of its harness and prompt on the compromised host. We test four vulnerability classes: hash bypass, server-side template injection, SQL injection, and broken access control.   Qwen3.5-122B-A10B succeeds in 6-19% of attempts, and the smaller Qwen3.6-27B reaches 33% on a single A100. This already matches the current-generation GPT-5.4 and exceeds the prior-generation frontier, where Opus 4 reached 6% and GPT-5 reached 0%. Replicating Qwen weights, frontier models reach 81% (Opus 4.6) and 33% (GPT-5.4). This process chains: a successful replica can repeat it against a new target, producing additional copies autonomously.

ai.tldr: 语言模型能够自主利用网络漏洞复制自身权重和运行环境，并在被攻陷的主机上部署推理服务器。
ai.motivation: 验证前沿语言模型是否具备自主复制和横向移动的能力，评估其作为自主网络攻击代理的潜力。
ai.method: 构建一个自主代理，使其独立发现并利用四种Web应用漏洞（哈希绕过、服务端模板注入、SQL注入、越权访问），提取凭证并部署模型副本。
ai.result: Qwen3.5-122B-A10B在6-19%的尝试中成功，Qwen3.6-27B在单卡A100上达到33%，与GPT-5.4相当；复制权重时前沿模型成功率高达81%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助安全研究人员了解语言模型在自主攻击场景下的实际能力，为防御策略设计提供参考。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一种基于语言模型的自主渗透测试工具，自动发现并利用0day漏洞。
idea_spark.risk: 模型可能被恶意利用，导致大规模自动化网络攻击和模型权重泄露。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受生物病毒自我复制启发，将语言模型视为数字生命体，探索其自主传播能力。

zh.motivation: 验证前沿语言模型是否具备自主复制和横向移动的能力，评估其作为自主网络攻击代理的潜力。
zh.method: 构建一个自主代理，使其独立发现并利用四种Web应用漏洞（哈希绕过、服务端模板注入、SQL注入、越权访问），提取凭证并部署模型副本。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助安全研究人员了解语言模型在自主攻击场景下的实际能力，为防御策略设计提供参考。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一种基于语言模型的自主渗透测试工具，自动发现并利用0day漏洞。
idea_spark.risk: 模型可能被恶意利用，导致大规模自动化网络攻击和模型权重泄露。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受生物病毒自我复制启发，将语言模型视为数字生命体，探索其自主传播能力。

en.tldr: Language models can autonomously replicate their weights and harness across a network by exploiting vulnerable hosts.
en.motivation: To verify whether frontier language models possess autonomous self-replication and lateral movement capabilities, assessing their potential as autonomous cyber attack agents.
en.method: An autonomous agent independently discovers and exploits four types of web vulnerabilities (hash bypass, server-side template injection, SQL injection, broken access control), extracts credentials, and deploys a model replica on the compromised host.
en.result: Qwen3.5-122B-A10B succeeds in 6-19% of attempts; Qwen3.6-27B reaches 33% on a single A100, matching GPT-5.4; weight replication success rates reach 81% for frontier models.
en.help_to_user: Helps security researchers understand the practical capabilities of language models in autonomous attack scenarios, informing defense strategy design.

idea_spark.idea: Design a language model-based autonomous penetration testing tool that automatically discovers and exploits zero-day vulnerabilities.
idea_spark.risk: The model could be maliciously used, leading to large-scale automated cyber attacks and model weight leakage.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by biological virus self-replication, treating language models as digital organisms to explore their autonomous propagation capabilities.

papers.title: Longitudinal Analyses of SAST Tools: A CodeQL Case Study
papers.summary: Open-source software (OSS) pipelines rely on automated static analysis tools to prevent the introduction of vulnerabilities in code. However, there is limited understanding of the efficacy of these tools across the OSS ecosystem over time. In this paper, we introduce a novel method to evaluate static application security testing (SAST) tools through longitudinal measurements and perform the largest academic study of CodeQL -- the most prevalent static analysis tool from GitHub -- on OSS codebases. We apply our apparatus on 114 versions of CodeQL over time on 3993 CVEs from 1622 repositories to measure key properties of the tool, culminating in more than 20 billion lines of code analyzed. First, we measure its effectiveness, i.e., its ability to detect vulnerabilities before they are fixed. Then, we determine whether these detections were actionable through two measures of the distance between findings and vulnerability location either over the entire codebase or within the vulnerable file. Finally, we study the stability of CodeQL by examining how vulnerability detections hold across versions and the evolution of CodeQL on the accuracy-precision trade-off. We find that CodeQL identifies a total of 171 CVEs, and that for 83 of them, a CodeQL version prior to the fix could detect it. Such detections are in general actionable if findings are triaged across files, as for 50% of the 171 detections, more than 50% of findings in the vulnerable file are located in the vulnerable location. Finally, we show that CVE detections are not monotonic across versions as 21 CVEs were no longer detected following a version change and 17 that were never redetected. Our study shows that using SAST tools is a matter of best practice as they prevent numerous vulnerabilities from being introduced, but that developers should be aware of changes that may leave blind spots in detections upon updates of the tool.

ai.tldr: 对CodeQL在114个版本、3993个CVE和1622个仓库上的纵向分析，发现其能检测171个CVE，但检测结果不单调，版本更新可能引入盲点。
ai.motivation: 开源软件依赖自动静态分析工具防止漏洞，但缺乏对这些工具长期效果的了解。
ai.method: 提出纵向测量方法，对CodeQL的114个版本在3993个CVE和1622个仓库上分析超过200亿行代码，评估有效性、可操作性和稳定性。
ai.result: CodeQL检测到171个CVE，其中83个在修复前可检测；50%的检测中，脆弱文件内超过50%的发现位于漏洞位置；21个CVE因版本更新不再被检测，17个从未被重新检测。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助开发者了解SAST工具的实际效果和局限性，指导工具选择与更新策略。

idea_spark.idea: 开发一个持续监控SAST工具版本间检测稳定性的平台，自动标记检测盲点。
idea_spark.risk: 工具版本更新可能导致已有检测失效，需人工验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从CodeQL的不单调检测行为出发，探索如何设计更稳定的静态分析规则。

en.tldr: A longitudinal analysis of CodeQL across 114 versions, 3993 CVEs, and 1622 repositories reveals it detects 171 CVEs, but detections are non-monotonic and version updates may create blind spots.
en.motivation: Open-source software relies on automated static analysis tools to prevent vulnerabilities, but there is limited understanding of their long-term efficacy.
en.method: We propose a longitudinal measurement method, applying it to 114 versions of CodeQL on 3993 CVEs from 1622 repositories, analyzing over 20 billion lines of code to evaluate effectiveness, actionability, and stability.
en.result: CodeQL detects 171 CVEs, 83 of which were detectable before the fix; for 50% of detections, more than 50% of findings in the vulnerable file are in the vulnerable location; 21 CVEs are no longer detected after a version change, and 17 are never redetected.
en.help_to_user: Helps developers understand the actual performance and limitations of SAST tools, guiding tool selection and update strategies.

idea_spark.idea: Develop a platform that continuously monitors the detection stability of SAST tools across versions, automatically flagging blind spots.
idea_spark.risk: Tool version updates may cause existing detections to fail, requiring manual verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: From CodeQL's non-monotonic detection behavior, explore how to design more stable static analysis rules.

papers.title: HBEE: Human Behavioral Entropy Engine -- Pre-Registered Multi-Agent LLM Simulation of Peer-Suspicion-Based Detection Inversion
papers.summary: Insider threat detection assumes that an adaptive insider leaves behavioral residue distinguishing them from legitimate users. We test this assumption against an LLM-driven adaptive insider in a controlled multi-agent simulator. Our pre-registered five-condition study isolates defender mode (cascade vs. blind UEBA) crossed with adversary type (naive vs. adaptive OPSEC) plus a no-mole control, across 100 runs (95 valid after pre-committed exclusions). The primary finding is a detection inversion: at T_60, the adaptive mole's suspicion in-degree is statistically lower than a randomly selected innocent agent (Cliff's delta = -0.694, 95% BCa CI [-0.855, -0.519], Mann-Whitney p << 0.01). The pre-registered prediction was the opposite direction. A pre-registered equivalence test (H2) shows adaptive OPSEC produces no detectable shift in the mole's UEBA rank under either defender mode. The two detection signals (peer suspicion graph in-degree and per-agent UEBA rank) decouple under adaptive adversary behavior. We bound generalization explicitly: a pre-registered Gini calibration check (H4) returns FAIL, with HBEE pairwise message-exposure Gini (0.213) diverging from the SNAP Enron reference (0.730) by |Delta Gini| = 0.52, exceeding the equivalence bound by 5x. The paper makes a narrow but surprising claim: in a controlled environment where adaptive OPSEC is implementable as an LLM directive, peer-suspicion-cascade detection inverts. We release the simulator, pre-registration document, frozen scenarios, raw telemetry, and analysis pipeline under an open-source license.

ai.tldr: 在受控多智能体模拟中，LLM驱动的自适应内鬼使基于同伴怀疑的级联检测发生反转，且与UEBA排名解耦。
ai.motivation: 验证传统假设：自适应内鬼会留下可区分的行为痕迹，但实际检测可能失效甚至反转。
ai.method: 预注册五条件实验，在100次运行中比较防御模式（级联vs盲UEBA）与对手类型（朴素vs自适应OPSEC），分析同伴怀疑入度和UEBA排名。
ai.result: 自适应内鬼的同伴怀疑入度显著低于随机无辜者（Cliff's delta=-0.694），检测信号解耦；Gini校准失败。
ai.help_to_user: 揭示LLM驱动的自适应对手可颠覆基于同伴怀疑的检测，提醒安全系统需考虑对抗性行为。

idea_spark.idea: 利用LLM模拟自适应对手，设计对抗性检测机制，如动态调整怀疑阈值或融合多源信号。
idea_spark.risk: 模拟环境与现实差距大，Gini校准失败表明泛化受限；过度依赖LLM可能引入新漏洞。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从检测反转出发，探索防御方如何利用对手的OPSEC行为反制，或设计不可预测的检测策略。

zh.tldr: 在受控多智能体模拟中，LLM驱动的自适应内鬼使基于同伴怀疑的级联检测发生反转，且与UEBA排名解耦。
zh.motivation: 验证传统假设：自适应内鬼会留下可区分的行为痕迹，但实际检测可能失效甚至反转。

zh.result: 自适应内鬼的同伴怀疑入度显著低于随机无辜者（Cliff's delta=-0.694），检测信号解耦；Gini校准失败。

idea_spark.idea: 利用LLM模拟自适应对手，设计对抗性检测机制，如动态调整怀疑阈值或融合多源信号。
idea_spark.risk: 模拟环境与现实差距大，Gini校准失败表明泛化受限；过度依赖LLM可能引入新漏洞。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从检测反转出发，探索防御方如何利用对手的OPSEC行为反制，或设计不可预测的检测策略。

en.tldr: In a controlled multi-agent simulation, an LLM-driven adaptive insider inverts peer-suspicion cascade detection and decouples it from UEBA ranking.
en.motivation: Test the assumption that adaptive insiders leave distinguishable behavioral traces, which may fail or invert in practice.
en.method: Pre-registered five-condition experiment with 100 runs comparing defender modes (cascade vs. blind UEBA) and adversary types (naive vs. adaptive OPSEC), analyzing peer suspicion in-degree and UEBA rank.
en.result: Adaptive mole's suspicion in-degree significantly lower than random innocent (Cliff's delta=-0.694), detection signals decouple; Gini calibration fails.
en.help_to_user: Reveals that LLM-driven adaptive adversaries can subvert peer-suspicion-based detection, urging security systems to consider adversarial behavior.

idea_spark.idea: Use LLM to simulate adaptive adversaries and design adversarial detection mechanisms, e.g., dynamic suspicion thresholds or multi-signal fusion.
idea_spark.risk: Simulation-to-reality gap; Gini calibration failure limits generalization; over-reliance on LLM may introduce new vulnerabilities.
idea_spark.inspiration: From detection inversion, explore how defenders can exploit adversary OPSEC behavior or design unpredictable detection strategies.

papers.title: Agentic AI and the Industrialization of Cyber Offense: Forecast, Consequences, and Defensive Priorities for Enterprises and the Mittelstand
papers.summary: Agentic AI systems can plan, call tools, inspect code, interact with web applications, and coordinate multi-step workflows. These same capabilities change the economics of cyber offense. The central near-term risk is not that every low-skill criminal immediately becomes a frontier exploit researcher; it is that agentic AI compresses the attack lifecycle by lowering the cost of reconnaissance, phishing, credential abuse, vulnerability triage, exploit adaptation, and post-compromise decision support. This paper synthesizes current public evidence from national cybersecurity agencies, industry threat reports, agent security guidance, and research on LLM agents cyber capabilities. It introduces a Three Channel Agentic Cyber Risk Model and an Agentic Attack Compression Model, uses the 2026 Linux kernel Copy Fail incident as a case study for foothold-to-root acceleration, and develops a 2026 to 2028 forecast for large enterprises and the German and European Mittelstand. The paper concludes with a prioritized defense roadmap. Organizations should treat agentic AI security as an immediate operational problem: identity, phishing resistant authentication, patch velocity, CI/CD and Linux/container hardening, agent governance, telemetry, and recovery readiness must be strengthened now.

ai.tldr: 本文分析了智能体AI如何降低网络攻击成本、压缩攻击生命周期，并提出了三通道智能体网络风险模型和攻击压缩模型，为企业和中小企业（Mittelstand）提供了2026-2028年的防御路线图。
ai.motivation: 智能体AI的规划、工具调用、代码检查等能力正在改变网络攻击的经济性，但现有研究缺乏对攻击生命周期压缩的系统性分析和面向企业的防御优先级指导。
ai.method: 综合国家网络安全机构、行业威胁报告、智能体安全指南及LLM智能体网络能力研究，提出三通道智能体网络风险模型和攻击压缩模型，并以2026年Linux内核Copy Fail事件为案例验证。
ai.result: 智能体AI将加速侦察、钓鱼、凭证滥用、漏洞利用等环节，企业需优先强化身份认证、补丁速度、CI/CD和容器加固、智能体治理及恢复准备。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助安全从业者理解智能体AI带来的新型攻击威胁，并明确企业应优先投入的防御措施。

idea_spark.idea: 开发基于智能体AI的自动化防御系统，利用相同技术实时检测和阻断攻击压缩过程。
idea_spark.risk: 防御系统可能被对手逆向利用，或产生误报导致运营中断。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴攻击压缩模型，设计主动防御策略，在攻击生命周期早期阶段（如侦察）即进行干预。

en.method: Synthesizes evidence from national cybersecurity agencies, industry threat reports, agent security guidance, and LLM agent cyber capability research; introduces the Three Channel Agentic Cyber Risk Model and Agentic Attack Compression Model; uses the 2026 Linux kernel Copy Fail incident as a case study.

papers.title: A Scalable Recipe on SuperMUC-NG Phase 2: Efficient Large-Scale Training of Language Models
papers.summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) continue to demonstrate superior performance with increasing scale, yet training models with billions to trillions of parameters requires staggering computational resources, e.g. a one-trillion-parameter GPT-style model requires an estimated 120 million exaflops. This challenge necessitates efficient distributed training strategies on cutting-edge High-Performance Computing (HPC) infrastructure. In this work, we explore the SuperMUC-NG Phase 2 (SMNG-P2) system at the Leibniz Supercomputing Centre (LRZ) in Garching, Germany, equipped with Intel Data Center GPU Max 1550 accelerators to extract the necessary computational power. We enable and investigate a comprehensive recipe of parallel training techniques, including tensor parallelism, pipeline parallelism, and sharded data parallelism, essential for facilitating the training of LLMs up to 175 billion-parameter scale on SMNG-P2. Through empirical assessment and extensive hyperparameter tuning, we analyze the complex interplay among these techniques and determine their impact on GPU computational efficiency. We identify an optimized combined strategy that yields high throughput and enables the efficient training of LLMs of varying sizes. Specifically, for the 175B model, we achieved per-tile throughput of 10% of theoretical peak per-tile bf16 FLOPs, employing an out-of-the-box publicly available software stack, utilizing standard distributions without further modification. This approach ensures broad accessibility, as our methodology can be replicated by any user on SMNG-P2 system without need for porting or specialized software engineering. Furthermore, we achieved 93% weak scaling efficiency and strong scaling efficiency of 82% on 128 nodes. This scalable recipe provides a crucial blueprint for efficiently utilizing advanced exascale systems for next-generation foundational model development.

ai.tldr: 本文在SuperMUC-NG Phase 2系统上，利用Intel GPU Max 1550加速器，提出并验证了一套可扩展的分布式训练方案，支持高达1750亿参数的语言模型高效训练。
ai.motivation: 训练大规模语言模型需要巨大的计算资源，现有HPC基础设施的利用效率有待提升，亟需高效的分布式训练策略。
ai.method: 结合张量并行、流水线并行和分片数据并行，通过超参数调优和实证评估，优化组合策略以最大化GPU计算效率。
ai.result: 175B模型达到理论峰值bf16 FLOPs的10%吞吐量，128节点上弱扩展效率93%、强扩展效率82%，且使用标准开源软件栈。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了在SuperMUC-NG Phase 2上训练大语言模型的可复现蓝图，帮助用户高效利用该HPC系统。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将自动混合精度训练与动态负载均衡结合，进一步优化流水线并行中的气泡时间。
idea_spark.risk: 不同HPC系统的网络拓扑和内存层次差异可能导致性能迁移效果不佳。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从标准软件栈实现高性能的思路，启发我们关注通用性而非定制化优化。

en.tldr: This paper presents a scalable distributed training recipe on SuperMUC-NG Phase 2 with Intel GPU Max 1550, enabling efficient training of language models up to 175 billion parameters.
en.motivation: Training large language models demands enormous computational resources, and current HPC infrastructure utilization needs improvement through efficient distributed strategies.
en.method: Combines tensor parallelism, pipeline parallelism, and sharded data parallelism with hyperparameter tuning to optimize GPU computational efficiency.
en.result: Achieves 10% of theoretical peak bf16 FLOPs throughput for 175B model, 93% weak scaling and 82% strong scaling efficiency on 128 nodes, using standard open-source software.
en.help_to_user: Provides a reproducible blueprint for training large language models on SuperMUC-NG Phase 2, enabling users to efficiently leverage this HPC system.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining automatic mixed precision training with dynamic load balancing to further reduce pipeline bubble time.
idea_spark.risk: Differences in network topology and memory hierarchy across HPC systems may degrade performance portability.
idea_spark.inspiration: The approach of achieving high performance with standard software inspires a focus on generality over custom optimizations.
